2211 proto_info.Variadic = is_variadic;
2212 proto_info.ExceptionSpec = EST_None;
2213 proto_info.TypeQuals = clang::Qualifiers::fromFastMask(type_quals);
2214 proto_info.RefQualifier = ref_qual;
2215
2216 return GetType(getASTContext().getFunctionType(
2217 ClangUtil::GetQualType(result_type), qual_type_args, proto_info));
2218}
2219
2220ParmVarDecl *TypeSystemClang::CreateParameterDeclaration(
2221 clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx, OptionalClangModuleID owning_module,
2222 const char *name, const CompilerType &param_type, int storage,
2223 bool add_decl) {
2224 ASTContext &ast = getASTContext();
2225 auto *decl = ParmVarDecl::CreateDeserialized(ast, GlobalDeclID());
2226 decl->setDeclContext(decl_ctx);
2227 if (name && name[0])
2228 decl->setDeclName(&ast.Idents.get(name));
2229 decl->setType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(param_type));
2230 decl->setStorageClass(static_cast<clang::StorageClass>(storage));
2231 SetOwningModule(decl, owning_module);
2232 if (add_decl)
2233 decl_ctx->addDecl(decl);
2234
2235 return decl;
2236}
2237
2238CompilerType
2239TypeSystemClang::CreateBlockPointerType(const CompilerType &function_type) {
2240 QualType block_type = m_ast_up->getBlockPointerType(
2241 clang::QualType::getFromOpaquePtr(function_type.GetOpaqueQualType()));
2242
2243 return GetType(block_type);
2244}
2245
2246#pragma mark Array Types
2247
2248CompilerType
2249TypeSystemClang::CreateArrayType(const CompilerType &element_type,
2250 std::optional<size_t> element_count,
2251 bool is_vector) {
2252 if (!element_type.IsValid())
2253 return {};
2254
2255 ASTContext &ast = getASTContext();
2256
2257 // Unknown number of elements; this is an incomplete array
2258 // (e.g., variable length array with non-constant bounds, or
2259 // a flexible array member).
2260 if (!element_count)
2261 return GetType(
2262 ast.getIncompleteArrayType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(element_type),
2263 clang::ArraySizeModifier::Normal, 0));
2264
2265 if (is_vector)
2266 return GetType(ast.getExtVectorType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(element_type),
2267 *element_count));
2268
2269 llvm::APInt ap_element_count(64, *element_count);
2270 return GetType(ast.getConstantArrayType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(element_type),
2271 ap_element_count, nullptr,
2272 clang::ArraySizeModifier::Normal, 0));
2273}
2274
2275CompilerType TypeSystemClang::CreateStructForIdentifier(
2276 llvm::StringRef type_name,
2277 const std::initializer_list<std::pair<const char *, CompilerType>>
2278 &type_fields,
2279 bool packed) {
2280 CompilerType type;
2281 if (!type_name.empty() && (type = GetTypeForIdentifier<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(
2282 getASTContext(), type_name))
2283 .IsValid()) {
2284 lldbassert(0 && "Trying to create a type for an existing name");
2285 return type;
2286 }
2287
2288 type = CreateRecordType(
2289 nullptr, OptionalClangModuleID(), lldb::eAccessPublic, type_name,
2290 llvm::to_underlying(clang::TagTypeKind::Struct), lldb::eLanguageTypeC);
2291 StartTagDeclarationDefinition(type);
2292 for (const auto &field : type_fields)
2293 AddFieldToRecordType(type, field.first, field.second, lldb::eAccessPublic,
2294 0);
2295 if (packed)
2296 SetIsPacked(type);
2297 CompleteTagDeclarationDefinition(type);
2298 return type;
2299}
2300
2301CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetOrCreateStructForIdentifier(
2302 llvm::StringRef type_name,
2303 const std::initializer_list<std::pair<const char *, CompilerType>>
2304 &type_fields,
2305 bool packed) {
2306 CompilerType type;
2307 if ((type = GetTypeForIdentifier<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(getASTContext(),
2308 type_name))
2309 .IsValid())
2310 return type;
2311
2312 return CreateStructForIdentifier(type_name, type_fields, packed);
2313}
2314
2315#pragma mark Enumeration Types
2316
2317CompilerType TypeSystemClang::CreateEnumerationType(
2318 llvm::StringRef name, clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx,
2319 OptionalClangModuleID owning_module, const Declaration &decl,
2320 const CompilerType &integer_clang_type, bool is_scoped,
2321 std::optional<clang::EnumExtensibilityAttr::Kind> enum_kind) {
2322 // TODO: Do something intelligent with the Declaration object passed in
2323 // like maybe filling in the SourceLocation with it...
2324 ASTContext &ast = getASTContext();
2325
2326 // TODO: ask about these...
2327 // const bool IsFixed = false;
2328 EnumDecl *enum_decl = EnumDecl::CreateDeserialized(ast, GlobalDeclID());
2329 enum_decl->setDeclContext(decl_ctx);
2330 if (!name.empty())
2331 enum_decl->setDeclName(&ast.Idents.get(name));
2332 enum_decl->setScoped(is_scoped);
2333 enum_decl->setScopedUsingClassTag(is_scoped);
2334 enum_decl->setFixed(false);
2335 SetOwningModule(enum_decl, owning_module);
2336 if (decl_ctx)
2337 decl_ctx->addDecl(enum_decl);
2338
2339 if (enum_kind)
2340 enum_decl->addAttr(
2341 clang::EnumExtensibilityAttr::CreateImplicit(ast, *enum_kind));
2342
2343 // TODO: check if we should be setting the promotion type too?
2344 enum_decl->setIntegerType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(integer_clang_type));
2345
2346 enum_decl->setAccess(AS_public);
2347
2348 return GetType(ast.getCanonicalTagType(enum_decl));
2349}
2350
2351CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetIntTypeFromBitSize(size_t bit_size,
2352 bool is_signed) {
2353 clang::ASTContext &ast = getASTContext();
2354
2355 if (!ast.VoidPtrTy)
2356 return {};
2357
2358 if (is_signed) {
2359 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.SignedCharTy))
2360 return GetType(ast.SignedCharTy);
2361
2362 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.ShortTy))
2363 return GetType(ast.ShortTy);
2364
2365 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.IntTy))
2366 return GetType(ast.IntTy);
2367
2368 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.LongTy))
2369 return GetType(ast.LongTy);
2370
2371 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.LongLongTy))
2372 return GetType(ast.LongLongTy);
2373
2374 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.Int128Ty))
2375 return GetType(ast.Int128Ty);
2376 } else {
2377 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.UnsignedCharTy))
2378 return GetType(ast.UnsignedCharTy);
2379
2380 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.UnsignedShortTy))
2381 return GetType(ast.UnsignedShortTy);
2382
2383 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.UnsignedIntTy))
2384 return GetType(ast.UnsignedIntTy);
2385
2386 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.UnsignedLongTy))
2387 return GetType(ast.UnsignedLongTy);
2388
2389 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.UnsignedLongLongTy))
2390 return GetType(ast.UnsignedLongLongTy);
2391
2392 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.UnsignedInt128Ty))
2393 return GetType(ast.UnsignedInt128Ty);
2394 }
2395 return CompilerType();
2396}
2397
2398CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetPointerSizedIntType(bool is_signed) {
2399 if (!getASTContext().VoidPtrTy)
2400 return {};
2401
2402 return GetIntTypeFromBitSize(
2403 getASTContext().getTypeSize(getASTContext().VoidPtrTy), is_signed);
2404}
2405
2406void TypeSystemClang::DumpDeclContextHiearchy(clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx) {
2407 if (decl_ctx) {
2408 DumpDeclContextHiearchy(decl_ctx->getParent());
2409
2410 clang::NamedDecl *named_decl = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::NamedDecl>(decl_ctx);
2411 if (named_decl) {
2412 printf("%20s: %s\n", decl_ctx->getDeclKindName(),
2413 named_decl->getDeclName().getAsString().c_str());
2414 } else {
2415 printf("%20s\n", decl_ctx->getDeclKindName());
2416 }
2417 }
2418}
2419
2420void TypeSystemClang::DumpDeclHiearchy(clang::Decl *decl) {
2421 if (decl == nullptr)
2422 return;
2423 DumpDeclContextHiearchy(decl->getDeclContext());
2424
2425 clang::RecordDecl *record_decl = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::RecordDecl>(decl);
2426 if (record_decl) {
2427 bool is_injected_class_name =
2428 llvm::isa<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(record_decl) &&
2429 llvm::cast<CXXRecordDecl>(record_decl)->isInjectedClassName();
2430 printf("%20s: %s%s\n", decl->getDeclKindName(),
2431 record_decl->getDeclName().getAsString().c_str(),
2432 is_injected_class_name ? " (injected class name)" : "");
2433
2434 } else {
2435 clang::NamedDecl *named_decl = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::NamedDecl>(decl);
2436 if (named_decl) {
2437 printf("%20s: %s\n", decl->getDeclKindName(),
2438 named_decl->getDeclName().getAsString().c_str());
2439 } else {
2440 printf("%20s\n", decl->getDeclKindName());
2441 }
2442 }
2443}
2444
2445bool TypeSystemClang::GetCompleteDecl(clang::ASTContext *ast,
2446 clang::Decl *decl) {
2447 if (!decl)
2448 return false;
2449
2450 ExternalASTSource *ast_source = ast->getExternalSource();
2451
2452 if (!ast_source)
2453 return false;
2454
2455 if (clang::TagDecl *tag_decl = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::TagDecl>(decl)) {
2456 if (tag_decl->isCompleteDefinition())
2457 return true;
2458
2459 if (!tag_decl->hasExternalLexicalStorage())
2460 return false;
2461
2462 ast_source->CompleteType(tag_decl);
2463
2464 return !ast->getCanonicalTagType(tag_decl)->isIncompleteType();
2465 } else if (clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *objc_interface_decl =
2466 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl>(decl)) {
2467 if (objc_interface_decl->getDefinition())
2468 return true;
2469
2470 if (!objc_interface_decl->hasExternalLexicalStorage())
2471 return false;
2472
2473 ast_source->CompleteType(objc_interface_decl);
2474
2475 return !objc_interface_decl->getTypeForDecl()->isIncompleteType();
2476 } else {
2477 return false;
2478 }
2479}
2480
2481void TypeSystemClang::SetMetadataAsUserID(const clang::Decl *decl,
2482 user_id_t user_id) {
2483 ClangASTMetadata meta_data;
2484 meta_data.SetUserID(user_id);
2485 SetMetadata(decl, meta_data);
2486}
2487
2488void TypeSystemClang::SetMetadataAsUserID(const clang::Type *type,
2489 user_id_t user_id) {
2490 ClangASTMetadata meta_data;
2491 meta_data.SetUserID(user_id);
2492 SetMetadata(type, meta_data);
2493}
2494
2495void TypeSystemClang::SetMetadata(const clang::Decl *object,
2496 ClangASTMetadata metadata) {
2497 m_decl_metadata[object] = metadata;
2498}
2499
2500void TypeSystemClang::SetMetadata(const clang::Type *object,
2501 ClangASTMetadata metadata) {
2502 m_type_metadata[object] = metadata;
2503}
2504
2505std::optional<ClangASTMetadata>
2506TypeSystemClang::GetMetadata(const clang::Decl *object) {
2507 auto It = m_decl_metadata.find(object);
2508 if (It != m_decl_metadata.end())
2509 return It->second;
2510
2511 return std::nullopt;
2512}
2513
2514std::optional<ClangASTMetadata>
2515TypeSystemClang::GetMetadata(const clang::Type *object) {
2516 auto It = m_type_metadata.find(object);
2517 if (It != m_type_metadata.end())
2518 return It->second;
2519
2520 return std::nullopt;
2521}
2522
2523clang::DeclContext *
2524TypeSystemClang::GetDeclContextForType(const CompilerType &type) {
2525 return GetDeclContextForType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(type));
2526}
2527
2528CompilerDeclContext
2529TypeSystemClang::GetCompilerDeclContextForType(const CompilerType &type) {
2530 if (auto *decl_context = GetDeclContextForType(type))
2531 return CreateDeclContext(decl_context);
2532 return CompilerDeclContext();
2533}
2534
2535/// Aggressively desugar the provided type, skipping past various kinds of
2536/// syntactic sugar and other constructs one typically wants to ignore.
2537/// The \p mask argument allows one to skip certain kinds of simplifications,
2538/// when one wishes to handle a certain kind of type directly.
2539static QualType
2540RemoveWrappingTypes(QualType type, ArrayRef<clang::Type::TypeClass> mask = {}) {
2541 while (true) {
2542 if (find(mask, type->getTypeClass()) != mask.end())
2543 return type;
2544 switch (type->getTypeClass()) {
2545 // This is not fully correct as _Atomic is more than sugar, but it is
2546 // sufficient for the purposes we care about.
2547 case clang::Type::Atomic:
2548 type = cast<clang::AtomicType>(type)->getValueType();
2549 break;
2550 case clang::Type::Auto:
2551 case clang::Type::Decltype:
2552 case clang::Type::Paren:
2553 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParm:
2554 case clang::Type::TemplateSpecialization:
2555 case clang::Type::Typedef:
2556 case clang::Type::TypeOf:
2557 case clang::Type::TypeOfExpr:
2558 case clang::Type::Using:
2559 case clang::Type::PredefinedSugar:
2560 type = type->getLocallyUnqualifiedSingleStepDesugaredType();
2561 break;
2562 default:
2563 return type;
2564 }
2565 }
2566}
2567
2568clang::DeclContext *
2569TypeSystemClang::GetDeclContextForType(clang::QualType type) {
2570 if (type.isNull())
2571 return nullptr;
2572
2573 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(type.getCanonicalType());
2574 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
2575 switch (type_class) {
2576 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
2577 return llvm::cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())
2578 ->getInterface();
2579 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
2580 return GetDeclContextForType(
2581 llvm::cast<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())
2582 ->getPointeeType());
2583 case clang::Type::Enum:
2584 case clang::Type::Record:
2585 return llvm::cast<clang::TagType>(qual_type)
2586 ->getDecl()
2587 ->getDefinitionOrSelf();
2588 default:
2589 break;
2590 }
2591 // No DeclContext in this type...
2592 return nullptr;
2593}
2594
2595/// Returns the clang::RecordType of the specified \ref qual_type. This
2596/// function will try to complete the type if necessary (and allowed
2597/// by the specified \ref allow_completion). If we fail to return a *complete*
2598/// type, returns nullptr.
2599static const clang::RecordType *
2600GetCompleteRecordType(clang::ASTContext *ast, clang::QualType qual_type) {
2601 assert(qual_type->isRecordType());
2602
2603 const auto *tag_type = llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
2604
2605 clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl = qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
2606
2607 // RecordType with no way of completing it, return the plain
2608 // TagType.
2609 if (!cxx_record_decl || !cxx_record_decl->hasExternalLexicalStorage())
2610 return tag_type;
2611
2612 const bool is_complete = cxx_record_decl->isCompleteDefinition();
2613 const bool fields_loaded =
2614 cxx_record_decl->hasLoadedFieldsFromExternalStorage();
2615
2616 // Already completed this type, nothing to be done.
2617 if (is_complete && fields_loaded)
2618 return tag_type;
2619
2620 // Call the field_begin() accessor to for it to use the external source
2621 // to load the fields...
2622 //
2623 // TODO: if we need to complete the type but have no external source,
2624 // shouldn't we error out instead?
2625 clang::ExternalASTSource *external_ast_source = ast->getExternalSource();
2626 if (external_ast_source) {
2627 external_ast_source->CompleteType(cxx_record_decl);
2628 if (cxx_record_decl->isCompleteDefinition()) {
2629 cxx_record_decl->field_begin();
2630 cxx_record_decl->setHasLoadedFieldsFromExternalStorage(true);
2631 }
2632 }
2633
2634 return tag_type;
2635}
2636
2637/// Returns the clang::EnumType of the specified \ref qual_type. This
2638/// function will try to complete the type if necessary (and allowed
2639/// by the specified \ref allow_completion). If we fail to return a *complete*
2640/// type, returns nullptr.
2641static const clang::EnumType *GetCompleteEnumType(clang::ASTContext *ast,
2642 clang::QualType qual_type) {
2643 assert(qual_type->isEnumeralType());
2644 assert(ast);
2645
2646 const clang::EnumType *enum_type =
2647 llvm::cast<clang::EnumType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
2648
2649 auto *tag_decl = enum_type->getAsTagDecl();
2650 assert(tag_decl);
2651
2652 // Already completed, nothing to be done.
2653 if (tag_decl->getDefinition())
2654 return enum_type;
2655
2656 // No definition but can't complete it, error out.
2657 if (!tag_decl->hasExternalLexicalStorage())
2658 return nullptr;
2659
2660 // We can't complete the type without an external source.
2661 clang::ExternalASTSource *external_ast_source = ast->getExternalSource();
2662 if (!external_ast_source)
2663 return nullptr;
2664
2665 external_ast_source->CompleteType(tag_decl);
2666 return enum_type;
2667}
2668
2669/// Returns the clang::ObjCObjectType of the specified \ref qual_type. This
2670/// function will try to complete the type if necessary (and allowed
2671/// by the specified \ref allow_completion). If we fail to return a *complete*
2672/// type, returns nullptr.
2673static const clang::ObjCObjectType *
2674GetCompleteObjCObjectType(clang::ASTContext *ast, QualType qual_type) {
2675 assert(qual_type->isObjCObjectType());
2676 assert(ast);
2677
2678 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
2679 llvm::cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type);
2680
2681 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
2682 objc_class_type->getInterface();
2683 // We currently can't complete objective C types through the newly added
2684 // ASTContext because it only supports TagDecl objects right now...
2685 if (!class_interface_decl)
2686 return objc_class_type;
2687
2688 // Already complete, nothing to be done.
2689 if (class_interface_decl->getDefinition())
2690 return objc_class_type;
2691
2692 // No definition but can't complete it, error out.
2693 if (!class_interface_decl->hasExternalLexicalStorage())
2694 return nullptr;
2695
2696 // We can't complete the type without an external source.
2697 clang::ExternalASTSource *external_ast_source = ast->getExternalSource();
2698 if (!external_ast_source)
2699 return nullptr;
2700
2701 external_ast_source->CompleteType(class_interface_decl);
2702 return objc_class_type;
2703}
2704
2705static bool GetCompleteQualType(clang::ASTContext *ast,
2706 clang::QualType qual_type) {
2707 qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(qual_type);
2708 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
2709 switch (type_class) {
2710 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
2711 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
2712 case clang::Type::VariableArray: {
2713 const clang::ArrayType *array_type =
2714 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ArrayType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
2715
2716 if (array_type)
2717 return GetCompleteQualType(ast, array_type->getElementType());
2718 } break;
2719 case clang::Type::Record: {
2720 if (const auto *RT = GetCompleteRecordType(ast, qual_type))
2721 return !RT->isIncompleteType();
2722
2723 return false;
2724 } break;
2725
2726 case clang::Type::Enum: {
2727 if (const auto *ET = GetCompleteEnumType(ast, qual_type))
2728 return !ET->isIncompleteType();
2729
2730 return false;
2731 } break;
2732 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
2733 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface: {
2734 if (const auto *OT = GetCompleteObjCObjectType(ast, qual_type))
2735 return !OT->isIncompleteType();
2736
2737 return false;
2738 } break;
2739
2740 case clang::Type::Attributed:
2741 return GetCompleteQualType(
2742 ast, llvm::cast<clang::AttributedType>(qual_type)->getModifiedType());
2743
2744 case clang::Type::MemberPointer:
2745 // MS C++ ABI requires type of the class to be complete of which the pointee
2746 // is a member.
2747 if (ast->getTargetInfo().getCXXABI().isMicrosoft()) {
2748 auto *MPT = qual_type.getTypePtr()->castAs<clang::MemberPointerType>();
2749 if (auto *RD = MPT->getMostRecentCXXRecordDecl())
2750 GetCompleteRecordType(ast, ast->getCanonicalTagType(RD));
2751
2752 return !qual_type.getTypePtr()->isIncompleteType();
2753 }
2754 break;
2755
2756 default:
2757 break;
2758 }
2759
2760 return true;
2761}
2762
2763// Tests
2764
2765#ifndef NDEBUG
2766bool TypeSystemClang::Verify(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2767 return !type || llvm::isa<clang::Type>(GetQualType(type).getTypePtr());
2768}
2769#endif
2770
2771bool TypeSystemClang::IsAggregateType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2772 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
2773
2774 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
2775 switch (type_class) {
2776 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
2777 case clang::Type::VariableArray:
2778 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
2779 case clang::Type::ExtVector:
2780 case clang::Type::Vector:
2781 case clang::Type::Record:
2782 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
2783 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
2784 return true;
2785 default:
2786 break;
2787 }
2788 // The clang type does have a value
2789 return false;
2790}
2791
2792bool TypeSystemClang::IsAnonymousType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2793 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
2794
2795 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
2796 switch (type_class) {
2797 case clang::Type::Record: {
2798 if (const clang::RecordType *record_type =
2799 llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<clang::RecordType>(
2800 qual_type.getTypePtrOrNull())) {
2801 if (const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl = record_type->getDecl()) {
2802 return record_decl->isAnonymousStructOrUnion();
2803 }
2804 }
2805 break;
2806 }
2807 default:
2808 break;
2809 }
2810 // The clang type does have a value
2811 return false;
2812}
2813
2814bool TypeSystemClang::IsArrayType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
2815 CompilerType *element_type_ptr,
2816 uint64_t *size, bool *is_incomplete) {
2817 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
2818
2819 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
2820 switch (type_class) {
2821 default:
2822 break;
2823
2824 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
2825 if (element_type_ptr)
2826 element_type_ptr->SetCompilerType(
2827 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::ConstantArrayType>(qual_type)
2828 ->getElementType()
2829 .getAsOpaquePtr());
2830 if (size)
2831 *size = llvm::cast<clang::ConstantArrayType>(qual_type)
2832 ->getSize()
2833 .getLimitedValue(ULLONG_MAX);
2834 if (is_incomplete)
2835 *is_incomplete = false;
2836 return true;
2837
2838 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
2839 if (element_type_ptr)
2840 element_type_ptr->SetCompilerType(
2841 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::IncompleteArrayType>(qual_type)
2842 ->getElementType()
2843 .getAsOpaquePtr());
2844 if (size)
2845 *size = 0;
2846 if (is_incomplete)
2847 *is_incomplete = true;
2848 return true;
2849
2850 case clang::Type::VariableArray:
2851 if (element_type_ptr)
2852 element_type_ptr->SetCompilerType(
2853 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::VariableArrayType>(qual_type)
2854 ->getElementType()
2855 .getAsOpaquePtr());
2856 if (size)
2857 *size = 0;
2858 if (is_incomplete)
2859 *is_incomplete = false;
2860 return true;
2861
2862 case clang::Type::DependentSizedArray:
2863 if (element_type_ptr)
2864 element_type_ptr->SetCompilerType(
2865 weak_from_this(),
2866 llvm::cast<clang::DependentSizedArrayType>(qual_type)
2867 ->getElementType()
2868 .getAsOpaquePtr());
2869 if (size)
2870 *size = 0;
2871 if (is_incomplete)
2872 *is_incomplete = false;
2873 return true;
2874 }
2875 if (element_type_ptr)
2876 element_type_ptr->Clear();
2877 if (size)
2878 *size = 0;
2879 if (is_incomplete)
2880 *is_incomplete = false;
2881 return false;
2882}
2883
2884bool TypeSystemClang::IsVectorType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
2885 CompilerType *element_type, uint64_t *size) {
2886 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
2887
2888 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
2889 switch (type_class) {
2890 case clang::Type::Vector: {
2891 const clang::VectorType *vector_type =
2892 qual_type->getAs<clang::VectorType>();
2893 if (vector_type) {
2894 if (size)
2895 *size = vector_type->getNumElements();
2896 if (element_type)
2897 *element_type = GetType(vector_type->getElementType());
2898 }
2899 return true;
2900 } break;
2901 case clang::Type::ExtVector: {
2902 const clang::ExtVectorType *ext_vector_type =
2903 qual_type->getAs<clang::ExtVectorType>();
2904 if (ext_vector_type) {
2905 if (size)
2906 *size = ext_vector_type->getNumElements();
2907 if (element_type)
2908 *element_type =
2909 CompilerType(weak_from_this(),
2910 ext_vector_type->getElementType().getAsOpaquePtr());
2911 }
2912 return true;
2913 }
2914 default:
2915 break;
2916 }
2917 return false;
2918}
2919
2920bool TypeSystemClang::IsRuntimeGeneratedType(
2921 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2922 clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx = GetDeclContextForType(GetQualType(type));
2923 if (!decl_ctx)
2924 return false;
2925
2926 if (!llvm::isa<clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl>(decl_ctx))
2927 return false;
2928
2929 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *result_iface_decl =
2930 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl>(decl_ctx);
2931
2932 std::optional<ClangASTMetadata> ast_metadata = GetMetadata(result_iface_decl);
2933 if (!ast_metadata)
2934 return false;
2935
2936 return (ast_metadata->GetISAPtr() != 0);
2937}
2938
2939bool TypeSystemClang::IsCharType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2940 return GetQualType(type).getUnqualifiedType()->isCharType();
2941}
2942
2943bool TypeSystemClang::IsCompleteType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2944 // If the type hasn't been lazily completed yet, complete it now so that we
2945 // can give the caller an accurate answer whether the type actually has a
2946 // definition. Without completing the type now we would just tell the user
2947 // the current (internal) completeness state of the type and most users don't
2948 // care (or even know) about this behavior.
2949 return GetCompleteQualType(&getASTContext(), GetQualType(type));
2950}
2951
2952bool TypeSystemClang::IsConst(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2953 return GetQualType(type).isConstQualified();
2954}
2955
2956bool TypeSystemClang::IsCStringType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
2957 uint32_t &length) {
2958 CompilerType pointee_or_element_clang_type;
2959 length = 0;
2960 Flags type_flags(GetTypeInfo(type, &pointee_or_element_clang_type));
2961
2962 if (!pointee_or_element_clang_type.IsValid())
2963 return false;
2964
2965 if (type_flags.AnySet(eTypeIsArray | eTypeIsPointer)) {
2966 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type.IsCharType()) {
2967 if (type_flags.Test(eTypeIsArray)) {
2968 // We know the size of the array and it could be a C string since it is
2969 // an array of characters
2970 length = llvm::cast<clang::ConstantArrayType>(
2971 GetCanonicalQualType(type).getTypePtr())
2972 ->getSize()
2973 .getLimitedValue();
2974 }
2975 return true;
2976 }
2977 }
2978 return false;
2979}
2980
2981unsigned TypeSystemClang::GetPtrAuthKey(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2982 if (type) {
2983 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
2984 if (auto pointer_auth = qual_type.getPointerAuth())
2985 return pointer_auth.getKey();
2986 }
2987 return 0;
2988}
2989
2990unsigned
2991TypeSystemClang::GetPtrAuthDiscriminator(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
2992 if (type) {
2993 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
2994 if (auto pointer_auth = qual_type.getPointerAuth())
2995 return pointer_auth.getExtraDiscriminator();
2996 }
2997 return 0;
2998}
2999
3000bool TypeSystemClang::GetPtrAuthAddressDiversity(
3001 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3002 if (type) {
3003 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3004 if (auto pointer_auth = qual_type.getPointerAuth())
3005 return pointer_auth.isAddressDiscriminated();
3006 }
3007 return false;
3008}
3009
3010bool TypeSystemClang::IsFunctionType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3011 auto isFunctionType = [&](clang::QualType qual_type) {
3012 return qual_type->isFunctionType();
3013 };
3014
3015 return IsTypeImpl(type, isFunctionType);
3016}
3017
3018// Used to detect "Homogeneous Floating-point Aggregates"
3019uint32_t
3020TypeSystemClang::IsHomogeneousAggregate(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3021 CompilerType *base_type_ptr) {
3022 if (!type)
3023 return 0;
3024
3025 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
3026 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3027 switch (type_class) {
3028 case clang::Type::Record:
3029 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
3030 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
3031 qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
3032 if (cxx_record_decl) {
3033 if (cxx_record_decl->getNumBases() || cxx_record_decl->isDynamicClass())
3034 return 0;
3035 }
3036 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
3037 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
3038 if (record_type) {
3039 if (const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
3040 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinition()) {
3041 // We are looking for a structure that contains only floating point
3042 // types
3043 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator field_pos,
3044 field_end = record_decl->field_end();
3045 uint32_t num_fields = 0;
3046 bool is_hva = false;
3047 bool is_hfa = false;
3048 clang::QualType base_qual_type;
3049 uint64_t base_bitwidth = 0;
3050 for (field_pos = record_decl->field_begin(); field_pos != field_end;
3051 ++field_pos) {
3052 clang::QualType field_qual_type = field_pos->getType();
3053 uint64_t field_bitwidth = getASTContext().getTypeSize(qual_type);
3054 if (field_qual_type->isFloatingType()) {
3055 if (field_qual_type->isComplexType())
3056 return 0;
3057 else {
3058 if (num_fields == 0)
3059 base_qual_type = field_qual_type;
3060 else {
3061 if (is_hva)
3062 return 0;
3063 is_hfa = true;
3064 if (field_qual_type.getTypePtr() !=
3065 base_qual_type.getTypePtr())
3066 return 0;
3067 }
3068 }
3069 } else if (field_qual_type->isVectorType() ||
3070 field_qual_type->isExtVectorType()) {
3071 if (num_fields == 0) {
3072 base_qual_type = field_qual_type;
3073 base_bitwidth = field_bitwidth;
3074 } else {
3075 if (is_hfa)
3076 return 0;
3077 is_hva = true;
3078 if (base_bitwidth != field_bitwidth)
3079 return 0;
3080 if (field_qual_type.getTypePtr() != base_qual_type.getTypePtr())
3081 return 0;
3082 }
3083 } else
3084 return 0;
3085 ++num_fields;
3086 }
3087 if (base_type_ptr)
3088 *base_type_ptr =
3089 CompilerType(weak_from_this(), base_qual_type.getAsOpaquePtr());
3090 return num_fields;
3091 }
3092 }
3093 }
3094 break;
3095
3096 default:
3097 break;
3098 }
3099 return 0;
3100}
3101
3102size_t TypeSystemClang::GetNumberOfFunctionArguments(
3103 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3104 if (type) {
3105 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3106 const clang::FunctionProtoType *func =
3107 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionProtoType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
3108 if (func)
3109 return func->getNumParams();
3110 }
3111 return 0;
3112}
3113
3114CompilerType
3115TypeSystemClang::GetFunctionArgumentAtIndex(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3116 const size_t index) {
3117 if (type) {
3118 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
3119 const clang::FunctionProtoType *func =
3120 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionProtoType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
3121 if (func) {
3122 if (index < func->getNumParams())
3123 return CompilerType(weak_from_this(), func->getParamType(index).getAsOpaquePtr());
3124 }
3125 }
3126 return CompilerType();
3127}
3128
3129bool TypeSystemClang::IsTypeImpl(
3130 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3131 llvm::function_ref<bool(clang::QualType)> predicate) const {
3132 if (type) {
3133 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3134
3135 if (predicate(qual_type))
3136 return true;
3137
3138 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3139 switch (type_class) {
3140 default:
3141 break;
3142
3143 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
3144 case clang::Type::RValueReference: {
3145 const clang::ReferenceType *reference_type =
3146 llvm::cast<clang::ReferenceType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
3147 if (reference_type)
3148 return IsTypeImpl(reference_type->getPointeeType().getAsOpaquePtr(), predicate);
3149 } break;
3150 }
3151 }
3152 return false;
3153}
3154
3155bool TypeSystemClang::IsMemberFunctionPointerType(
3156 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3157 auto isMemberFunctionPointerType = [](clang::QualType qual_type) {
3158 return qual_type->isMemberFunctionPointerType();
3159 };
3160
3161 return IsTypeImpl(type, isMemberFunctionPointerType);
3162}
3163
3164bool TypeSystemClang::IsFunctionPointerType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3165 auto isFunctionPointerType = [](clang::QualType qual_type) {
3166 return qual_type->isFunctionPointerType();
3167 };
3168
3169 return IsTypeImpl(type, isFunctionPointerType);
3170}
3171
3172bool TypeSystemClang::IsBlockPointerType(
3173 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3174 CompilerType *function_pointer_type_ptr) {
3175 auto isBlockPointerType = [&](clang::QualType qual_type) {
3176 if (qual_type->isBlockPointerType()) {
3177 if (function_pointer_type_ptr) {
3178 const clang::BlockPointerType *block_pointer_type =
3179 qual_type->castAs<clang::BlockPointerType>();
3180 QualType pointee_type = block_pointer_type->getPointeeType();
3181 QualType function_pointer_type = m_ast_up->getPointerType(pointee_type);
3182 *function_pointer_type_ptr = CompilerType(
3183 weak_from_this(), function_pointer_type.getAsOpaquePtr());
3184 }
3185 return true;
3186 }
3187
3188 return false;
3189 };
3190
3191 return IsTypeImpl(type, isBlockPointerType);
3192}
3193
3194bool TypeSystemClang::IsIntegerType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3195 bool &is_signed) {
3196 if (!type)
3197 return false;
3198
3199 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3200 if (qual_type.isNull())
3201 return false;
3202
3203 // Note, using 'isIntegralType' as opposed to 'isIntegerType' because
3204 // the latter treats unscoped enums as integer types (which is not true
3205 // in C++). The former accounts for this.
3206 if (!qual_type->isIntegralType(getASTContext()))
3207 return false;
3208
3209 is_signed = qual_type->isSignedIntegerType();
3210
3211 return true;
3212}
3213
3214bool TypeSystemClang::IsEnumerationType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3215 bool &is_signed) {
3216 if (type) {
3217 const clang::EnumType *enum_type = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::EnumType>(
3218 GetCanonicalQualType(type)->getCanonicalTypeInternal());
3219
3220 if (enum_type) {
3221 is_signed = enum_type->isSignedIntegerOrEnumerationType();
3222 return true;
3223 }
3224 }
3225
3226 return false;
3227}
3228
3229bool TypeSystemClang::IsScopedEnumerationType(
3230 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3231 if (type) {
3232 const clang::EnumType *enum_type = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::EnumType>(
3233 GetCanonicalQualType(type)->getCanonicalTypeInternal());
3234
3235 if (enum_type) {
3236 return enum_type->isScopedEnumeralType();
3237 }
3238 }
3239
3240 return false;
3241}
3242
3243bool TypeSystemClang::IsPointerType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3244 CompilerType *pointee_type) {
3245 if (type) {
3246 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3247 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3248 switch (type_class) {
3249 case clang::Type::Builtin:
3250 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind()) {
3251 default:
3252 break;
3253 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId:
3254 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass:
3255 return true;
3256 }
3257 return false;
3258 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
3259 if (pointee_type)
3260 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3261 weak_from_this(),
3262 llvm::cast<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>(qual_type)
3263 ->getPointeeType()
3264 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3265 return true;
3266 case clang::Type::BlockPointer:
3267 if (pointee_type)
3268 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3269 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::BlockPointerType>(qual_type)
3270 ->getPointeeType()
3271 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3272 return true;
3273 case clang::Type::Pointer:
3274 if (pointee_type)
3275 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(weak_from_this(),
3276 llvm::cast<clang::PointerType>(qual_type)
3277 ->getPointeeType()
3278 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3279 return true;
3280 case clang::Type::MemberPointer:
3281 if (pointee_type)
3282 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3283 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::MemberPointerType>(qual_type)
3284 ->getPointeeType()
3285 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3286 return true;
3287 default:
3288 break;
3289 }
3290 }
3291 if (pointee_type)
3292 pointee_type->Clear();
3293 return false;
3294}
3295
3296bool TypeSystemClang::IsPointerOrReferenceType(
3297 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, CompilerType *pointee_type) {
3298 if (type) {
3299 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3300 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3301 switch (type_class) {
3302 case clang::Type::Builtin:
3303 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind()) {
3304 default:
3305 break;
3306 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId:
3307 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass:
3308 return true;
3309 }
3310 return false;
3311 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
3312 if (pointee_type)
3313 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3314 weak_from_this(),
3315 llvm::cast<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>(qual_type)
3316 ->getPointeeType()
3317 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3318 return true;
3319 case clang::Type::BlockPointer:
3320 if (pointee_type)
3321 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3322 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::BlockPointerType>(qual_type)
3323 ->getPointeeType()
3324 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3325 return true;
3326 case clang::Type::Pointer:
3327 if (pointee_type)
3328 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(weak_from_this(),
3329 llvm::cast<clang::PointerType>(qual_type)
3330 ->getPointeeType()
3331 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3332 return true;
3333 case clang::Type::MemberPointer:
3334 if (pointee_type)
3335 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3336 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::MemberPointerType>(qual_type)
3337 ->getPointeeType()
3338 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3339 return true;
3340 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
3341 if (pointee_type)
3342 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3343 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::LValueReferenceType>(qual_type)
3344 ->desugar()
3345 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3346 return true;
3347 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
3348 if (pointee_type)
3349 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3350 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::RValueReferenceType>(qual_type)
3351 ->desugar()
3352 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3353 return true;
3354 default:
3355 break;
3356 }
3357 }
3358 if (pointee_type)
3359 pointee_type->Clear();
3360 return false;
3361}
3362
3363bool TypeSystemClang::IsReferenceType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3364 CompilerType *pointee_type,
3365 bool *is_rvalue) {
3366 if (type) {
3367 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3368 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3369
3370 switch (type_class) {
3371 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
3372 if (pointee_type)
3373 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3374 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::LValueReferenceType>(qual_type)
3375 ->desugar()
3376 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3377 if (is_rvalue)
3378 *is_rvalue = false;
3379 return true;
3380 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
3381 if (pointee_type)
3382 pointee_type->SetCompilerType(
3383 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::RValueReferenceType>(qual_type)
3384 ->desugar()
3385 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3386 if (is_rvalue)
3387 *is_rvalue = true;
3388 return true;
3389
3390 default:
3391 break;
3392 }
3393 }
3394 if (pointee_type)
3395 pointee_type->Clear();
3396 return false;
3397}
3398
3399bool TypeSystemClang::IsFloatingPointType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3400 if (!type)
3401 return false;
3402
3403 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3404 if (qual_type.isNull())
3405 return false;
3406
3407 return qual_type->isFloatingType();
3408}
3409
3410bool TypeSystemClang::IsDefined(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3411 if (!type)
3412 return false;
3413
3414 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
3415 const clang::TagType *tag_type =
3416 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::TagType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
3417 if (tag_type) {
3418 if (clang::TagDecl *tag_decl = tag_type->getDecl()->getDefinition())
3419 return tag_decl->isCompleteDefinition();
3420 return false;
3421 } else {
3422 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
3423 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type);
3424 if (objc_class_type) {
3425 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
3426 objc_class_type->getInterface();
3427 if (class_interface_decl)
3428 return class_interface_decl->getDefinition() != nullptr;
3429 return false;
3430 }
3431 }
3432 return true;
3433}
3434
3435bool TypeSystemClang::IsObjCClassType(const CompilerType &type) {
3436 if (ClangUtil::IsClangType(type)) {
3437 clang::QualType qual_type(ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3438
3439 const clang::ObjCObjectPointerType *obj_pointer_type =
3440 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>(qual_type);
3441
3442 if (obj_pointer_type)
3443 return obj_pointer_type->isObjCClassType();
3444 }
3445 return false;
3446}
3447
3448bool TypeSystemClang::IsObjCObjectOrInterfaceType(const CompilerType &type) {
3449 if (ClangUtil::IsClangType(type))
3450 return ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(type)->isObjCObjectOrInterfaceType();
3451 return false;
3452}
3453
3454bool TypeSystemClang::IsClassType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3455 if (!type)
3456 return false;
3457 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3458 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3459 return (type_class == clang::Type::Record);
3460}
3461
3462bool TypeSystemClang::IsEnumType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3463 if (!type)
3464 return false;
3465 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3466 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3467 return (type_class == clang::Type::Enum);
3468}
3469
3470bool TypeSystemClang::IsPolymorphicClass(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3471 if (type) {
3472 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3473 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3474 switch (type_class) {
3475 case clang::Type::Record:
3476 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
3477 if (const auto *cxx_record_decl = qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl()) {
3478 // We can't just call is isPolymorphic() here because that just
3479 // means the current class has virtual functions, it doesn't check
3480 // if any inherited classes have virtual functions. The doc string
3481 // in SBType::IsPolymorphicClass() says it is looking for both
3482 // if the class has virtual methods or if any bases do, so this
3483 // should be more correct.
3484 return cxx_record_decl->isDynamicClass();
3485 }
3486 }
3487 break;
3488
3489 default:
3490 break;
3491 }
3492 }
3493 return false;
3494}
3495
3496bool TypeSystemClang::IsPossibleDynamicType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3497 CompilerType *dynamic_pointee_type,
3498 bool check_cplusplus,
3499 bool check_objc) {
3500 if (dynamic_pointee_type)
3501 dynamic_pointee_type->Clear();
3502 if (!type)
3503 return false;
3504
3505 auto set_dynamic_pointee_type = [&](clang::QualType type) {
3506 if (dynamic_pointee_type)
3507 dynamic_pointee_type->SetCompilerType(weak_from_this(),
3508 type.getAsOpaquePtr());
3509 };
3510
3511 clang::QualType pointee_qual_type;
3512 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3513 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
3514 case clang::Type::Builtin:
3515 if (check_objc && llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind() ==
3516 clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId) {
3517 set_dynamic_pointee_type(qual_type);
3518 return true;
3519 }
3520 return false;
3521
3522 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
3523 if (!check_objc)
3524 return false;
3525 if (const auto *objc_pointee_type =
3526 qual_type->getPointeeType().getTypePtrOrNull()) {
3527 if (const auto *objc_object_type =
3528 llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<clang::ObjCObjectType>(
3529 objc_pointee_type)) {
3530 if (objc_object_type->isObjCClass())
3531 return false;
3532 }
3533 }
3534 set_dynamic_pointee_type(
3535 llvm::cast<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>(qual_type)->getPointeeType());
3536 return true;
3537
3538 case clang::Type::Pointer:
3539 pointee_qual_type =
3540 llvm::cast<clang::PointerType>(qual_type)->getPointeeType();
3541 break;
3542
3543 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
3544 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
3545 pointee_qual_type =
3546 llvm::cast<clang::ReferenceType>(qual_type)->getPointeeType();
3547 break;
3548
3549 default:
3550 return false;
3551 }
3552
3553 // Check to make sure what we are pointing to is a possible dynamic C++ type
3554 // We currently accept any "void *" (in case we have a class that has been
3555 // watered down to an opaque pointer) and virtual C++ classes.
3556 switch (pointee_qual_type.getCanonicalType()->getTypeClass()) {
3557 case clang::Type::Builtin:
3558 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(pointee_qual_type)->getKind()) {
3559 case clang::BuiltinType::UnknownAny:
3560 case clang::BuiltinType::Void:
3561 set_dynamic_pointee_type(pointee_qual_type);
3562 return true;
3563 default:
3564 return false;
3565 }
3566
3567 case clang::Type::Record: {
3568 if (!check_cplusplus)
3569 return false;
3570 clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
3571 pointee_qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
3572 if (!cxx_record_decl)
3573 return false;
3574
3575 bool success;
3576 if (cxx_record_decl->isCompleteDefinition())
3577 success = cxx_record_decl->isDynamicClass();
3578 else {
3579 std::optional<ClangASTMetadata> metadata = GetMetadata(cxx_record_decl);
3580 std::optional<bool> is_dynamic =
3581 metadata ? metadata->GetIsDynamicCXXType() : std::nullopt;
3582 if (is_dynamic)
3583 success = *is_dynamic;
3584 else if (GetType(pointee_qual_type).GetCompleteType())
3585 success = cxx_record_decl->isDynamicClass();
3586 else
3587 success = false;
3588 }
3589
3590 if (success)
3591 set_dynamic_pointee_type(pointee_qual_type);
3592 return success;
3593 }
3594
3595 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
3596 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
3597 if (check_objc) {
3598 set_dynamic_pointee_type(pointee_qual_type);
3599 return true;
3600 }
3601 break;
3602
3603 default:
3604 break;
3605 }
3606 return false;
3607}
3608
3609bool TypeSystemClang::IsScalarType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3610 if (!type)
3611 return false;
3612
3613 return (GetTypeInfo(type, nullptr) & eTypeIsScalar) != 0;
3614}
3615
3616bool TypeSystemClang::IsTypedefType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3617 if (!type)
3618 return false;
3619 return RemoveWrappingTypes(GetQualType(type), {clang::Type::Typedef})
3620 ->getTypeClass() == clang::Type::Typedef;
3621}
3622
3623bool TypeSystemClang::IsVoidType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3624 if (!type)
3625 return false;
3626 return GetCanonicalQualType(type)->isVoidType();
3627}
3628
3629bool TypeSystemClang::CanPassInRegisters(const CompilerType &type) {
3630 if (auto *record_decl =
3631 TypeSystemClang::GetAsRecordDecl(type)) {
3632 return record_decl->canPassInRegisters();
3633 }
3634 return false;
3635}
3636
3637bool TypeSystemClang::SupportsLanguage(lldb::LanguageType language) {
3638 return TypeSystemClangSupportsLanguage(language);
3639}
3640
3641std::optional<std::string>
3642TypeSystemClang::GetCXXClassName(const CompilerType &type) {
3643 if (!type)
3644 return std::nullopt;
3645
3646 clang::QualType qual_type(ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3647 if (qual_type.isNull())
3648 return std::nullopt;
3649
3650 clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl = qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
3651 if (!cxx_record_decl)
3652 return std::nullopt;
3653
3654 return std::string(cxx_record_decl->getIdentifier()->getNameStart());
3655}
3656
3657bool TypeSystemClang::IsCXXClassType(const CompilerType &type) {
3658 if (!type)
3659 return false;
3660
3661 clang::QualType qual_type(ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3662 return !qual_type.isNull() && qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl() != nullptr;
3663}
3664
3665bool TypeSystemClang::IsBeingDefined(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3666 if (!type)
3667 return false;
3668 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3669 const clang::TagType *tag_type = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::TagType>(qual_type);
3670 if (tag_type)
3671 return tag_type->getDecl()->isEntityBeingDefined();
3672 return false;
3673}
3674
3675bool TypeSystemClang::IsObjCObjectPointerType(const CompilerType &type,
3676 CompilerType *class_type_ptr) {
3677 if (!ClangUtil::IsClangType(type))
3678 return false;
3679
3680 clang::QualType qual_type(ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(type));
3681
3682 if (!qual_type.isNull() && qual_type->isObjCObjectPointerType()) {
3683 if (class_type_ptr) {
3684 if (!qual_type->isObjCClassType() && !qual_type->isObjCIdType()) {
3685 const clang::ObjCObjectPointerType *obj_pointer_type =
3686 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>(qual_type);
3687 if (obj_pointer_type == nullptr)
3688 class_type_ptr->Clear();
3689 else
3690 class_type_ptr->SetCompilerType(
3691 type.GetTypeSystem(),
3692 clang::QualType(obj_pointer_type->getInterfaceType(), 0)
3693 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3694 }
3695 }
3696 return true;
3697 }
3698 if (class_type_ptr)
3699 class_type_ptr->Clear();
3700 return false;
3701}
3702
3703// Type Completion
3704
3705bool TypeSystemClang::GetCompleteType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3706 if (!type)
3707 return false;
3708 return GetCompleteQualType(&getASTContext(), GetQualType(type));
3709}
3710
3711ConstString TypeSystemClang::GetTypeName(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3712 bool base_only) {
3713 if (!type)
3714 return ConstString();
3715
3716 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
3717
3718 // Remove certain type sugar from the name. Sugar such as elaborated types
3719 // or template types which only serve to improve diagnostics shouldn't
3720 // act as their own types from the user's perspective (e.g., formatter
3721 // shouldn't format a variable differently depending on how the ser has
3722 // specified the type. '::Type' and 'Type' should behave the same).
3723 // Typedefs and atomic derived types are not removed as they are actually
3724 // useful for identifiying specific types.
3725 qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(qual_type,
3726 {clang::Type::Typedef, clang::Type::Atomic});
3727
3728 // For a typedef just return the qualified name.
3729 if (const auto *typedef_type = qual_type->getAs<clang::TypedefType>()) {
3730 const clang::TypedefNameDecl *typedef_decl = typedef_type->getDecl();
3731 return ConstString(GetTypeNameForDecl(typedef_decl));
3732 }
3733
3734 // For consistency, this follows the same code path that clang uses to emit
3735 // debug info. This also handles when we don't want any scopes preceding the
3736 // name.
3737 if (auto *named_decl = qual_type->getAsTagDecl())
3738 return ConstString(GetTypeNameForDecl(named_decl, !base_only));
3739
3740 return ConstString(qual_type.getAsString(GetTypePrintingPolicy()));
3741}
3742
3743ConstString
3744TypeSystemClang::GetDisplayTypeName(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3745 if (!type)
3746 return ConstString();
3747
3748 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
3749 clang::PrintingPolicy printing_policy(getASTContext().getPrintingPolicy());
3750 printing_policy.SuppressTagKeyword = true;
3751 printing_policy.SuppressScope = false;
3752 printing_policy.SuppressUnwrittenScope = true;
3753 printing_policy.SuppressInlineNamespace =
3754 llvm::to_underlying(PrintingPolicy::SuppressInlineNamespaceMode::All);
3755 return ConstString(qual_type.getAsString(printing_policy));
3756}
3757
3758uint32_t
3759TypeSystemClang::GetTypeInfo(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
3760 CompilerType *pointee_or_element_clang_type) {
3761 if (!type)
3762 return 0;
3763
3764 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3765 pointee_or_element_clang_type->Clear();
3766
3767 clang::QualType qual_type =
3768 RemoveWrappingTypes(GetQualType(type), {clang::Type::Typedef});
3769
3770 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
3771 switch (type_class) {
3772 case clang::Type::Attributed:
3773 return GetTypeInfo(qual_type->castAs<clang::AttributedType>()
3774 ->getModifiedType()
3775 .getAsOpaquePtr(),
3776 pointee_or_element_clang_type);
3777 case clang::Type::BitInt: {
3778 uint32_t type_flags = eTypeIsScalar | eTypeIsInteger | eTypeHasValue;
3779 if (qual_type->isSignedIntegerType())
3780 type_flags |= eTypeIsSigned;
3781
3782 return type_flags;
3783 }
3784 case clang::Type::Builtin: {
3785 const clang::BuiltinType *builtin_type =
3786 llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type->getCanonicalTypeInternal());
3787
3788 uint32_t builtin_type_flags = eTypeIsBuiltIn | eTypeHasValue;
3789 switch (builtin_type->getKind()) {
3790 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId:
3791 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass:
3792 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3793 pointee_or_element_clang_type->SetCompilerType(
3794 weak_from_this(),
3795 getASTContext().ObjCBuiltinClassTy.getAsOpaquePtr());
3796 builtin_type_flags |= eTypeIsPointer | eTypeIsObjC;
3797 break;
3798
3799 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCSel:
3800 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3801 pointee_or_element_clang_type->SetCompilerType(
3802 weak_from_this(), getASTContext().CharTy.getAsOpaquePtr());
3803 builtin_type_flags |= eTypeIsPointer | eTypeIsObjC;
3804 break;
3805
3806 case clang::BuiltinType::Bool:
3807 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_U:
3808 case clang::BuiltinType::UChar:
3809 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_U:
3810 case clang::BuiltinType::Char16:
3811 case clang::BuiltinType::Char32:
3812 case clang::BuiltinType::UShort:
3813 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt:
3814 case clang::BuiltinType::ULong:
3815 case clang::BuiltinType::ULongLong:
3816 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt128:
3817 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_S:
3818 case clang::BuiltinType::SChar:
3819 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_S:
3820 case clang::BuiltinType::Short:
3821 case clang::BuiltinType::Int:
3822 case clang::BuiltinType::Long:
3823 case clang::BuiltinType::LongLong:
3824 case clang::BuiltinType::Int128:
3825 case clang::BuiltinType::Float:
3826 case clang::BuiltinType::Double:
3827 case clang::BuiltinType::LongDouble:
3828 builtin_type_flags |= eTypeIsScalar;
3829 if (builtin_type->isInteger()) {
3830 builtin_type_flags |= eTypeIsInteger;
3831 if (builtin_type->isSignedInteger())
3832 builtin_type_flags |= eTypeIsSigned;
3833 } else if (builtin_type->isFloatingPoint())
3834 builtin_type_flags |= eTypeIsFloat;
3835 break;
3836 default:
3837 break;
3838 }
3839 return builtin_type_flags;
3840 }
3841
3842 case clang::Type::BlockPointer:
3843 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3844 pointee_or_element_clang_type->SetCompilerType(
3845 weak_from_this(), qual_type->getPointeeType().getAsOpaquePtr());
3846 return eTypeIsPointer | eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsBlock;
3847
3848 case clang::Type::Complex: {
3849 uint32_t complex_type_flags =
3850 eTypeIsBuiltIn | eTypeHasValue | eTypeIsComplex;
3851 const clang::ComplexType *complex_type = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ComplexType>(
3852 qual_type->getCanonicalTypeInternal());
3853 if (complex_type) {
3854 clang::QualType complex_element_type(complex_type->getElementType());
3855 if (complex_element_type->isIntegerType())
3856 complex_type_flags |= eTypeIsInteger;
3857 else if (complex_element_type->isFloatingType())
3858 complex_type_flags |= eTypeIsFloat;
3859 }
3860 return complex_type_flags;
3861 } break;
3862
3863 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
3864 case clang::Type::DependentSizedArray:
3865 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
3866 case clang::Type::VariableArray:
3867 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3868 pointee_or_element_clang_type->SetCompilerType(
3869 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::ArrayType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())
3870 ->getElementType()
3871 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3872 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsArray;
3873
3874 case clang::Type::DependentName:
3875 return 0;
3876 case clang::Type::DependentSizedExtVector:
3877 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsVector;
3878
3879 case clang::Type::Enum:
3880 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3881 pointee_or_element_clang_type->SetCompilerType(
3882 weak_from_this(), llvm::cast<clang::EnumType>(qual_type)
3883 ->getDecl()
3884 ->getDefinitionOrSelf()
3885 ->getIntegerType()
3886 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3887 return eTypeIsEnumeration | eTypeHasValue;
3888
3889 case clang::Type::FunctionProto:
3890 return eTypeIsFuncPrototype | eTypeHasValue;
3891 case clang::Type::FunctionNoProto:
3892 return eTypeIsFuncPrototype | eTypeHasValue;
3893 case clang::Type::InjectedClassName:
3894 return 0;
3895
3896 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
3897 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
3898 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3899 pointee_or_element_clang_type->SetCompilerType(
3900 weak_from_this(),
3901 llvm::cast<clang::ReferenceType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())
3902 ->getPointeeType()
3903 .getAsOpaquePtr());
3904 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsReference | eTypeHasValue;
3905
3906 case clang::Type::MemberPointer:
3907 return eTypeIsPointer | eTypeIsMember | eTypeHasValue;
3908
3909 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
3910 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3911 pointee_or_element_clang_type->SetCompilerType(
3912 weak_from_this(), qual_type->getPointeeType().getAsOpaquePtr());
3913 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsObjC | eTypeIsClass | eTypeIsPointer |
3914 eTypeHasValue;
3915
3916 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
3917 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsObjC | eTypeIsClass;
3918 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
3919 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsObjC | eTypeIsClass;
3920
3921 case clang::Type::Pointer:
3922 if (pointee_or_element_clang_type)
3923 pointee_or_element_clang_type->SetCompilerType(
3924 weak_from_this(), qual_type->getPointeeType().getAsOpaquePtr());
3925 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsPointer | eTypeHasValue;
3926
3927 case clang::Type::Record:
3928 if (qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl())
3929 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsClass | eTypeIsCPlusPlus;
3930 else
3931 return eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsStructUnion;
3932 break;
3933 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParm:
3934 return eTypeIsTemplate;
3935 case clang::Type::TemplateTypeParm:
3936 return eTypeIsTemplate;
3937 case clang::Type::TemplateSpecialization:
3938 return eTypeIsTemplate;
3939
3940 case clang::Type::Typedef:
3941 return eTypeIsTypedef | GetType(llvm::cast<clang::TypedefType>(qual_type)
3942 ->getDecl()
3943 ->getUnderlyingType())
3944 .GetTypeInfo(pointee_or_element_clang_type);
3945 case clang::Type::UnresolvedUsing:
3946 return 0;
3947
3948 case clang::Type::ExtVector:
3949 case clang::Type::Vector: {
3950 uint32_t vector_type_flags = eTypeHasChildren | eTypeIsVector;
3951 const clang::VectorType *vector_type = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::VectorType>(
3952 qual_type->getCanonicalTypeInternal());
3953 if (!vector_type)
3954 return 0;
3955
3956 QualType element_type = vector_type->getElementType();
3957 if (element_type.isNull())
3958 return 0;
3959
3960 if (element_type->isIntegerType())
3961 vector_type_flags |= eTypeIsInteger;
3962 else if (element_type->isFloatingType())
3963 vector_type_flags |= eTypeIsFloat;
3964 return vector_type_flags;
3965 }
3966 default:
3967 return 0;
3968 }
3969 return 0;
3970}
3971
3972lldb::LanguageType
3973TypeSystemClang::GetMinimumLanguage(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
3974 if (!type)
3975 return lldb::eLanguageTypeC;
3976
3977 // If the type is a reference, then resolve it to what it refers to first:
3978 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type).getNonReferenceType());
3979 if (qual_type->isAnyPointerType()) {
3980 if (qual_type->isObjCObjectPointerType())
3981 return lldb::eLanguageTypeObjC;
3982 if (qual_type->getPointeeCXXRecordDecl())
3983 return lldb::eLanguageTypeC_plus_plus;
3984
3985 clang::QualType pointee_type(qual_type->getPointeeType());
3986 if (pointee_type->getPointeeCXXRecordDecl())
3987 return lldb::eLanguageTypeC_plus_plus;
3988 if (pointee_type->isObjCObjectOrInterfaceType())
3989 return lldb::eLanguageTypeObjC;
3990 if (pointee_type->isObjCClassType())
3991 return lldb::eLanguageTypeObjC;
3992 if (pointee_type.getTypePtr() ==
3993 getASTContext().ObjCBuiltinIdTy.getTypePtr())
3994 return lldb::eLanguageTypeObjC;
3995 } else {
3996 if (qual_type->isObjCObjectOrInterfaceType())
3997 return lldb::eLanguageTypeObjC;
3998 if (qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl())
3999 return lldb::eLanguageTypeC_plus_plus;
4000 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
4001 default:
4002 break;
4003 case clang::Type::Builtin:
4004 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind()) {
4005 default:
4006 case clang::BuiltinType::Void:
4007 case clang::BuiltinType::Bool:
4008 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_U:
4009 case clang::BuiltinType::UChar:
4010 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_U:
4011 case clang::BuiltinType::Char16:
4012 case clang::BuiltinType::Char32:
4013 case clang::BuiltinType::UShort:
4014 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt:
4015 case clang::BuiltinType::ULong:
4016 case clang::BuiltinType::ULongLong:
4017 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt128:
4018 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_S:
4019 case clang::BuiltinType::SChar:
4020 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_S:
4021 case clang::BuiltinType::Short:
4022 case clang::BuiltinType::Int:
4023 case clang::BuiltinType::Long:
4024 case clang::BuiltinType::LongLong:
4025 case clang::BuiltinType::Int128:
4026 case clang::BuiltinType::Float:
4027 case clang::BuiltinType::Double:
4028 case clang::BuiltinType::LongDouble:
4029 break;
4030
4031 case clang::BuiltinType::NullPtr:
4032 return eLanguageTypeC_plus_plus;
4033
4034 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId:
4035 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass:
4036 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCSel:
4037 return eLanguageTypeObjC;
4038
4039 case clang::BuiltinType::Dependent:
4040 case clang::BuiltinType::Overload:
4041 case clang::BuiltinType::BoundMember:
4042 case clang::BuiltinType::UnknownAny:
4043 break;
4044 }
4045 break;
4046 case clang::Type::Typedef:
4047 return GetType(llvm::cast<clang::TypedefType>(qual_type)
4048 ->getDecl()
4049 ->getUnderlyingType())
4050 .GetMinimumLanguage();
4051 }
4052 }
4053 return lldb::eLanguageTypeC;
4054}
4055
4056lldb::TypeClass
4057TypeSystemClang::GetTypeClass(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4058 if (!type)
4059 return lldb::eTypeClassInvalid;
4060
4061 clang::QualType qual_type =
4062 RemoveWrappingTypes(GetQualType(type), {clang::Type::Typedef});
4063
4064 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
4065 case clang::Type::Atomic:
4066 case clang::Type::Auto:
4067 case clang::Type::CountAttributed:
4068 case clang::Type::Decltype:
4069 case clang::Type::Paren:
4070 case clang::Type::TypeOf:
4071 case clang::Type::TypeOfExpr:
4072 case clang::Type::Using:
4073 case clang::Type::PredefinedSugar:
4074 llvm_unreachable("Handled in RemoveWrappingTypes!");
4075 case clang::Type::UnaryTransform:
4076 break;
4077 case clang::Type::FunctionNoProto:
4078 return lldb::eTypeClassFunction;
4079 case clang::Type::FunctionProto:
4080 return lldb::eTypeClassFunction;
4081 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
4082 return lldb::eTypeClassArray;
4083 case clang::Type::VariableArray:
4084 return lldb::eTypeClassArray;
4085 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
4086 return lldb::eTypeClassArray;
4087 case clang::Type::DependentSizedArray:
4088 return lldb::eTypeClassArray;
4089 case clang::Type::ArrayParameter:
4090 return lldb::eTypeClassArray;
4091 case clang::Type::DependentSizedExtVector:
4092 return lldb::eTypeClassVector;
4093 case clang::Type::DependentVector:
4094 return lldb::eTypeClassVector;
4095 case clang::Type::ExtVector:
4096 return lldb::eTypeClassVector;
4097 case clang::Type::Vector:
4098 return lldb::eTypeClassVector;
4099 case clang::Type::Builtin:
4100 // Ext-Int is just an integer type.
4101 case clang::Type::BitInt:
4102 case clang::Type::DependentBitInt:
4103 case clang::Type::OverflowBehavior:
4104 return lldb::eTypeClassBuiltin;
4105 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
4106 return lldb::eTypeClassObjCObjectPointer;
4107 case clang::Type::BlockPointer:
4108 return lldb::eTypeClassBlockPointer;
4109 case clang::Type::Pointer:
4110 return lldb::eTypeClassPointer;
4111 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
4112 return lldb::eTypeClassReference;
4113 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
4114 return lldb::eTypeClassReference;
4115 case clang::Type::MemberPointer:
4116 return lldb::eTypeClassMemberPointer;
4117 case clang::Type::Complex:
4118 if (qual_type->isComplexType())
4119 return lldb::eTypeClassComplexFloat;
4120 else
4121 return lldb::eTypeClassComplexInteger;
4122 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
4123 return lldb::eTypeClassObjCObject;
4124 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
4125 return lldb::eTypeClassObjCInterface;
4126 case clang::Type::Record: {
4127 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
4128 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
4129 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl = record_type->getDecl();
4130 if (record_decl->isUnion())
4131 return lldb::eTypeClassUnion;
4132 else if (record_decl->isStruct())
4133 return lldb::eTypeClassStruct;
4134 else
4135 return lldb::eTypeClassClass;
4136 } break;
4137 case clang::Type::Enum:
4138 return lldb::eTypeClassEnumeration;
4139 case clang::Type::Typedef:
4140 return lldb::eTypeClassTypedef;
4141 case clang::Type::UnresolvedUsing:
4142 break;
4143
4144 case clang::Type::Attributed:
4145 case clang::Type::BTFTagAttributed:
4146 break;
4147 case clang::Type::TemplateTypeParm:
4148 break;
4149 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParm:
4150 break;
4151 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParmPack:
4152 break;
4153 case clang::Type::InjectedClassName:
4154 break;
4155 case clang::Type::DependentName:
4156 break;
4157 case clang::Type::PackExpansion:
4158 break;
4159
4160 case clang::Type::TemplateSpecialization:
4161 break;
4162 case clang::Type::DeducedTemplateSpecialization:
4163 break;
4164 case clang::Type::Pipe:
4165 break;
4166
4167 // pointer type decayed from an array or function type.
4168 case clang::Type::Decayed:
4169 break;
4170 case clang::Type::Adjusted:
4171 break;
4172 case clang::Type::ObjCTypeParam:
4173 break;
4174
4175 case clang::Type::DependentAddressSpace:
4176 break;
4177 case clang::Type::MacroQualified:
4178 break;
4179
4180 // Matrix types that we're not sure how to display at the moment.
4181 case clang::Type::ConstantMatrix:
4182 case clang::Type::DependentSizedMatrix:
4183 break;
4184
4185 // We don't handle pack indexing yet
4186 case clang::Type::PackIndexing:
4187 break;
4188
4189 case clang::Type::HLSLAttributedResource:
4190 break;
4191 case clang::Type::HLSLInlineSpirv:
4192 break;
4193 case clang::Type::SubstBuiltinTemplatePack:
4194 break;
4195 }
4196 // We don't know hot to display this type...
4197 return lldb::eTypeClassOther;
4198}
4199
4200unsigned TypeSystemClang::GetTypeQualifiers(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4201 if (type)
4202 return GetQualType(type).getQualifiers().getCVRQualifiers();
4203 return 0;
4204}
4205
4206// Creating related types
4207
4208CompilerType
4209TypeSystemClang::GetArrayElementType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
4210 ExecutionContextScope *exe_scope) {
4211 if (type) {
4212 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
4213
4214 const clang::Type *array_eletype =
4215 qual_type.getTypePtr()->getArrayElementTypeNoTypeQual();
4216
4217 if (!array_eletype)
4218 return CompilerType();
4219
4220 return GetType(clang::QualType(array_eletype, 0));
4221 }
4222 return CompilerType();
4223}
4224
4225CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetArrayType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
4226 uint64_t size) {
4227 if (type) {
4228 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
4229 clang::ASTContext &ast_ctx = getASTContext();
4230 if (size != 0)
4231 return GetType(ast_ctx.getConstantArrayType(
4232 qual_type, llvm::APInt(64, size), nullptr,
4233 clang::ArraySizeModifier::Normal, 0));
4234 else
4235 return GetType(ast_ctx.getIncompleteArrayType(
4236 qual_type, clang::ArraySizeModifier::Normal, 0));
4237 }
4238
4239 return CompilerType();
4240}
4241
4242CompilerType
4243TypeSystemClang::GetCanonicalType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4244 if (type)
4245 return GetType(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
4246 return CompilerType();
4247}
4248
4249static clang::QualType GetFullyUnqualifiedType_Impl(clang::ASTContext *ast,
4250 clang::QualType qual_type) {
4251 if (qual_type->isPointerType())
4252 qual_type = ast->getPointerType(
4253 GetFullyUnqualifiedType_Impl(ast, qual_type->getPointeeType()));
4254 else if (const ConstantArrayType *arr =
4255 ast->getAsConstantArrayType(qual_type)) {
4256 qual_type = ast->getConstantArrayType(
4257 GetFullyUnqualifiedType_Impl(ast, arr->getElementType()),
4258 arr->getSize(), arr->getSizeExpr(), arr->getSizeModifier(),
4259 arr->getIndexTypeQualifiers().getAsOpaqueValue());
4260 } else
4261 qual_type = qual_type.getUnqualifiedType();
4262 qual_type.removeLocalConst();
4263 qual_type.removeLocalRestrict();
4264 qual_type.removeLocalVolatile();
4265 return qual_type;
4266}
4267
4268CompilerType
4269TypeSystemClang::GetFullyUnqualifiedType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4270 if (type)
4271 return GetType(
4272 GetFullyUnqualifiedType_Impl(&getASTContext(), GetQualType(type)));
4273 return CompilerType();
4274}
4275
4276CompilerType
4277TypeSystemClang::GetEnumerationIntegerType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4278 if (type)
4279 return GetEnumerationIntegerType(GetType(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
4280 return CompilerType();
4281}
4282
4283int TypeSystemClang::GetFunctionArgumentCount(
4284 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4285 if (type) {
4286 const clang::FunctionProtoType *func =
4287 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionProtoType>(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
4288 if (func)
4289 return func->getNumParams();
4290 }
4291 return -1;
4292}
4293
4294CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetFunctionArgumentTypeAtIndex(
4295 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, size_t idx) {
4296 if (type) {
4297 const clang::FunctionProtoType *func =
4298 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionProtoType>(GetQualType(type));
4299 if (func) {
4300 const uint32_t num_args = func->getNumParams();
4301 if (idx < num_args)
4302 return GetType(func->getParamType(idx));
4303 }
4304 }
4305 return CompilerType();
4306}
4307
4308CompilerType
4309TypeSystemClang::GetFunctionReturnType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4310 if (type) {
4311 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
4312 const clang::FunctionProtoType *func =
4313 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionProtoType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
4314 if (func)
4315 return GetType(func->getReturnType());
4316 }
4317 return CompilerType();
4318}
4319
4320size_t
4321TypeSystemClang::GetNumMemberFunctions(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4322 size_t num_functions = 0;
4323 if (type) {
4324 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
4325 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
4326 case clang::Type::Record:
4327 if (GetCompleteQualType(&getASTContext(), qual_type))
4328 if (const auto *cxx_record_decl = qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl())
4329 num_functions = std::distance(cxx_record_decl->method_begin(),
4330 cxx_record_decl->method_end());
4331 break;
4332
4333 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer: {
4334 const clang::ObjCObjectPointerType *objc_class_type =
4335 qual_type->castAs<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>();
4336 const clang::ObjCInterfaceType *objc_interface_type =
4337 objc_class_type->getInterfaceType();
4338 if (objc_interface_type &&
4339 GetCompleteType(static_cast<lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t>(
4340 const_cast<clang::ObjCInterfaceType *>(objc_interface_type)))) {
4341 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
4342 objc_interface_type->getDecl();
4343 if (class_interface_decl) {
4344 num_functions = std::distance(class_interface_decl->meth_begin(),
4345 class_interface_decl->meth_end());
4346 }
4347 }
4348 break;
4349 }
4350
4351 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
4352 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
4353 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
4354 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
4355 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
4356 if (objc_class_type) {
4357 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
4358 objc_class_type->getInterface();
4359 if (class_interface_decl)
4360 num_functions = std::distance(class_interface_decl->meth_begin(),
4361 class_interface_decl->meth_end());
4362 }
4363 }
4364 break;
4365
4366 default:
4367 break;
4368 }
4369 }
4370 return num_functions;
4371}
4372
4373TypeMemberFunctionImpl
4374TypeSystemClang::GetMemberFunctionAtIndex(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
4375 size_t idx) {
4376 std::string name;
4377 MemberFunctionKind kind(MemberFunctionKind::eMemberFunctionKindUnknown);
4378 CompilerType clang_type;
4379 CompilerDecl clang_decl;
4380 if (type) {
4381 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
4382 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
4383 case clang::Type::Record:
4384 if (GetCompleteQualType(&getASTContext(), qual_type)) {
4385 if (const auto *cxx_record_decl = qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl()) {
4386 auto method_iter = cxx_record_decl->method_begin();
4387 auto method_end = cxx_record_decl->method_end();
4388 if (idx <
4389 static_cast<size_t>(std::distance(method_iter, method_end))) {
4390 std::advance(method_iter, idx);
4391 clang::CXXMethodDecl *cxx_method_decl =
4392 method_iter->getCanonicalDecl();
4393 if (cxx_method_decl) {
4394 name = cxx_method_decl->getDeclName().getAsString();
4395 if (cxx_method_decl->isStatic())
4396 kind = lldb::eMemberFunctionKindStaticMethod;
4397 else if (llvm::isa<clang::CXXConstructorDecl>(cxx_method_decl))
4398 kind = lldb::eMemberFunctionKindConstructor;
4399 else if (llvm::isa<clang::CXXDestructorDecl>(cxx_method_decl))
4400 kind = lldb::eMemberFunctionKindDestructor;
4401 else
4402 kind = lldb::eMemberFunctionKindInstanceMethod;
4403 clang_type = GetType(cxx_method_decl->getType());
4404 clang_decl = GetCompilerDecl(cxx_method_decl);
4405 }
4406 }
4407 }
4408 }
4409 break;
4410
4411 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer: {
4412 const clang::ObjCObjectPointerType *objc_class_type =
4413 qual_type->castAs<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>();
4414 const clang::ObjCInterfaceType *objc_interface_type =
4415 objc_class_type->getInterfaceType();
4416 if (objc_interface_type &&
4417 GetCompleteType(static_cast<lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t>(
4418 const_cast<clang::ObjCInterfaceType *>(objc_interface_type)))) {
4419 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
4420 objc_interface_type->getDecl();
4421 if (class_interface_decl) {
4422 auto method_iter = class_interface_decl->meth_begin();
4423 auto method_end = class_interface_decl->meth_end();
4424 if (idx <
4425 static_cast<size_t>(std::distance(method_iter, method_end))) {
4426 std::advance(method_iter, idx);
4427 clang::ObjCMethodDecl *objc_method_decl =
4428 method_iter->getCanonicalDecl();
4429 if (objc_method_decl) {
4430 clang_decl = GetCompilerDecl(objc_method_decl);
4431 name = objc_method_decl->getSelector().getAsString();
4432 if (objc_method_decl->isClassMethod())
4433 kind = lldb::eMemberFunctionKindStaticMethod;
4434 else
4435 kind = lldb::eMemberFunctionKindInstanceMethod;
4436 }
4437 }
4438 }
4439 }
4440 break;
4441 }
4442
4443 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
4444 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
4445 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
4446 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
4447 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
4448 if (objc_class_type) {
4449 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
4450 objc_class_type->getInterface();
4451 if (class_interface_decl) {
4452 auto method_iter = class_interface_decl->meth_begin();
4453 auto method_end = class_interface_decl->meth_end();
4454 if (idx <
4455 static_cast<size_t>(std::distance(method_iter, method_end))) {
4456 std::advance(method_iter, idx);
4457 clang::ObjCMethodDecl *objc_method_decl =
4458 method_iter->getCanonicalDecl();
4459 if (objc_method_decl) {
4460 clang_decl = GetCompilerDecl(objc_method_decl);
4461 name = objc_method_decl->getSelector().getAsString();
4462 if (objc_method_decl->isClassMethod())
4463 kind = lldb::eMemberFunctionKindStaticMethod;
4464 else
4465 kind = lldb::eMemberFunctionKindInstanceMethod;
4466 }
4467 }
4468 }
4469 }
4470 }
4471 break;
4472
4473 default:
4474 break;
4475 }
4476 }
4477
4478 if (kind == eMemberFunctionKindUnknown)
4479 return TypeMemberFunctionImpl();
4480 else
4481 return TypeMemberFunctionImpl(clang_type, clang_decl, name, kind);
4482}
4483
4484CompilerType
4485TypeSystemClang::GetNonReferenceType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4486 if (type)
4487 return GetType(GetQualType(type).getNonReferenceType());
4488 return CompilerType();
4489}
4490
4491CompilerType
4492TypeSystemClang::GetPointeeType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4493 if (type) {
4494 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
4495 return GetType(qual_type.getTypePtr()->getPointeeType());
4496 }
4497 return CompilerType();
4498}
4499
4500CompilerType
4501TypeSystemClang::GetPointerType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4502 if (type) {
4503 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
4504
4505 switch (qual_type.getDesugaredType(getASTContext())->getTypeClass()) {
4506 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
4507 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
4508 return GetType(getASTContext().getObjCObjectPointerType(qual_type));
4509
4510 default:
4511 return GetType(getASTContext().getPointerType(qual_type));
4512 }
4513 }
4514 return CompilerType();
4515}
4516
4517CompilerType
4518TypeSystemClang::GetLValueReferenceType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4519 if (type)
4520 return GetType(getASTContext().getLValueReferenceType(GetQualType(type)));
4521 else
4522 return CompilerType();
4523}
4524
4525CompilerType
4526TypeSystemClang::GetRValueReferenceType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4527 if (type)
4528 return GetType(getASTContext().getRValueReferenceType(GetQualType(type)));
4529 else
4530 return CompilerType();
4531}
4532
4533CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetAtomicType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4534 if (!type)
4535 return CompilerType();
4536 return GetType(getASTContext().getAtomicType(GetQualType(type)));
4537}
4538
4539CompilerType
4540TypeSystemClang::AddConstModifier(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4541 if (type) {
4542 clang::QualType result(GetQualType(type));
4543 result.addConst();
4544 return GetType(result);
4545 }
4546 return CompilerType();
4547}
4548
4549CompilerType
4550TypeSystemClang::AddPtrAuthModifier(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
4551 uint32_t payload) {
4552 if (type) {
4553 clang::ASTContext &clang_ast = getASTContext();
4554 auto pauth = PointerAuthQualifier::fromOpaqueValue(payload);
4555 clang::QualType result =
4556 clang_ast.getPointerAuthType(GetQualType(type), pauth);
4557 return GetType(result);
4558 }
4559 return CompilerType();
4560}
4561
4562CompilerType
4563TypeSystemClang::AddVolatileModifier(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4564 if (type) {
4565 clang::QualType result(GetQualType(type));
4566 result.addVolatile();
4567 return GetType(result);
4568 }
4569 return CompilerType();
4570}
4571
4572CompilerType
4573TypeSystemClang::AddRestrictModifier(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4574 if (type) {
4575 clang::QualType result(GetQualType(type));
4576 result.addRestrict();
4577 return GetType(result);
4578 }
4579 return CompilerType();
4580}
4581
4582CompilerType TypeSystemClang::CreateTypedef(
4583 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, const char *typedef_name,
4584 const CompilerDeclContext &compiler_decl_ctx, uint32_t payload) {
4585 if (type && typedef_name && typedef_name[0]) {
4586 clang::ASTContext &clang_ast = getASTContext();
4587 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
4588
4589 clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx =
4590 TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetAsDeclContext(compiler_decl_ctx);
4591 if (!decl_ctx)
4592 decl_ctx = getASTContext().getTranslationUnitDecl();
4593
4594 clang::TypedefDecl *decl =
4595 clang::TypedefDecl::CreateDeserialized(clang_ast, GlobalDeclID());
4596 decl->setDeclContext(decl_ctx);
4597 decl->setDeclName(&clang_ast.Idents.get(typedef_name));
4598 decl->setTypeSourceInfo(clang_ast.getTrivialTypeSourceInfo(qual_type));
4599 decl_ctx->addDecl(decl);
4600 SetOwningModule(decl, TypePayloadClang(payload).GetOwningModule());
4601
4602 clang::TagDecl *tdecl = nullptr;
4603 if (!qual_type.isNull()) {
4604 if (const clang::RecordType *rt = qual_type->getAs<clang::RecordType>())
4605 tdecl = rt->getDecl();
4606 if (const clang::EnumType *et = qual_type->getAs<clang::EnumType>())
4607 tdecl = et->getDecl();
4608 }
4609
4610 // Check whether this declaration is an anonymous struct, union, or enum,
4611 // hidden behind a typedef. If so, we try to check whether we have a
