4612 // typedef tag to attach to the original record declaration
4613 if (tdecl && !tdecl->getIdentifier() && !tdecl->getTypedefNameForAnonDecl())
4614 tdecl->setTypedefNameForAnonDecl(decl);
4615
4616 decl->setAccess(clang::AS_public);
4617
4618 // Get a uniqued clang::QualType for the typedef decl type
4619 NestedNameSpecifier Qualifier =
4620 clang::TypeName::getFullyQualifiedDeclaredContext(clang_ast, decl);
4621 return GetType(
4622 clang_ast.getTypedefType(ElaboratedTypeKeyword::None, Qualifier, decl));
4623 }
4624 return CompilerType();
4625}
4626
4627CompilerType
4628TypeSystemClang::GetTypedefedType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4629 if (type) {
4630 const clang::TypedefType *typedef_type = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::TypedefType>(
4631 RemoveWrappingTypes(GetQualType(type), {clang::Type::Typedef}));
4632 if (typedef_type)
4633 return GetType(typedef_type->getDecl()->getUnderlyingType());
4634 }
4635 return CompilerType();
4636}
4637
4638// Create related types using the current type's AST
4639
4640CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::BasicType basic_type) {
4641 return TypeSystemClang::GetBasicType(basic_type);
4642}
4643
4644CompilerType TypeSystemClang::CreateGenericFunctionPrototype() {
4645 clang::ASTContext &ast = getASTContext();
4646 const FunctionType::ExtInfo generic_ext_info(
4647 /*noReturn=*/false,
4648 /*hasRegParm=*/false,
4649 /*regParm=*/0,
4650 CallingConv::CC_C,
4651 /*producesResult=*/false,
4652 /*noCallerSavedRegs=*/false,
4653 /*NoCfCheck=*/false,
4654 /*cmseNSCall=*/false);
4655 QualType func_type = ast.getFunctionNoProtoType(ast.VoidTy, generic_ext_info);
4656 return GetType(func_type);
4657}
4658// Exploring the type
4659
4660const llvm::fltSemantics &
4661TypeSystemClang::GetFloatTypeSemantics(size_t byte_size, lldb::Format format) {
4662 clang::ASTContext &ast = getASTContext();
4663 const size_t bit_size = byte_size * 8;
4664 if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.FloatTy))
4665 return ast.getFloatTypeSemantics(ast.FloatTy);
4666 else if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.DoubleTy))
4667 return ast.getFloatTypeSemantics(ast.DoubleTy);
4668 else if (format == eFormatFloat128 &&
4669 bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.Float128Ty))
4670 return ast.getFloatTypeSemantics(ast.Float128Ty);
4671 else if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.LongDoubleTy) ||
4672 bit_size == llvm::APFloat::semanticsSizeInBits(
4673 ast.getFloatTypeSemantics(ast.LongDoubleTy)))
4674 return ast.getFloatTypeSemantics(ast.LongDoubleTy);
4675 else if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.HalfTy))
4676 return ast.getFloatTypeSemantics(ast.HalfTy);
4677 else if (bit_size == ast.getTypeSize(ast.Float128Ty))
4678 return ast.getFloatTypeSemantics(ast.Float128Ty);
4679 return llvm::APFloatBase::Bogus();
4680}
4681
4682llvm::Expected<uint64_t>
4683TypeSystemClang::GetObjCBitSize(QualType qual_type,
4684 ExecutionContextScope *exe_scope) {
4685 assert(qual_type->isObjCObjectOrInterfaceType());
4686 ExecutionContext exe_ctx(exe_scope);
4687 if (Process *process = exe_ctx.GetProcessPtr()) {
4688 if (ObjCLanguageRuntime *objc_runtime =
4689 ObjCLanguageRuntime::Get(*process)) {
4690 if (std::optional<uint64_t> bit_size =
4691 objc_runtime->GetTypeBitSize(GetType(qual_type)))
4692 return *bit_size;
4693 }
4694 } else {
4695 static bool g_printed = false;
4696 if (!g_printed) {
4697 StreamString s;
4698 DumpTypeDescription(qual_type.getAsOpaquePtr(), s);
4699
4700 llvm::outs() << "warning: trying to determine the size of type ";
4701 llvm::outs() << s.GetString() << "\n";
4702 llvm::outs() << "without a valid ExecutionContext. this is not "
4703 "reliable. please file a bug against LLDB.\n";
4704 llvm::outs() << "backtrace:\n";
4705 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::outs());
4706 llvm::outs() << "\n";
4707 g_printed = true;
4708 }
4709 }
4710
4711 return getASTContext().getTypeSize(qual_type) +
4712 getASTContext().getTypeSize(getASTContext().ObjCBuiltinClassTy);
4713}
4714
4715llvm::Expected<uint64_t>
4716TypeSystemClang::GetBitSize(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
4717 ExecutionContextScope *exe_scope) {
4718 const bool base_name_only = true;
4719 if (!GetCompleteType(type))
4720 return llvm::createStringError(
4721 "could not complete type %s",
4722 GetTypeName(type, base_name_only).AsCString(""));
4723
4724 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
4725 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
4726 switch (type_class) {
4727 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
4728 case clang::Type::FunctionProto:
4729 case clang::Type::Record:
4730 return getASTContext().getTypeSize(qual_type);
4731 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
4732 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
4733 return GetObjCBitSize(qual_type, exe_scope);
4734 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray: {
4735 const uint64_t bit_size = getASTContext().getTypeSize(qual_type);
4736 if (bit_size == 0)
4737 return getASTContext().getTypeSize(
4738 qual_type->getArrayElementTypeNoTypeQual()
4739 ->getCanonicalTypeUnqualified());
4740
4741 return bit_size;
4742 }
4743 default:
4744 if (const uint64_t bit_size = getASTContext().getTypeSize(qual_type))
4745 return bit_size;
4746 }
4747
4748 return llvm::createStringError(
4749 "could not get size of type %s",
4750 GetTypeName(type, base_name_only).AsCString(""));
4751}
4752
4753std::optional<size_t>
4754TypeSystemClang::GetTypeBitAlign(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
4755 ExecutionContextScope *exe_scope) {
4756 if (GetCompleteType(type))
4757 return getASTContext().getTypeAlign(GetQualType(type));
4758 return {};
4759}
4760
4761lldb::Encoding TypeSystemClang::GetEncoding(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
4762 if (!type)
4763 return lldb::eEncodingInvalid;
4764
4765 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
4766
4767 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
4768 case clang::Type::Atomic:
4769 case clang::Type::Auto:
4770 case clang::Type::CountAttributed:
4771 case clang::Type::Decltype:
4772 case clang::Type::Paren:
4773 case clang::Type::Typedef:
4774 case clang::Type::TypeOf:
4775 case clang::Type::TypeOfExpr:
4776 case clang::Type::Using:
4777 case clang::Type::PredefinedSugar:
4778 llvm_unreachable("Handled in RemoveWrappingTypes!");
4779
4780 case clang::Type::UnaryTransform:
4781 break;
4782
4783 case clang::Type::FunctionNoProto:
4784 case clang::Type::FunctionProto:
4785 return lldb::eEncodingUint;
4786
4787 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
4788 case clang::Type::VariableArray:
4789 case clang::Type::ArrayParameter:
4790 break;
4791
4792 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
4793 break;
4794
4795 case clang::Type::DependentVector:
4796 case clang::Type::ExtVector:
4797 case clang::Type::Vector:
4798 break;
4799
4800 case clang::Type::BitInt:
4801 case clang::Type::DependentBitInt:
4802 case clang::Type::OverflowBehavior:
4803 return qual_type->isUnsignedIntegerType() ? lldb::eEncodingUint
4804 : lldb::eEncodingSint;
4805
4806 case clang::Type::Builtin:
4807 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind()) {
4808 case clang::BuiltinType::Void:
4809 break;
4810
4811 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_S:
4812 case clang::BuiltinType::SChar:
4813 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_S:
4814 case clang::BuiltinType::Short:
4815 case clang::BuiltinType::Int:
4816 case clang::BuiltinType::Long:
4817 case clang::BuiltinType::LongLong:
4818 case clang::BuiltinType::Int128:
4819 return lldb::eEncodingSint;
4820
4821 case clang::BuiltinType::Bool:
4822 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_U:
4823 case clang::BuiltinType::UChar:
4824 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_U:
4825 case clang::BuiltinType::Char8:
4826 case clang::BuiltinType::Char16:
4827 case clang::BuiltinType::Char32:
4828 case clang::BuiltinType::UShort:
4829 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt:
4830 case clang::BuiltinType::ULong:
4831 case clang::BuiltinType::ULongLong:
4832 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt128:
4833 return lldb::eEncodingUint;
4834
4835 // Fixed point types. Note that they are currently ignored.
4836 case clang::BuiltinType::ShortAccum:
4837 case clang::BuiltinType::Accum:
4838 case clang::BuiltinType::LongAccum:
4839 case clang::BuiltinType::UShortAccum:
4840 case clang::BuiltinType::UAccum:
4841 case clang::BuiltinType::ULongAccum:
4842 case clang::BuiltinType::ShortFract:
4843 case clang::BuiltinType::Fract:
4844 case clang::BuiltinType::LongFract:
4845 case clang::BuiltinType::UShortFract:
4846 case clang::BuiltinType::UFract:
4847 case clang::BuiltinType::ULongFract:
4848 case clang::BuiltinType::SatShortAccum:
4849 case clang::BuiltinType::SatAccum:
4850 case clang::BuiltinType::SatLongAccum:
4851 case clang::BuiltinType::SatUShortAccum:
4852 case clang::BuiltinType::SatUAccum:
4853 case clang::BuiltinType::SatULongAccum:
4854 case clang::BuiltinType::SatShortFract:
4855 case clang::BuiltinType::SatFract:
4856 case clang::BuiltinType::SatLongFract:
4857 case clang::BuiltinType::SatUShortFract:
4858 case clang::BuiltinType::SatUFract:
4859 case clang::BuiltinType::SatULongFract:
4860 break;
4861
4862 case clang::BuiltinType::Half:
4863 case clang::BuiltinType::Float:
4864 case clang::BuiltinType::Float16:
4865 case clang::BuiltinType::Float128:
4866 case clang::BuiltinType::Double:
4867 case clang::BuiltinType::LongDouble:
4868 case clang::BuiltinType::BFloat16:
4869 case clang::BuiltinType::Ibm128:
4870 return lldb::eEncodingIEEE754;
4871
4872 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass:
4873 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId:
4874 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCSel:
4875 return lldb::eEncodingUint;
4876
4877 case clang::BuiltinType::NullPtr:
4878 return lldb::eEncodingUint;
4879
4880 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::ARCUnbridgedCast:
4881 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::BoundMember:
4882 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::BuiltinFn:
4883 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::Dependent:
4884 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLClkEvent:
4885 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLEvent:
4886 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dRO:
4887 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dWO:
4888 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dRW:
4889 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dArrayRO:
4890 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dArrayWO:
4891 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dArrayRW:
4892 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dBufferRO:
4893 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dBufferWO:
4894 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage1dBufferRW:
4895 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dRO:
4896 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dWO:
4897 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dRW:
4898 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayRO:
4899 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayWO:
4900 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayRW:
4901 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayDepthRO:
4902 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayDepthWO:
4903 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayDepthRW:
4904 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayMSAARO:
4905 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayMSAAWO:
4906 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayMSAARW:
4907 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayMSAADepthRO:
4908 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayMSAADepthWO:
4909 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dArrayMSAADepthRW:
4910 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dDepthRO:
4911 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dDepthWO:
4912 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dDepthRW:
4913 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dMSAARO:
4914 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dMSAAWO:
4915 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dMSAARW:
4916 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dMSAADepthRO:
4917 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dMSAADepthWO:
4918 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage2dMSAADepthRW:
4919 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage3dRO:
4920 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage3dWO:
4921 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLImage3dRW:
4922 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLQueue:
4923 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLReserveID:
4924 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OCLSampler:
4925 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::HLSLResource:
4926 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::ArraySection:
4927 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OMPArrayShaping:
4928 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::OMPIterator:
4929 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::Overload:
4930 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::PseudoObject:
4931 case clang::BuiltinType::Kind::UnknownAny:
4932 break;
4933
4934 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCMcePayload:
4935 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCImePayload:
4936 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCRefPayload:
4937 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCSicPayload:
4938 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCMceResult:
4939 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCImeResult:
4940 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCRefResult:
4941 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCSicResult:
4942 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCImeResultSingleReferenceStreamout:
4943 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCImeResultDualReferenceStreamout:
4944 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCImeSingleReferenceStreamin:
4945 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLIntelSubgroupAVCImeDualReferenceStreamin:
4946 break;
4947
4948 // PowerPC -- Matrix Multiply Assist
4949 case clang::BuiltinType::VectorPair:
4950 case clang::BuiltinType::VectorQuad:
4951 case clang::BuiltinType::DMR1024:
4952 case clang::BuiltinType::DMR2048:
4953 break;
4954
4955 // ARM -- Scalable Vector Extension
4956#define SVE_TYPE(Name, Id, SingletonId) case clang::BuiltinType::Id:
4957#include "clang/Basic/AArch64ACLETypes.def"
4958 break;
4959
4960 // RISC-V V builtin types.
4961#define RVV_TYPE(Name, Id, SingletonId) case clang::BuiltinType::Id:
4962#include "clang/Basic/RISCVVTypes.def"
4963 break;
4964
4965 // WebAssembly builtin types.
4966 case clang::BuiltinType::WasmExternRef:
4967 break;
4968
4969 case clang::BuiltinType::IncompleteMatrixIdx:
4970 break;
4971
4972 case clang::BuiltinType::UnresolvedTemplate:
4973 break;
4974
4975 // AMD GPU builtin types.
4976#define AMDGPU_TYPE(Name, Id, SingletonId, Width, Align) \
4977 case clang::BuiltinType::Id:
4978#include "clang/Basic/AMDGPUTypes.def"
4979 break;
4980 }
4981 break;
4982 // All pointer types are represented as unsigned integer encodings. We may
4983 // nee to add a eEncodingPointer if we ever need to know the difference
4984 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
4985 case clang::Type::BlockPointer:
4986 case clang::Type::Pointer:
4987 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
4988 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
4989 case clang::Type::MemberPointer:
4990 return lldb::eEncodingUint;
4991 case clang::Type::Complex: {
4992 lldb::Encoding encoding = lldb::eEncodingIEEE754;
4993 if (qual_type->isComplexType())
4994 encoding = lldb::eEncodingIEEE754;
4995 else {
4996 const clang::ComplexType *complex_type =
4997 qual_type->getAsComplexIntegerType();
4998 if (complex_type)
4999 encoding = GetType(complex_type->getElementType()).GetEncoding();
5000 else
5001 encoding = lldb::eEncodingSint;
5002 }
5003 return encoding;
5004 }
5005
5006 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
5007 break;
5008 case clang::Type::Record:
5009 break;
5010 case clang::Type::Enum:
5011 return qual_type->isUnsignedIntegerOrEnumerationType()
5012 ? lldb::eEncodingUint
5013 : lldb::eEncodingSint;
5014 case clang::Type::DependentSizedArray:
5015 case clang::Type::DependentSizedExtVector:
5016 case clang::Type::UnresolvedUsing:
5017 case clang::Type::Attributed:
5018 case clang::Type::BTFTagAttributed:
5019 case clang::Type::TemplateTypeParm:
5020 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParm:
5021 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParmPack:
5022 case clang::Type::InjectedClassName:
5023 case clang::Type::DependentName:
5024 case clang::Type::PackExpansion:
5025 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
5026
5027 case clang::Type::TemplateSpecialization:
5028 case clang::Type::DeducedTemplateSpecialization:
5029 case clang::Type::Adjusted:
5030 case clang::Type::Pipe:
5031 break;
5032
5033 // pointer type decayed from an array or function type.
5034 case clang::Type::Decayed:
5035 break;
5036 case clang::Type::ObjCTypeParam:
5037 break;
5038
5039 case clang::Type::DependentAddressSpace:
5040 break;
5041 case clang::Type::MacroQualified:
5042 break;
5043
5044 case clang::Type::ConstantMatrix:
5045 case clang::Type::DependentSizedMatrix:
5046 break;
5047
5048 // We don't handle pack indexing yet
5049 case clang::Type::PackIndexing:
5050 break;
5051
5052 case clang::Type::HLSLAttributedResource:
5053 break;
5054 case clang::Type::HLSLInlineSpirv:
5055 break;
5056 case clang::Type::SubstBuiltinTemplatePack:
5057 break;
5058 }
5059
5060 return lldb::eEncodingInvalid;
5061}
5062
5063lldb::Format TypeSystemClang::GetFormat(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
5064 if (!type)
5065 return lldb::eFormatDefault;
5066
5067 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
5068
5069 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
5070 case clang::Type::Atomic:
5071 case clang::Type::Auto:
5072 case clang::Type::CountAttributed:
5073 case clang::Type::Decltype:
5074 case clang::Type::Paren:
5075 case clang::Type::Typedef:
5076 case clang::Type::TypeOf:
5077 case clang::Type::TypeOfExpr:
5078 case clang::Type::Using:
5079 case clang::Type::PredefinedSugar:
5080 llvm_unreachable("Handled in RemoveWrappingTypes!");
5081 case clang::Type::UnaryTransform:
5082 break;
5083
5084 case clang::Type::FunctionNoProto:
5085 case clang::Type::FunctionProto:
5086 break;
5087
5088 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
5089 case clang::Type::VariableArray:
5090 case clang::Type::ArrayParameter:
5091 break;
5092
5093 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
5094 return lldb::eFormatVoid; // no value
5095
5096 case clang::Type::DependentVector:
5097 case clang::Type::ExtVector:
5098 case clang::Type::Vector:
5099 break;
5100
5101 case clang::Type::BitInt:
5102 case clang::Type::DependentBitInt:
5103 case clang::Type::OverflowBehavior:
5104 return qual_type->isUnsignedIntegerType() ? lldb::eFormatUnsigned
5105 : lldb::eFormatDecimal;
5106
5107 case clang::Type::Builtin:
5108 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind()) {
5109 case clang::BuiltinType::UnknownAny:
5110 case clang::BuiltinType::Void:
5111 case clang::BuiltinType::BoundMember:
5112 break;
5113
5114 case clang::BuiltinType::Bool:
5115 return lldb::eFormatBoolean;
5116 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_S:
5117 case clang::BuiltinType::SChar:
5118 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_S:
5119 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_U:
5120 case clang::BuiltinType::UChar:
5121 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_U:
5122 return lldb::eFormatChar;
5123 case clang::BuiltinType::Char8:
5124 return lldb::eFormatUnicode8;
5125 case clang::BuiltinType::Char16:
5126 return lldb::eFormatUnicode16;
5127 case clang::BuiltinType::Char32:
5128 return lldb::eFormatUnicode32;
5129 case clang::BuiltinType::UShort:
5130 return lldb::eFormatUnsigned;
5131 case clang::BuiltinType::Short:
5132 return lldb::eFormatDecimal;
5133 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt:
5134 return lldb::eFormatUnsigned;
5135 case clang::BuiltinType::Int:
5136 return lldb::eFormatDecimal;
5137 case clang::BuiltinType::ULong:
5138 return lldb::eFormatUnsigned;
5139 case clang::BuiltinType::Long:
5140 return lldb::eFormatDecimal;
5141 case clang::BuiltinType::ULongLong:
5142 return lldb::eFormatUnsigned;
5143 case clang::BuiltinType::LongLong:
5144 return lldb::eFormatDecimal;
5145 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt128:
5146 return lldb::eFormatUnsigned;
5147 case clang::BuiltinType::Int128:
5148 return lldb::eFormatDecimal;
5149 case clang::BuiltinType::Half:
5150 case clang::BuiltinType::Float:
5151 case clang::BuiltinType::Double:
5152 case clang::BuiltinType::LongDouble:
5153 return lldb::eFormatFloat;
5154 case clang::BuiltinType::Float128:
5155 return lldb::eFormatFloat128;
5156 default:
5157 return lldb::eFormatHex;
5158 }
5159 break;
5160 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
5161 return lldb::eFormatHex;
5162 case clang::Type::BlockPointer:
5163 return lldb::eFormatHex;
5164 case clang::Type::Pointer:
5165 return lldb::eFormatHex;
5166 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
5167 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
5168 return lldb::eFormatHex;
5169 case clang::Type::MemberPointer:
5170 return lldb::eFormatHex;
5171 case clang::Type::Complex: {
5172 if (qual_type->isComplexType())
5173 return lldb::eFormatComplex;
5174 else
5175 return lldb::eFormatComplexInteger;
5176 }
5177 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
5178 break;
5179 case clang::Type::Record:
5180 break;
5181 case clang::Type::Enum:
5182 return lldb::eFormatEnum;
5183 case clang::Type::DependentSizedArray:
5184 case clang::Type::DependentSizedExtVector:
5185 case clang::Type::UnresolvedUsing:
5186 case clang::Type::Attributed:
5187 case clang::Type::BTFTagAttributed:
5188 case clang::Type::TemplateTypeParm:
5189 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParm:
5190 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParmPack:
5191 case clang::Type::InjectedClassName:
5192 case clang::Type::DependentName:
5193 case clang::Type::PackExpansion:
5194 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
5195
5196 case clang::Type::TemplateSpecialization:
5197 case clang::Type::DeducedTemplateSpecialization:
5198 case clang::Type::Adjusted:
5199 case clang::Type::Pipe:
5200 break;
5201
5202 // pointer type decayed from an array or function type.
5203 case clang::Type::Decayed:
5204 break;
5205 case clang::Type::ObjCTypeParam:
5206 break;
5207
5208 case clang::Type::DependentAddressSpace:
5209 break;
5210 case clang::Type::MacroQualified:
5211 break;
5212
5213 // Matrix types we're not sure how to display yet.
5214 case clang::Type::ConstantMatrix:
5215 case clang::Type::DependentSizedMatrix:
5216 break;
5217
5218 // We don't handle pack indexing yet
5219 case clang::Type::PackIndexing:
5220 break;
5221
5222 case clang::Type::HLSLAttributedResource:
5223 break;
5224 case clang::Type::HLSLInlineSpirv:
5225 break;
5226 case clang::Type::SubstBuiltinTemplatePack:
5227 break;
5228 }
5229 // We don't know hot to display this type...
5230 return lldb::eFormatBytes;
5231}
5232
5233static bool ObjCDeclHasIVars(clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl) {
5234 while (class_interface_decl) {
5235 if (class_interface_decl->ivar_size() > 0)
5236 return true;
5237
5238 class_interface_decl = class_interface_decl->getSuperClass();
5239 }
5240 return false;
5241}
5242
5243static std::optional<SymbolFile::ArrayInfo>
5244GetDynamicArrayInfo(TypeSystemClang &ast, SymbolFile *sym_file,
5245 clang::QualType qual_type,
5246 const ExecutionContext *exe_ctx) {
5247 if (qual_type->isIncompleteArrayType())
5248 if (std::optional<ClangASTMetadata> metadata =
5249 ast.GetMetadata(qual_type.getTypePtr()))
5250 return sym_file->GetDynamicArrayInfoForUID(metadata->GetUserID(),
5251 exe_ctx);
5252 return std::nullopt;
5253}
5254
5255llvm::Expected<uint32_t>
5256TypeSystemClang::GetNumChildren(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
5257 bool omit_empty_base_classes,
5258 const ExecutionContext *exe_ctx) {
5259 if (!type)
5260 return llvm::createStringError("invalid clang type");
5261
5262 uint32_t num_children = 0;
5263 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetQualType(type)));
5264 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5265 switch (type_class) {
5266 case clang::Type::Builtin:
5267 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind()) {
5268 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId: // child is Class
5269 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass: // child is Class
5270 num_children = 1;
5271 break;
5272
5273 default:
5274 break;
5275 }
5276 break;
5277
5278 case clang::Type::Complex:
5279 return 0;
5280 case clang::Type::Record:
5281 if (GetCompleteQualType(&getASTContext(), qual_type)) {
5282 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
5283 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
5284 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
5285 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
5286 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
5287 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(record_decl);
5288
5289 num_children +=
5290 GetNumBaseClasses(cxx_record_decl, omit_empty_base_classes);
5291 num_children += std::distance(record_decl->field_begin(),
5292 record_decl->field_end());
5293 } else
5294 return llvm::createStringError(
5295 "incomplete type \"" + GetDisplayTypeName(type).GetString() + "\"");
5296 break;
5297 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
5298 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
5299 if (GetCompleteQualType(&getASTContext(), qual_type)) {
5300 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
5301 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
5302 assert(objc_class_type);
5303 if (objc_class_type) {
5304 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5305 objc_class_type->getInterface();
5306
5307 if (class_interface_decl) {
5308
5309 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *superclass_interface_decl =
5310 class_interface_decl->getSuperClass();
5311 if (superclass_interface_decl) {
5312 if (omit_empty_base_classes) {
5313 if (ObjCDeclHasIVars(superclass_interface_decl))
5314 ++num_children;
5315 } else
5316 ++num_children;
5317 }
5318
5319 num_children += class_interface_decl->ivar_size();
5320 }
5321 }
5322 }
5323 break;
5324
5325 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
5326 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
5327 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer: {
5328 CompilerType pointee_clang_type(GetPointeeType(type));
5329
5330 uint32_t num_pointee_children = 0;
5331 if (pointee_clang_type.IsAggregateType()) {
5332 auto num_children_or_err =
5333 pointee_clang_type.GetNumChildren(omit_empty_base_classes, exe_ctx);
5334 if (!num_children_or_err)
5335 return num_children_or_err;
5336 num_pointee_children = *num_children_or_err;
5337 }
5338 // If this type points to a simple type, then it has 1 child
5339 if (num_pointee_children == 0)
5340 num_children = 1;
5341 else
5342 num_children = num_pointee_children;
5343 } break;
5344
5345 case clang::Type::Vector:
5346 case clang::Type::ExtVector:
5347 num_children =
5348 llvm::cast<clang::VectorType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())->getNumElements();
5349 break;
5350
5351 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
5352 num_children = llvm::cast<clang::ConstantArrayType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())
5353 ->getSize()
5354 .getLimitedValue();
5355 break;
5356 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
5357 if (auto array_info =
5358 GetDynamicArrayInfo(*this, GetSymbolFile(), qual_type, exe_ctx))
5359 // FIXME: Only 1-dimensional arrays are supported.
5360 num_children = array_info->element_orders.size()
5361 ? array_info->element_orders.back().value_or(0)
5362 : 0;
5363 break;
5364
5365 case clang::Type::Pointer: {
5366 const clang::PointerType *pointer_type =
5367 llvm::cast<clang::PointerType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
5368 clang::QualType pointee_type(pointer_type->getPointeeType());
5369 CompilerType pointee_clang_type(GetType(pointee_type));
5370 uint32_t num_pointee_children = 0;
5371 if (pointee_clang_type.IsAggregateType()) {
5372 auto num_children_or_err =
5373 pointee_clang_type.GetNumChildren(omit_empty_base_classes, exe_ctx);
5374 if (!num_children_or_err)
5375 return num_children_or_err;
5376 num_pointee_children = *num_children_or_err;
5377 }
5378 if (num_pointee_children == 0) {
5379 // We have a pointer to a pointee type that claims it has no children. We
5380 // will want to look at
5381 num_children = GetNumPointeeChildren(pointee_type);
5382 } else
5383 num_children = num_pointee_children;
5384 } break;
5385
5386 default:
5387 break;
5388 }
5389 return num_children;
5390}
5391
5392CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetBuiltinTypeByName(ConstString name) {
5393 StringRef name_ref = name.GetStringRef();
5394 // We compile the regex only the type name fulfills certain
5395 // necessary conditions. Otherwise we do not bother.
5396 if (name_ref.consume_front("unsigned _BitInt(") ||
5397 name_ref.consume_front("_BitInt(")) {
5398 uint64_t bit_size;
5399 if (name_ref.consumeInteger(/*Radix=*/10, bit_size))
5400 return {};
5401
5402 if (!name_ref.consume_front(")"))
5403 return {};
5404
5405 return GetType(getASTContext().getBitIntType(
5406 name.GetStringRef().starts_with("unsigned"), bit_size));
5407 }
5408 return GetBasicType(GetBasicTypeEnumeration(name));
5409}
5410
5411lldb::BasicType
5412TypeSystemClang::GetBasicTypeEnumeration(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
5413 if (type) {
5414 clang::QualType qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
5415 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5416 if (type_class == clang::Type::Builtin) {
5417 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind()) {
5418 case clang::BuiltinType::Void:
5419 return eBasicTypeVoid;
5420 case clang::BuiltinType::Bool:
5421 return eBasicTypeBool;
5422 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_S:
5423 return eBasicTypeSignedChar;
5424 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_U:
5425 return eBasicTypeUnsignedChar;
5426 case clang::BuiltinType::Char8:
5427 return eBasicTypeChar8;
5428 case clang::BuiltinType::Char16:
5429 return eBasicTypeChar16;
5430 case clang::BuiltinType::Char32:
5431 return eBasicTypeChar32;
5432 case clang::BuiltinType::UChar:
5433 return eBasicTypeUnsignedChar;
5434 case clang::BuiltinType::SChar:
5435 return eBasicTypeSignedChar;
5436 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_S:
5437 return eBasicTypeSignedWChar;
5438 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_U:
5439 return eBasicTypeUnsignedWChar;
5440 case clang::BuiltinType::Short:
5441 return eBasicTypeShort;
5442 case clang::BuiltinType::UShort:
5443 return eBasicTypeUnsignedShort;
5444 case clang::BuiltinType::Int:
5445 return eBasicTypeInt;
5446 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt:
5447 return eBasicTypeUnsignedInt;
5448 case clang::BuiltinType::Long:
5449 return eBasicTypeLong;
5450 case clang::BuiltinType::ULong:
5451 return eBasicTypeUnsignedLong;
5452 case clang::BuiltinType::LongLong:
5453 return eBasicTypeLongLong;
5454 case clang::BuiltinType::ULongLong:
5455 return eBasicTypeUnsignedLongLong;
5456 case clang::BuiltinType::Int128:
5457 return eBasicTypeInt128;
5458 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt128:
5459 return eBasicTypeUnsignedInt128;
5460
5461 case clang::BuiltinType::Half:
5462 return eBasicTypeHalf;
5463 case clang::BuiltinType::Float:
5464 return eBasicTypeFloat;
5465 case clang::BuiltinType::Double:
5466 return eBasicTypeDouble;
5467 case clang::BuiltinType::LongDouble:
5468 return eBasicTypeLongDouble;
5469 case clang::BuiltinType::Float128:
5470 return eBasicTypeFloat128;
5471
5472 case clang::BuiltinType::NullPtr:
5473 return eBasicTypeNullPtr;
5474 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId:
5475 return eBasicTypeObjCID;
5476 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass:
5477 return eBasicTypeObjCClass;
5478 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCSel:
5479 return eBasicTypeObjCSel;
5480 default:
5481 return eBasicTypeOther;
5482 }
5483 }
5484 }
5485 return eBasicTypeInvalid;
5486}
5487
5488void TypeSystemClang::ForEachEnumerator(
5489 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
5490 std::function<bool(const CompilerType &integer_type,
5491 ConstString name,
5492 const llvm::APSInt &value)> const &callback) {
5493 const clang::EnumType *enum_type =
5494 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::EnumType>(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
5495 if (enum_type) {
5496 const clang::EnumDecl *enum_decl =
5497 enum_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
5498 if (enum_decl) {
5499 CompilerType integer_type = GetType(enum_decl->getIntegerType());
5500
5501 clang::EnumDecl::enumerator_iterator enum_pos, enum_end_pos;
5502 for (enum_pos = enum_decl->enumerator_begin(),
5503 enum_end_pos = enum_decl->enumerator_end();
5504 enum_pos != enum_end_pos; ++enum_pos) {
5505 ConstString name(enum_pos->getNameAsString().c_str());
5506 if (!callback(integer_type, name, enum_pos->getInitVal()))
5507 break;
5508 }
5509 }
5510 }
5511}
5512
5513#pragma mark Aggregate Types
5514
5515uint32_t TypeSystemClang::GetNumFields(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
5516 if (!type)
5517 return 0;
5518
5519 uint32_t count = 0;
5520 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
5521 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5522 switch (type_class) {
5523 case clang::Type::Record:
5524 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5525 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
5526 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
5527 if (record_type) {
5528 clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
5529 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinition();
5530 if (record_decl) {
5531 count = std::distance(record_decl->field_begin(),
5532 record_decl->field_end());
5533 }
5534 }
5535 }
5536 break;
5537
5538 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer: {
5539 const clang::ObjCObjectPointerType *objc_class_type =
5540 qual_type->castAs<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>();
5541 const clang::ObjCInterfaceType *objc_interface_type =
5542 objc_class_type->getInterfaceType();
5543 if (objc_interface_type &&
5544 GetCompleteType(static_cast<lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t>(
5545 const_cast<clang::ObjCInterfaceType *>(objc_interface_type)))) {
5546 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5547 objc_interface_type->getDecl();
5548 if (class_interface_decl) {
5549 count = class_interface_decl->ivar_size();
5550 }
5551 }
5552 break;
5553 }
5554
5555 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
5556 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
5557 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5558 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
5559 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
5560 if (objc_class_type) {
5561 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5562 objc_class_type->getInterface();
5563
5564 if (class_interface_decl)
5565 count = class_interface_decl->ivar_size();
5566 }
5567 }
5568 break;
5569
5570 default:
5571 break;
5572 }
5573 return count;
5574}
5575
5576static lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t
5577GetObjCFieldAtIndex(clang::ASTContext *ast,
5578 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl, size_t idx,
5579 std::string &name, uint64_t *bit_offset_ptr,
5580 uint32_t *bitfield_bit_size_ptr, bool *is_bitfield_ptr) {
5581 if (class_interface_decl) {
5582 if (idx < (class_interface_decl->ivar_size())) {
5583 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl::ivar_iterator ivar_pos,
5584 ivar_end = class_interface_decl->ivar_end();
5585 uint32_t ivar_idx = 0;
5586
5587 for (ivar_pos = class_interface_decl->ivar_begin(); ivar_pos != ivar_end;
5588 ++ivar_pos, ++ivar_idx) {
5589 if (ivar_idx == idx) {
5590 const clang::ObjCIvarDecl *ivar_decl = *ivar_pos;
5591
5592 clang::QualType ivar_qual_type(ivar_decl->getType());
5593
5594 name.assign(ivar_decl->getNameAsString());
5595
5596 if (bit_offset_ptr) {
5597 const clang::ASTRecordLayout &interface_layout =
5598 ast->getASTObjCInterfaceLayout(class_interface_decl);
5599 *bit_offset_ptr = interface_layout.getFieldOffset(ivar_idx);
5600 }
5601
5602 const bool is_bitfield = ivar_pos->isBitField();
5603
5604 if (bitfield_bit_size_ptr) {
5605 *bitfield_bit_size_ptr = 0;
5606
5607 if (is_bitfield && ast) {
5608 clang::Expr *bitfield_bit_size_expr = ivar_pos->getBitWidth();
5609 clang::Expr::EvalResult result;
5610 if (bitfield_bit_size_expr &&
5611 bitfield_bit_size_expr->EvaluateAsInt(result, *ast)) {
5612 llvm::APSInt bitfield_apsint = result.Val.getInt();
5613 *bitfield_bit_size_ptr = bitfield_apsint.getLimitedValue();
5614 }
5615 }
5616 }
5617 if (is_bitfield_ptr)
5618 *is_bitfield_ptr = is_bitfield;
5619
5620 return ivar_qual_type.getAsOpaquePtr();
5621 }
5622 }
5623 }
5624 }
5625 return nullptr;
5626}
5627
5628CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetFieldAtIndex(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
5629 size_t idx, std::string &name,
5630 uint64_t *bit_offset_ptr,
5631 uint32_t *bitfield_bit_size_ptr,
5632 bool *is_bitfield_ptr) {
5633 if (!type)
5634 return CompilerType();
5635
5636 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
5637 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5638 switch (type_class) {
5639 case clang::Type::Record:
5640 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5641 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
5642 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
5643 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
5644 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
5645 uint32_t field_idx = 0;
5646 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator field, field_end;
5647 for (field = record_decl->field_begin(),
5648 field_end = record_decl->field_end();
5649 field != field_end; ++field, ++field_idx) {
5650 if (idx == field_idx) {
5651 // Print the member type if requested
5652 // Print the member name and equal sign
5653 name.assign(field->getNameAsString());
5654
5655 // Figure out the type byte size (field_type_info.first) and
5656 // alignment (field_type_info.second) from the AST context.
5657 if (bit_offset_ptr) {
5658 const clang::ASTRecordLayout &record_layout =
5659 getASTContext().getASTRecordLayout(record_decl);
5660 *bit_offset_ptr = record_layout.getFieldOffset(field_idx);
5661 }
5662
5663 const bool is_bitfield = field->isBitField();
5664
5665 if (bitfield_bit_size_ptr) {
5666 *bitfield_bit_size_ptr = 0;
5667
5668 if (is_bitfield) {
5669 clang::Expr *bitfield_bit_size_expr = field->getBitWidth();
5670 clang::Expr::EvalResult result;
5671 if (bitfield_bit_size_expr &&
5672 bitfield_bit_size_expr->EvaluateAsInt(result,
5673 getASTContext())) {
5674 llvm::APSInt bitfield_apsint = result.Val.getInt();
5675 *bitfield_bit_size_ptr = bitfield_apsint.getLimitedValue();
5676 }
5677 }
5678 }
5679 if (is_bitfield_ptr)
5680 *is_bitfield_ptr = is_bitfield;
5681
5682 return GetType(field->getType());
5683 }
5684 }
5685 }
5686 break;
5687
5688 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer: {
5689 const clang::ObjCObjectPointerType *objc_class_type =
5690 qual_type->castAs<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>();
5691 const clang::ObjCInterfaceType *objc_interface_type =
5692 objc_class_type->getInterfaceType();
5693 if (objc_interface_type &&
5694 GetCompleteType(static_cast<lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t>(
5695 const_cast<clang::ObjCInterfaceType *>(objc_interface_type)))) {
5696 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5697 objc_interface_type->getDecl();
5698 if (class_interface_decl) {
5699 return CompilerType(
5700 weak_from_this(),
5701 GetObjCFieldAtIndex(&getASTContext(), class_interface_decl, idx,
5702 name, bit_offset_ptr, bitfield_bit_size_ptr,
5703 is_bitfield_ptr));
5704 }
5705 }
5706 break;
5707 }
5708
5709 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
5710 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
5711 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5712 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
5713 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
5714 assert(objc_class_type);
5715 if (objc_class_type) {
5716 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5717 objc_class_type->getInterface();
5718 return CompilerType(
5719 weak_from_this(),
5720 GetObjCFieldAtIndex(&getASTContext(), class_interface_decl, idx,
5721 name, bit_offset_ptr, bitfield_bit_size_ptr,
5722 is_bitfield_ptr));
5723 }
5724 }
5725 break;
5726
5727 default:
5728 break;
5729 }
5730 return CompilerType();
5731}
5732
5733uint32_t
5734TypeSystemClang::GetNumDirectBaseClasses(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
5735 uint32_t count = 0;
5736 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
5737 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5738 switch (type_class) {
5739 case clang::Type::Record:
5740 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5741 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
5742 qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
5743 if (cxx_record_decl)
5744 count = cxx_record_decl->getNumBases();
5745 }
5746 break;
5747
5748 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
5749 count = GetPointeeType(type).GetNumDirectBaseClasses();
5750 break;
5751
5752 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
5753 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5754 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
5755 qual_type->getAsObjCQualifiedInterfaceType();
5756 if (objc_class_type) {
5757 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5758 objc_class_type->getInterface();
5759
5760 if (class_interface_decl && class_interface_decl->getSuperClass())
5761 count = 1;
5762 }
5763 }
5764 break;
5765 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
5766 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5767 const clang::ObjCInterfaceType *objc_interface_type =
5768 qual_type->getAs<clang::ObjCInterfaceType>();
5769 if (objc_interface_type) {
5770 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5771 objc_interface_type->getInterface();
5772
5773 if (class_interface_decl && class_interface_decl->getSuperClass())
5774 count = 1;
5775 }
5776 }
5777 break;
5778
5779 default:
5780 break;
5781 }
5782 return count;
5783}
5784
5785uint32_t
5786TypeSystemClang::GetNumVirtualBaseClasses(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
5787 uint32_t count = 0;
5788 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
5789 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5790 switch (type_class) {
5791 case clang::Type::Record:
5792 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5793 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
5794 qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
5795 if (cxx_record_decl)
5796 count = cxx_record_decl->getNumVBases();
5797 }
5798 break;
5799
5800 default:
5801 break;
5802 }
5803 return count;
5804}
5805
5806CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetDirectBaseClassAtIndex(
5807 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, size_t idx, uint32_t *bit_offset_ptr) {
5808 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
5809 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5810 switch (type_class) {
5811 case clang::Type::Record:
5812 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5813 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
5814 qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
5815 if (cxx_record_decl) {
5816 uint32_t curr_idx = 0;
5817 clang::CXXRecordDecl::base_class_const_iterator base_class,
5818 base_class_end;
5819 for (base_class = cxx_record_decl->bases_begin(),
5820 base_class_end = cxx_record_decl->bases_end();
5821 base_class != base_class_end; ++base_class, ++curr_idx) {
5822 if (curr_idx == idx) {
5823 if (bit_offset_ptr) {
5824 const clang::ASTRecordLayout &record_layout =
5825 getASTContext().getASTRecordLayout(cxx_record_decl);
5826 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *base_class_decl =
5827 llvm::cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(
5828 base_class->getType()
5829 ->castAs<clang::RecordType>()
5830 ->getDecl());
5831 if (base_class->isVirtual())
5832 *bit_offset_ptr =
5833 record_layout.getVBaseClassOffset(base_class_decl)
5834 .getQuantity() *
5835 8;
5836 else
5837 *bit_offset_ptr =
5838 record_layout.getBaseClassOffset(base_class_decl)
5839 .getQuantity() *
5840 8;
5841 }
5842 return GetType(base_class->getType());
5843 }
5844 }
5845 }
5846 }
5847 break;
5848
5849 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
5850 return GetPointeeType(type).GetDirectBaseClassAtIndex(idx, bit_offset_ptr);
5851
5852 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
5853 if (idx == 0 && GetCompleteType(type)) {
5854 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
5855 qual_type->getAsObjCQualifiedInterfaceType();
5856 if (objc_class_type) {
5857 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5858 objc_class_type->getInterface();
5859
5860 if (class_interface_decl) {
5861 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *superclass_interface_decl =
5862 class_interface_decl->getSuperClass();
5863 if (superclass_interface_decl) {
5864 if (bit_offset_ptr)
5865 *bit_offset_ptr = 0;
5866 return GetType(getASTContext().getObjCInterfaceType(
5867 superclass_interface_decl));
5868 }
5869 }
5870 }
5871 }
5872 break;
5873 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
5874 if (idx == 0 && GetCompleteType(type)) {
5875 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_interface_type =
5876 qual_type->getAs<clang::ObjCInterfaceType>();
5877 if (objc_interface_type) {
5878 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
5879 objc_interface_type->getInterface();
5880
5881 if (class_interface_decl) {
5882 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *superclass_interface_decl =
5883 class_interface_decl->getSuperClass();
5884 if (superclass_interface_decl) {
5885 if (bit_offset_ptr)
5886 *bit_offset_ptr = 0;
5887 return GetType(getASTContext().getObjCInterfaceType(
5888 superclass_interface_decl));
5889 }
5890 }
5891 }
5892 }
5893 break;
5894
5895 default:
5896 break;
5897 }
5898 return CompilerType();
5899}
5900
5901CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetVirtualBaseClassAtIndex(
5902 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, size_t idx, uint32_t *bit_offset_ptr) {
5903 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
5904 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5905 switch (type_class) {
5906 case clang::Type::Record:
5907 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
5908 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
5909 qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
5910 if (cxx_record_decl) {
5911 uint32_t curr_idx = 0;
5912 clang::CXXRecordDecl::base_class_const_iterator base_class,
5913 base_class_end;
5914 for (base_class = cxx_record_decl->vbases_begin(),
5915 base_class_end = cxx_record_decl->vbases_end();
5916 base_class != base_class_end; ++base_class, ++curr_idx) {
5917 if (curr_idx == idx) {
5918 if (bit_offset_ptr) {
5919 const clang::ASTRecordLayout &record_layout =
5920 getASTContext().getASTRecordLayout(cxx_record_decl);
5921 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *base_class_decl =
5922 llvm::cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(
5923 base_class->getType()
5924 ->castAs<clang::RecordType>()
5925 ->getDecl());
5926 *bit_offset_ptr =
5927 record_layout.getVBaseClassOffset(base_class_decl)
5928 .getQuantity() *
5929 8;
5930 }
5931 return GetType(base_class->getType());
5932 }
5933 }
5934 }
5935 }
5936 break;
5937
5938 default:
5939 break;
5940 }
5941 return CompilerType();
5942}
5943
5944CompilerDecl
5945TypeSystemClang::GetStaticFieldWithName(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
5946 llvm::StringRef name) {
5947 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
5948 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
5949 case clang::Type::Record: {
5950 if (!GetCompleteType(type))
5951 return CompilerDecl();
5952
5953 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
5954 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
5955 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
5956 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
5957
5958 clang::DeclarationName decl_name(&getASTContext().Idents.get(name));
5959 for (NamedDecl *decl : record_decl->lookup(decl_name)) {
5960 auto *var_decl = dyn_cast<clang::VarDecl>(decl);
5961 if (!var_decl || var_decl->getStorageClass() != clang::SC_Static)
5962 continue;
5963
5964 return CompilerDecl(this, var_decl);
5965 }
5966 break;
5967 }
5968
5969 default:
5970 break;
5971 }
5972 return CompilerDecl();
5973}
5974
5975// If a pointer to a pointee type (the clang_type arg) says that it has no
5976// children, then we either need to trust it, or override it and return a
5977// different result. For example, an "int *" has one child that is an integer,
5978// but a function pointer doesn't have any children. Likewise if a Record type
5979// claims it has no children, then there really is nothing to show.
5980uint32_t TypeSystemClang::GetNumPointeeChildren(clang::QualType type) {
5981 if (type.isNull())
5982 return 0;
5983
5984 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(type.getCanonicalType());
5985 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
5986 switch (type_class) {
5987 case clang::Type::Builtin:
5988 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(qual_type)->getKind()) {
5989 case clang::BuiltinType::UnknownAny:
5990 case clang::BuiltinType::Void:
5991 case clang::BuiltinType::NullPtr:
5992 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLEvent:
5993 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dRO:
5994 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dWO:
5995 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dRW:
5996 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dArrayRO:
5997 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dArrayWO:
5998 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dArrayRW:
5999 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dBufferRO:
6000 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dBufferWO:
6001 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage1dBufferRW:
6002 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage2dRO:
6003 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage2dWO:
6004 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage2dRW:
6005 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage2dArrayRO:
6006 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage2dArrayWO:
6007 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage2dArrayRW:
6008 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage3dRO:
6009 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage3dWO:
6010 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLImage3dRW:
6011 case clang::BuiltinType::OCLSampler:
6012 case clang::BuiltinType::HLSLResource:
6013 return 0;
6014 case clang::BuiltinType::Bool:
6015 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_U:
6016 case clang::BuiltinType::UChar:
6017 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_U:
6018 case clang::BuiltinType::Char16:
6019 case clang::BuiltinType::Char32:
6020 case clang::BuiltinType::UShort:
6021 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt:
6022 case clang::BuiltinType::ULong:
6023 case clang::BuiltinType::ULongLong:
6024 case clang::BuiltinType::UInt128:
6025 case clang::BuiltinType::Char_S:
6026 case clang::BuiltinType::SChar:
6027 case clang::BuiltinType::WChar_S:
6028 case clang::BuiltinType::Short:
6029 case clang::BuiltinType::Int:
6030 case clang::BuiltinType::Long:
6031 case clang::BuiltinType::LongLong:
6032 case clang::BuiltinType::Int128:
6033 case clang::BuiltinType::Float:
6034 case clang::BuiltinType::Double:
6035 case clang::BuiltinType::LongDouble:
6036 case clang::BuiltinType::Float128:
6037 case clang::BuiltinType::Dependent:
6038 case clang::BuiltinType::Overload:
6039 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId:
6040 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass:
6041 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCSel:
6042 case clang::BuiltinType::BoundMember:
6043 case clang::BuiltinType::Half:
6044 case clang::BuiltinType::ARCUnbridgedCast:
6045 case clang::BuiltinType::PseudoObject:
6046 case clang::BuiltinType::BuiltinFn:
6047 case clang::BuiltinType::ArraySection:
6048 return 1;
6049 default:
6050 return 0;
6051 }
6052 break;
6053
6054 case clang::Type::Complex:
6055 return 1;
6056 case clang::Type::Pointer:
6057 return 1;
6058 case clang::Type::BlockPointer:
6059 return 0; // If block pointers don't have debug info, then no children for
6060 // them
6061 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
6062 return 1;
6063 case clang::Type::RValueReference:
6064 return 1;
6065 case clang::Type::MemberPointer:
6066 return 0;
6067 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
6068 return 0;
6069 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray:
6070 return 0;
6071 case clang::Type::VariableArray:
6072 return 0;
6073 case clang::Type::DependentSizedArray:
6074 return 0;
6075 case clang::Type::DependentSizedExtVector:
6076 return 0;
6077 case clang::Type::Vector:
6078 return 0;
6079 case clang::Type::ExtVector:
6080 return 0;
6081 case clang::Type::FunctionProto:
6082 return 0; // When we function pointers, they have no children...
6083 case clang::Type::FunctionNoProto:
6084 return 0; // When we function pointers, they have no children...
6085 case clang::Type::UnresolvedUsing:
6086 return 0;
6087 case clang::Type::Record:
6088 return 0;
6089 case clang::Type::Enum:
6090 return 1;
6091 case clang::Type::TemplateTypeParm:
6092 return 1;
6093 case clang::Type::SubstTemplateTypeParm:
6094 return 1;
6095 case clang::Type::TemplateSpecialization:
6096 return 1;
6097 case clang::Type::InjectedClassName:
6098 return 0;
6099 case clang::Type::DependentName:
6100 return 1;
6101 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
6102 return 0;
6103 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
6104 return 0;
6105 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer:
6106 return 1;
6107 default:
6108 break;
6109 }
6110 return 0;
6111}
6112
6113llvm::Expected<CompilerType> TypeSystemClang::GetDereferencedType(
6114 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, ExecutionContext *exe_ctx,
6115 std::string &deref_name, uint32_t &deref_byte_size,
6116 int32_t &deref_byte_offset, ValueObject *valobj, uint64_t &language_flags) {
6117 bool type_valid = IsPointerOrReferenceType(type, nullptr) ||
6118 IsArrayType(type, nullptr, nullptr, nullptr);
6119 if (!type_valid)
6120 return llvm::createStringError("not a pointer, reference or array type");
6121 uint32_t child_bitfield_bit_size = 0;
6122 uint32_t child_bitfield_bit_offset = 0;
6123 bool child_is_base_class;
6124 bool child_is_deref_of_parent;
6125 return GetChildCompilerTypeAtIndex(
6126 type, exe_ctx, 0, false, true, false, deref_name, deref_byte_size,
6127 deref_byte_offset, child_bitfield_bit_size, child_bitfield_bit_offset,
6128 child_is_base_class, child_is_deref_of_parent, valobj, language_flags);
6129}
6130
6131llvm::Expected<CompilerType> TypeSystemClang::GetChildCompilerTypeAtIndex(
6132 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, ExecutionContext *exe_ctx, size_t idx,
6133 bool transparent_pointers, bool omit_empty_base_classes,
6134 bool ignore_array_bounds, std::string &child_name,
6135 uint32_t &child_byte_size, int32_t &child_byte_offset,
6136 uint32_t &child_bitfield_bit_size, uint32_t &child_bitfield_bit_offset,
6137 bool &child_is_base_class, bool &child_is_deref_of_parent,
6138 ValueObject *valobj, uint64_t &language_flags) {
6139 if (!type)
6140 return llvm::createStringError("invalid type");
6141
6142 auto get_exe_scope = [&exe_ctx]() {
6143 return exe_ctx ? exe_ctx->GetBestExecutionContextScope() : nullptr;
6144 };
6145
6146 clang::QualType parent_qual_type(
6147 RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
6148 const clang::Type::TypeClass parent_type_class =
6149 parent_qual_type->getTypeClass();
6150 child_bitfield_bit_size = 0;
6151 child_bitfield_bit_offset = 0;
6152 child_is_base_class = false;
6153 language_flags = 0;
6154
6155 auto num_children_or_err =
6156 GetNumChildren(type, omit_empty_base_classes, exe_ctx);
6157 if (!num_children_or_err)
6158 return num_children_or_err.takeError();
6159
6160 const bool idx_is_valid = idx < *num_children_or_err;
6161 int32_t bit_offset;
6162 switch (parent_type_class) {
6163 case clang::Type::Builtin:
6164 if (!idx_is_valid)
6165 return llvm::createStringError("invalid index");
6166
6167 switch (llvm::cast<clang::BuiltinType>(parent_qual_type)->getKind()) {
6168 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCId:
6169 case clang::BuiltinType::ObjCClass:
6170 child_name = "isa";
6171 child_byte_size =
6172 getASTContext().getTypeSize(getASTContext().ObjCBuiltinClassTy) /
6173 CHAR_BIT;
6174 return GetType(getASTContext().ObjCBuiltinClassTy);
6175
6176 default:
6177 break;
6178 }
6179 break;
6180 case clang::Type::Record: {
6181 if (!idx_is_valid)
6182 return llvm::createStringError("invalid index");
6183 if (!GetCompleteType(type))
6184 return llvm::createStringError("cannot complete type");
6185
6186 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
6187 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(parent_qual_type.getTypePtr());
6188 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
6189 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
6190 const clang::ASTRecordLayout &record_layout =
6191 getASTContext().getASTRecordLayout(record_decl);
6192 uint32_t child_idx = 0;
6193
6194 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
6195 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(record_decl);
6196 if (cxx_record_decl) {
6197 // We might have base classes to print out first
6198 clang::CXXRecordDecl::base_class_const_iterator base_class,
6199 base_class_end;
6200 for (base_class = cxx_record_decl->bases_begin(),
6201 base_class_end = cxx_record_decl->bases_end();
6202 base_class != base_class_end; ++base_class) {
6203 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *base_class_decl = nullptr;
6204
6205 // Skip empty base classes
6206 if (omit_empty_base_classes) {
6207 base_class_decl =
6208 llvm::cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(
6209 base_class->getType()->getAs<clang::RecordType>()->getDecl())
6210 ->getDefinitionOrSelf();
6211 if (!TypeSystemClang::RecordHasFields(base_class_decl))
6212 continue;
6213 }
6214
6215 if (idx == child_idx) {
6216 if (base_class_decl == nullptr)
6217 base_class_decl = llvm::cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(
6218 base_class->getType()
6219 ->getAs<clang::RecordType>()
6220 ->getDecl())
6221 ->getDefinitionOrSelf();
6222
6223 if (base_class->isVirtual()) {
6224 bool handled = false;
6225 if (valobj) {
6226 clang::VTableContextBase *vtable_ctx =
6227 getASTContext().getVTableContext();
6228 if (vtable_ctx)
6229 handled = GetVBaseBitOffset(*vtable_ctx, *valobj, record_layout,
6230 cxx_record_decl, base_class_decl,
6231 bit_offset);
6232 }
6233 if (!handled)
6234 bit_offset = record_layout.getVBaseClassOffset(base_class_decl)
6235 .getQuantity() *
6236 8;
6237 } else
6238 bit_offset = record_layout.getBaseClassOffset(base_class_decl)
6239 .getQuantity() *
6240 8;
6241
6242 // Base classes should be a multiple of 8 bits in size
6243 child_byte_offset = bit_offset / 8;
6244 CompilerType base_class_clang_type = GetType(base_class->getType());
6245 child_name = base_class_clang_type.GetTypeName().AsCString("");
6246 auto size_or_err = base_class_clang_type.GetBitSize(get_exe_scope());
6247 if (!size_or_err)
6248 return llvm::joinErrors(
6249 llvm::createStringError("no size info for base class"),
6250 size_or_err.takeError());
6251
6252 uint64_t base_class_clang_type_bit_size = *size_or_err;
6253
6254 // Base classes bit sizes should be a multiple of 8 bits in size
6255 assert(base_class_clang_type_bit_size % 8 == 0);
6256 child_byte_size = base_class_clang_type_bit_size / 8;
6257 child_is_base_class = true;
6258 return base_class_clang_type;
6259 }
6260 // We don't increment the child index in the for loop since we might
6261 // be skipping empty base classes
6262 ++child_idx;
6263 }
6264 }
6265 // Make sure index is in range...
6266 uint32_t field_idx = 0;
6267 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator field, field_end;
6268 for (field = record_decl->field_begin(),
6269 field_end = record_decl->field_end();
6270 field != field_end; ++field, ++field_idx, ++child_idx) {
6271 if (idx == child_idx) {
6272 // Print the member type if requested
6273 // Print the member name and equal sign
6274 child_name.assign(field->getNameAsString());
6275
6276 // Figure out the type byte size (field_type_info.first) and
6277 // alignment (field_type_info.second) from the AST context.
6278 CompilerType field_clang_type = GetType(field->getType());
6279 assert(field_idx < record_layout.getFieldCount());
6280 auto size_or_err = field_clang_type.GetByteSize(get_exe_scope());
6281 if (!size_or_err)
6282 return llvm::joinErrors(
6283 llvm::createStringError("no size info for field"),
6284 size_or_err.takeError());
6285
6286 child_byte_size = *size_or_err;
6287 const uint32_t child_bit_size = child_byte_size * 8;
6288
6289 // Figure out the field offset within the current struct/union/class
6290 // type
6291 bit_offset = record_layout.getFieldOffset(field_idx);
6292 if (FieldIsBitfield(*field, child_bitfield_bit_size)) {
6293 child_bitfield_bit_offset = bit_offset % child_bit_size;
6294 const uint32_t child_bit_offset =
6295 bit_offset - child_bitfield_bit_offset;
6296 child_byte_offset = child_bit_offset / 8;
6297 } else {
6298 child_byte_offset = bit_offset / 8;
6299 }
6300
6301 return field_clang_type;
6302 }
6303 }
6304 } break;
6305 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
6306 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface: {
6307 if (!idx_is_valid)
6308 return llvm::createStringError("invalid index");
6309 if (!GetCompleteType(type))
6310 return llvm::createStringError("cannot complete type");
6311
6312 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
6313 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(parent_qual_type.getTypePtr());
6314 assert(objc_class_type);
6315 if (!objc_class_type)
6316 return llvm::createStringError("unexpected object type");
6317
6318 uint32_t child_idx = 0;
6319 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
6320 objc_class_type->getInterface();
6321
6322 if (!class_interface_decl)
6323 return llvm::createStringError("cannot get interface decl");
6324
6325 const clang::ASTRecordLayout &interface_layout =
6326 getASTContext().getASTObjCInterfaceLayout(class_interface_decl);
6327 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *superclass_interface_decl =
6328 class_interface_decl->getSuperClass();
6329 if (superclass_interface_decl) {
6330 if (omit_empty_base_classes) {
6331 CompilerType base_class_clang_type = GetType(
6332 getASTContext().getObjCInterfaceType(superclass_interface_decl));
6333 if (llvm::expectedToStdOptional(base_class_clang_type.GetNumChildren(
6334 omit_empty_base_classes, exe_ctx))
6335 .value_or(0) > 0) {
6336 if (idx == 0) {
6337 clang::QualType ivar_qual_type(getASTContext().getObjCInterfaceType(
6338 superclass_interface_decl));
6339
6340 child_name.assign(superclass_interface_decl->getNameAsString());
6341
6342 clang::TypeInfo ivar_type_info =
6343 getASTContext().getTypeInfo(ivar_qual_type.getTypePtr());
6344
6345 child_byte_size = ivar_type_info.Width / 8;
6346 child_byte_offset = 0;
6347 child_is_base_class = true;
6348
6349 return GetType(ivar_qual_type);
6350 }
6351
6352 ++child_idx;
6353 }
6354 } else
6355 ++child_idx;
6356 }
6357
6358 const uint32_t superclass_idx = child_idx;
6359
6360 if (idx < (child_idx + class_interface_decl->ivar_size())) {
6361 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl::ivar_iterator ivar_pos,
6362 ivar_end = class_interface_decl->ivar_end();
6363
6364 for (ivar_pos = class_interface_decl->ivar_begin(); ivar_pos != ivar_end;
6365 ++ivar_pos) {
6366 if (child_idx == idx) {
6367 clang::ObjCIvarDecl *ivar_decl = *ivar_pos;
6368
6369 clang::QualType ivar_qual_type(ivar_decl->getType());
6370
6371 child_name.assign(ivar_decl->getNameAsString());
6372
6373 clang::TypeInfo ivar_type_info =
6374 getASTContext().getTypeInfo(ivar_qual_type.getTypePtr());
6375
6376 child_byte_size = ivar_type_info.Width / 8;
6377
6378 // Figure out the field offset within the current
6379 // struct/union/class type For ObjC objects, we can't trust the
6380 // bit offset we get from the Clang AST, since that doesn't
6381 // account for the space taken up by unbacked properties, or
6382 // from the changing size of base classes that are newer than
6383 // this class. So if we have a process around that we can ask
6384 // about this object, do so.
6385 child_byte_offset = LLDB_INVALID_IVAR_OFFSET;
6386 Process *process = nullptr;
6387 if (exe_ctx)
6388 process = exe_ctx->GetProcessPtr();
6389 if (process) {
6390 ObjCLanguageRuntime *objc_runtime =
6391 ObjCLanguageRuntime::Get(*process);
6392 if (objc_runtime != nullptr) {
6393 CompilerType parent_ast_type = GetType(parent_qual_type);
6394 child_byte_offset = objc_runtime->GetByteOffsetForIvar(
6395 parent_ast_type, ivar_decl->getNameAsString().c_str());
6396 }
6397 }
6398
6399 // Setting this to INT32_MAX to make sure we don't compute it
6400 // twice...
6401 bit_offset = INT32_MAX;
6402
6403 if (child_byte_offset ==
6404 static_cast<int32_t>(LLDB_INVALID_IVAR_OFFSET)) {
6405 bit_offset =
6406 interface_layout.getFieldOffset(child_idx - superclass_idx);
6407 child_byte_offset = bit_offset / 8;
6408 }
6409
6410 // Note, the ObjC Ivar Byte offset is just that, it doesn't
6411 // account for the bit offset of a bitfield within its
6412 // containing object. So regardless of where we get the byte
6413 // offset from, we still need to get the bit offset for
6414 // bitfields from the layout.
6415
6416 if (FieldIsBitfield(ivar_decl, child_bitfield_bit_size)) {
6417 if (bit_offset == INT32_MAX)
6418 bit_offset =
6419 interface_layout.getFieldOffset(child_idx - superclass_idx);
6420
6421 child_bitfield_bit_offset = bit_offset % 8;
6422 }
6423 return GetType(ivar_qual_type);
6424 }
6425 ++child_idx;
6426 }
6427 }
6428 } break;
6429
6430 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer: {
6431 if (!idx_is_valid)
6432 return llvm::createStringError("invalid index");
6433 CompilerType pointee_clang_type(GetPointeeType(type));
6434
6435 if (transparent_pointers && pointee_clang_type.IsAggregateType()) {
6436 child_is_deref_of_parent = false;
6437 bool tmp_child_is_deref_of_parent = false;
6438 return pointee_clang_type.GetChildCompilerTypeAtIndex(
6439 exe_ctx, idx, transparent_pointers, omit_empty_base_classes,
6440 ignore_array_bounds, child_name, child_byte_size, child_byte_offset,
6441 child_bitfield_bit_size, child_bitfield_bit_offset,
6442 child_is_base_class, tmp_child_is_deref_of_parent, valobj,
6443 language_flags);
6444 } else {
6445 child_is_deref_of_parent = true;
6446 const char *parent_name =
6447 valobj ? valobj->GetName().GetCString() : nullptr;
6448 if (parent_name) {
6449 child_name.assign(1, '*');
6450 child_name += parent_name;
6451 }
6452
6453 // We have a pointer to an simple type
6454 if (idx == 0 && pointee_clang_type.GetCompleteType()) {
6455 auto size_or_err = pointee_clang_type.GetByteSize(get_exe_scope());
6456 if (!size_or_err)
6457 return size_or_err.takeError();
6458 child_byte_size = *size_or_err;
6459 child_byte_offset = 0;
6460 return pointee_clang_type;
6461 }
6462 }
6463 } break;
6464
6465 case clang::Type::Vector:
6466 case clang::Type::ExtVector: {
6467 if (!idx_is_valid)
6468 return llvm::createStringError("invalid index");
6469 const clang::VectorType *array =
6470 llvm::cast<clang::VectorType>(parent_qual_type.getTypePtr());
6471 if (!array)
6472 return llvm::createStringError("unexpected vector type");
6473
6474 CompilerType element_type = GetType(array->getElementType());
6475 if (!element_type.GetCompleteType())
6476 return llvm::createStringError("cannot complete type");
6477
6478 char element_name[64];
6479 ::snprintf(element_name, sizeof(element_name), "[%" PRIu64 "]",
6480 static_cast<uint64_t>(idx));
6481 child_name.assign(element_name);
6482 auto size_or_err = element_type.GetByteSize(get_exe_scope());
6483 if (!size_or_err)
6484 return size_or_err.takeError();
6485 child_byte_size = *size_or_err;
6486 child_byte_offset = (int32_t)idx * (int32_t)child_byte_size;
6487 return element_type;
6488 }
6489 case clang::Type::ConstantArray:
6490 case clang::Type::IncompleteArray: {
6491 if (!ignore_array_bounds && !idx_is_valid)
6492 return llvm::createStringError("invalid index");
6493 const clang::ArrayType *array = GetQualType(type)->getAsArrayTypeUnsafe();
6494 if (!array)
6495 return llvm::createStringError("unexpected array type");
6496 CompilerType element_type = GetType(array->getElementType());
6497 if (!element_type.GetCompleteType())
6498 return llvm::createStringError("cannot complete type");
6499
6500 child_name = std::string(llvm::formatv("[{0}]", idx));
6501 auto size_or_err = element_type.GetByteSize(get_exe_scope());
6502 if (!size_or_err)
6503 return size_or_err.takeError();
6504 child_byte_size = *size_or_err;
6505 child_byte_offset = (int32_t)idx * (int32_t)child_byte_size;
6506 return element_type;
6507 }
6508 case clang::Type::Pointer: {
6509 CompilerType pointee_clang_type(GetPointeeType(type));
6510
6511 // Don't dereference "void *" pointers
6512 if (pointee_clang_type.IsVoidType())
6513 return llvm::createStringError("cannot dereference void *");
6514
6515 if (transparent_pointers && pointee_clang_type.IsAggregateType()) {
6516 child_is_deref_of_parent = false;
6517 bool tmp_child_is_deref_of_parent = false;
6518 return pointee_clang_type.GetChildCompilerTypeAtIndex(
6519 exe_ctx, idx, transparent_pointers, omit_empty_base_classes,
6520 ignore_array_bounds, child_name, child_byte_size, child_byte_offset,
6521 child_bitfield_bit_size, child_bitfield_bit_offset,
6522 child_is_base_class, tmp_child_is_deref_of_parent, valobj,
6523 language_flags);
6524 }
6525 child_is_deref_of_parent = true;
6526
6527 const char *parent_name = valobj ? valobj->GetName().GetCString() : nullptr;
6528 if (parent_name) {
6529 child_name.assign(1, '*');
6530 child_name += parent_name;
6531 }
6532
6533 // We have a pointer to an simple type
6534 if (idx == 0) {
6535 auto size_or_err = pointee_clang_type.GetByteSize(get_exe_scope());
6536 if (!size_or_err)
6537 return size_or_err.takeError();
6538 child_byte_size = *size_or_err;
6539 child_byte_offset = 0;
6540 return pointee_clang_type;
6541 }
6542 break;
6543 }
6544
6545 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
6546 case clang::Type::RValueReference: {
6547 if (!idx_is_valid)
6548 return llvm::createStringError("invalid index");
6549 const clang::ReferenceType *reference_type =
6550 llvm::cast<clang::ReferenceType>(
6551 RemoveWrappingTypes(GetQualType(type)).getTypePtr());
6552 CompilerType pointee_clang_type = GetType(reference_type->getPointeeType());
6553 if (transparent_pointers && pointee_clang_type.IsAggregateType()) {
6554 child_is_deref_of_parent = false;
6555 bool tmp_child_is_deref_of_parent = false;
6556 return pointee_clang_type.GetChildCompilerTypeAtIndex(
6557 exe_ctx, idx, transparent_pointers, omit_empty_base_classes,
6558 ignore_array_bounds, child_name, child_byte_size, child_byte_offset,
6559 child_bitfield_bit_size, child_bitfield_bit_offset,
6560 child_is_base_class, tmp_child_is_deref_of_parent, valobj,
6561 language_flags);
6562 }
6563 const char *parent_name = valobj ? valobj->GetName().GetCString() : nullptr;
6564 if (parent_name) {
6565 child_name.assign(1, '&');
6566 child_name += parent_name;
6567 }
6568
6569 // We have a pointer to an simple type
6570 if (idx == 0) {
6571 auto size_or_err = pointee_clang_type.GetByteSize(get_exe_scope());
6572 if (!size_or_err)
6573 return size_or_err.takeError();
6574 child_byte_size = *size_or_err;
6575 child_byte_offset = 0;
6576 return pointee_clang_type;
6577 }
6578 } break;
6579
6580 default:
6581 break;
6582 }
6583 return llvm::createStringError("cannot enumerate children");
6584}
6585
6586uint32_t TypeSystemClang::GetIndexForRecordBase(
6587 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl,
6588 const clang::CXXBaseSpecifier *base_spec,
6589 bool omit_empty_base_classes) {
6590 uint32_t child_idx = 0;
6591
6592 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
6593 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(record_decl);
6594
6595 if (cxx_record_decl) {
6596 clang::CXXRecordDecl::base_class_const_iterator base_class, base_class_end;
6597 for (base_class = cxx_record_decl->bases_begin(),
6598 base_class_end = cxx_record_decl->bases_end();
6599 base_class != base_class_end; ++base_class) {
6600 if (omit_empty_base_classes) {
6601 if (BaseSpecifierIsEmpty(base_class))
6602 continue;
6603 }
6604
6605 if (base_class == base_spec)
6606 return child_idx;
6607 ++child_idx;
6608 }
6609 }
6610
6611 return UINT32_MAX;
6612}
6613
6614uint32_t TypeSystemClang::GetIndexForRecordChild(
6615 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl, clang::NamedDecl *canonical_decl,
6616 bool omit_empty_base_classes) {
6617 uint32_t child_idx = TypeSystemClang::GetNumBaseClasses(
6618 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(record_decl),
6619 omit_empty_base_classes);
6620
6621 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator field, field_end;
6622 for (field = record_decl->field_begin(), field_end = record_decl->field_end();
6623 field != field_end; ++field, ++child_idx) {
6624 if (field->getCanonicalDecl() == canonical_decl)
6625 return child_idx;
6626 }
6627
6628 return UINT32_MAX;
6629}
6630
6631// Look for a child member (doesn't include base classes, but it does include
6632// their members) in the type hierarchy. Returns an index path into
6633// "clang_type" on how to reach the appropriate member.
6634//
6635// class A
6636// {
6637// public:
6638// int m_a;
6639// int m_b;
6640// };
6641//
6642// class B
6643// {
6644// };
6645//
6646// class C :
6647// public B,
6648// public A
6649// {
6650// };
6651//
6652// If we have a clang type that describes "class C", and we wanted to looked
6653// "m_b" in it:
6654//
6655// With omit_empty_base_classes == false we would get an integer array back
6656// with: { 1, 1 } The first index 1 is the child index for "class A" within
6657// class C The second index 1 is the child index for "m_b" within class A
6658//
6659// With omit_empty_base_classes == true we would get an integer array back
6660// with: { 0, 1 } The first index 0 is the child index for "class A" within
6661// class C (since class B doesn't have any members it doesn't count) The second
6662// index 1 is the child index for "m_b" within class A
6663
6664size_t TypeSystemClang::GetIndexOfChildMemberWithName(
6665 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, llvm::StringRef name,
6666 bool omit_empty_base_classes, std::vector<uint32_t> &child_indexes) {
6667 if (type && !name.empty()) {
6668 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
6669 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
6670 switch (type_class) {
6671 case clang::Type::Record:
6672 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
6673 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
6674 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
6675 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
6676 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
6677
6678 assert(record_decl);
6679 uint32_t child_idx = 0;
6680
6681 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
6682 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(record_decl);
6683
6684 // Try and find a field that matches NAME
6685 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator field, field_end;
6686 for (field = record_decl->field_begin(),
6687 field_end = record_decl->field_end();
6688 field != field_end; ++field, ++child_idx) {
6689 llvm::StringRef field_name = field->getName();
6690 if (field_name.empty()) {
6691 CompilerType field_type = GetType(field->getType());
6692 std::vector<uint32_t> save_indices = child_indexes;
6693 child_indexes.push_back(
6694 child_idx + TypeSystemClang::GetNumBaseClasses(
6695 cxx_record_decl, omit_empty_base_classes));
6696 if (field_type.GetIndexOfChildMemberWithName(
6697 name, omit_empty_base_classes, child_indexes))
6698 return child_indexes.size();
6699 child_indexes = std::move(save_indices);
6700 } else if (field_name == name) {
6701 // We have to add on the number of base classes to this index!
6702 child_indexes.push_back(
6703 child_idx + TypeSystemClang::GetNumBaseClasses(
6704 cxx_record_decl, omit_empty_base_classes));
6705 return child_indexes.size();
6706 }
6707 }
6708
6709 if (cxx_record_decl) {
6710 const clang::RecordDecl *parent_record_decl = cxx_record_decl;
6711
6712 // Didn't find things easily, lets let clang do its thang...
6713 clang::IdentifierInfo &ident_ref = getASTContext().Idents.get(name);
6714 clang::DeclarationName decl_name(&ident_ref);
6715
6716 clang::CXXBasePaths paths;
6717 if (cxx_record_decl->lookupInBases(
6718 [decl_name](const clang::CXXBaseSpecifier *specifier,
6719 clang::CXXBasePath &path) {
6720 CXXRecordDecl *record =
6721 specifier->getType()->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
6722 auto r = record->lookup(decl_name);
6723 path.Decls = r.begin();
6724 return !r.empty();
6725 },
6726 paths)) {
6727 clang::CXXBasePaths::const_paths_iterator path,
6728 path_end = paths.end();
6729 for (path = paths.begin(); path != path_end; ++path) {
6730 const size_t num_path_elements = path->size();
6731 for (size_t e = 0; e < num_path_elements; ++e) {
6732 clang::CXXBasePathElement elem = (*path)[e];
6733
6734 child_idx = GetIndexForRecordBase(parent_record_decl, elem.Base,
6735 omit_empty_base_classes);
6736 if (child_idx == UINT32_MAX) {
6737 child_indexes.clear();
6738 return 0;
6739 } else {
6740 child_indexes.push_back(child_idx);
6741 parent_record_decl = elem.Base->getType()
6742 ->castAs<clang::RecordType>()
6743 ->getDecl()
6744 ->getDefinitionOrSelf();
6745 }
6746 }
6747 for (clang::DeclContext::lookup_iterator I = path->Decls, E;
6748 I != E; ++I) {
6749 child_idx = GetIndexForRecordChild(
6750 parent_record_decl, *I, omit_empty_base_classes);
6751 if (child_idx == UINT32_MAX) {
6752 child_indexes.clear();
6753 return 0;
6754 } else {
6755 child_indexes.push_back(child_idx);
6756 }
6757 }
6758 }
6759 return child_indexes.size();
6760 }
6761 }
6762 }
6763 break;
6764
6765 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
6766 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
6767 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
6768 llvm::StringRef name_sref(name);
6769 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
6770 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
6771 assert(objc_class_type);
6772 if (objc_class_type) {
6773 uint32_t child_idx = 0;
6774 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
6775 objc_class_type->getInterface();
6776
6777 if (class_interface_decl) {
6778 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl::ivar_iterator ivar_pos,
6779 ivar_end = class_interface_decl->ivar_end();
6780 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *superclass_interface_decl =
6781 class_interface_decl->getSuperClass();
6782
6783 for (ivar_pos = class_interface_decl->ivar_begin();
6784 ivar_pos != ivar_end; ++ivar_pos, ++child_idx) {
6785 const clang::ObjCIvarDecl *ivar_decl = *ivar_pos;
6786
6787 if (ivar_decl->getName() == name_sref) {
6788 if ((!omit_empty_base_classes && superclass_interface_decl) ||
6789 (omit_empty_base_classes &&
6790 ObjCDeclHasIVars(superclass_interface_decl)))
6791 ++child_idx;
6792
6793 child_indexes.push_back(child_idx);
6794 return child_indexes.size();
6795 }
6796 }
6797
6798 if (superclass_interface_decl) {
6799 // The super class index is always zero for ObjC classes, so we
6800 // push it onto the child indexes in case we find an ivar in our
6801 // superclass...
6802 child_indexes.push_back(0);
6803
6804 CompilerType superclass_clang_type =
6805 GetType(getASTContext().getObjCInterfaceType(
6806 superclass_interface_decl));
6807 if (superclass_clang_type.GetIndexOfChildMemberWithName(
6808 name, omit_empty_base_classes, child_indexes)) {
6809 // We did find an ivar in a superclass so just return the
6810 // results!
6811 return child_indexes.size();
6812 }
6813
6814 // We didn't find an ivar matching "name" in our superclass, pop
6815 // the superclass zero index that we pushed on above.
6816 child_indexes.pop_back();
6817 }
6818 }
6819 }
6820 }
6821 break;
6822
6823 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer: {
6824 CompilerType objc_object_clang_type = GetType(
6825 llvm::cast<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())
6826 ->getPointeeType());
6827 return objc_object_clang_type.GetIndexOfChildMemberWithName(
6828 name, omit_empty_base_classes, child_indexes);
6829 } break;
6830
6831 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
6832 case clang::Type::RValueReference: {
6833 const clang::ReferenceType *reference_type =
6834 llvm::cast<clang::ReferenceType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
6835 clang::QualType pointee_type(reference_type->getPointeeType());
6836 CompilerType pointee_clang_type = GetType(pointee_type);
6837
6838 if (pointee_clang_type.IsAggregateType()) {
6839 return pointee_clang_type.GetIndexOfChildMemberWithName(
6840 name, omit_empty_base_classes, child_indexes);
6841 }
6842 } break;
6843
6844 case clang::Type::Pointer: {
6845 CompilerType pointee_clang_type(GetPointeeType(type));
6846
6847 if (pointee_clang_type.IsAggregateType()) {
6848 return pointee_clang_type.GetIndexOfChildMemberWithName(
6849 name, omit_empty_base_classes, child_indexes);
6850 }
6851 } break;
6852
6853 default:
6854 break;
6855 }
6856 }
6857 return 0;
6858}
6859
6860// Get the index of the child of "clang_type" whose name matches. This function
6861// doesn't descend into the children, but only looks one level deep and name
6862// matches can include base class names.
6863
6864llvm::Expected<uint32_t>
6865TypeSystemClang::GetIndexOfChildWithName(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
6866 llvm::StringRef name,
6867 bool omit_empty_base_classes) {
6868 if (type && !name.empty()) {
6869 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
6870
6871 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
6872
6873 switch (type_class) {
6874 case clang::Type::Record:
6875 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
6876 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
6877 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
6878 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
6879 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
6880
6881 assert(record_decl);
6882 uint32_t child_idx = 0;
6883
6884 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
6885 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(record_decl);
6886
6887 if (cxx_record_decl) {
6888 clang::CXXRecordDecl::base_class_const_iterator base_class,
6889 base_class_end;
6890 for (base_class = cxx_record_decl->bases_begin(),
6891 base_class_end = cxx_record_decl->bases_end();
6892 base_class != base_class_end; ++base_class) {
6893 // Skip empty base classes
6894 clang::CXXRecordDecl *base_class_decl =
