6895 llvm::cast<clang::CXXRecordDecl>(
6896 base_class->getType()
6897 ->castAs<clang::RecordType>()
6898 ->getDecl())
6899 ->getDefinitionOrSelf();
6900 if (omit_empty_base_classes &&
6901 !TypeSystemClang::RecordHasFields(base_class_decl))
6902 continue;
6903
6904 CompilerType base_class_clang_type = GetType(base_class->getType());
6905 std::string base_class_type_name(
6906 base_class_clang_type.GetTypeName().AsCString(""));
6907 if (base_class_type_name == name)
6908 return child_idx;
6909 ++child_idx;
6910 }
6911 }
6912
6913 // Try and find a field that matches NAME
6914 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator field, field_end;
6915 for (field = record_decl->field_begin(),
6916 field_end = record_decl->field_end();
6917 field != field_end; ++field, ++child_idx) {
6918 if (field->getName() == name)
6919 return child_idx;
6920 }
6921 }
6922 break;
6923
6924 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
6925 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface:
6926 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
6927 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
6928 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
6929 assert(objc_class_type);
6930 if (objc_class_type) {
6931 uint32_t child_idx = 0;
6932 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
6933 objc_class_type->getInterface();
6934
6935 if (class_interface_decl) {
6936 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl::ivar_iterator ivar_pos,
6937 ivar_end = class_interface_decl->ivar_end();
6938 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *superclass_interface_decl =
6939 class_interface_decl->getSuperClass();
6940
6941 for (ivar_pos = class_interface_decl->ivar_begin();
6942 ivar_pos != ivar_end; ++ivar_pos, ++child_idx) {
6943 const clang::ObjCIvarDecl *ivar_decl = *ivar_pos;
6944
6945 if (ivar_decl->getName() == name) {
6946 if ((!omit_empty_base_classes && superclass_interface_decl) ||
6947 (omit_empty_base_classes &&
6948 ObjCDeclHasIVars(superclass_interface_decl)))
6949 ++child_idx;
6950
6951 return child_idx;
6952 }
6953 }
6954
6955 if (superclass_interface_decl) {
6956 if (superclass_interface_decl->getName() == name)
6957 return 0;
6958 }
6959 }
6960 }
6961 }
6962 break;
6963
6964 case clang::Type::ObjCObjectPointer: {
6965 CompilerType pointee_clang_type = GetType(
6966 llvm::cast<clang::ObjCObjectPointerType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())
6967 ->getPointeeType());
6968 return pointee_clang_type.GetIndexOfChildWithName(
6969 name, omit_empty_base_classes);
6970 } break;
6971
6972 case clang::Type::LValueReference:
6973 case clang::Type::RValueReference: {
6974 const clang::ReferenceType *reference_type =
6975 llvm::cast<clang::ReferenceType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
6976 CompilerType pointee_type = GetType(reference_type->getPointeeType());
6977
6978 if (pointee_type.IsAggregateType()) {
6979 return pointee_type.GetIndexOfChildWithName(name,
6980 omit_empty_base_classes);
6981 }
6982 } break;
6983
6984 case clang::Type::Pointer: {
6985 const clang::PointerType *pointer_type =
6986 llvm::cast<clang::PointerType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
6987 CompilerType pointee_type = GetType(pointer_type->getPointeeType());
6988
6989 if (pointee_type.IsAggregateType()) {
6990 return pointee_type.GetIndexOfChildWithName(name,
6991 omit_empty_base_classes);
6992 }
6993 } break;
6994
6995 default:
6996 break;
6997 }
6998 }
6999 return llvm::createStringError("Type has no child named '%s'",
7000 name.str().c_str());
7001}
7002
7003CompilerType
7004TypeSystemClang::GetDirectNestedTypeWithName(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
7005 llvm::StringRef name) {
7006 if (!type || name.empty())
7007 return CompilerType();
7008
7009 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
7010 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
7011
7012 switch (type_class) {
7013 case clang::Type::Record: {
7014 if (!GetCompleteType(type))
7015 return CompilerType();
7016 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
7017 llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
7018 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
7019 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
7020
7021 clang::DeclarationName decl_name(&getASTContext().Idents.get(name));
7022 for (NamedDecl *decl : record_decl->lookup(decl_name)) {
7023 if (auto *tag_decl = dyn_cast<clang::TagDecl>(decl))
7024 return GetType(getASTContext().getCanonicalTagType(tag_decl));
7025 if (auto *typedef_decl = dyn_cast<clang::TypedefNameDecl>(decl))
7026 return GetType(getASTContext().getTypedefType(
7027 ElaboratedTypeKeyword::None, /*Qualifier=*/std::nullopt,
7028 typedef_decl));
7029 }
7030 break;
7031 }
7032 default:
7033 break;
7034 }
7035 return CompilerType();
7036}
7037
7038bool TypeSystemClang::IsTemplateType(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
7039 if (!type)
7040 return false;
7041 CompilerType ct(weak_from_this(), type);
7042 const clang::Type *clang_type = ClangUtil::GetQualType(ct).getTypePtr();
7043 if (auto *cxx_record_decl = dyn_cast<clang::TagType>(clang_type))
7044 return isa<clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl>(
7045 cxx_record_decl->getDecl());
7046 return false;
7047}
7048
7049size_t
7050TypeSystemClang::GetNumTemplateArguments(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
7051 bool expand_pack) {
7052 if (!type)
7053 return 0;
7054
7055 clang::QualType qual_type = RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
7056 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
7057 switch (type_class) {
7058 case clang::Type::Record:
7059 if (GetCompleteType(type)) {
7060 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
7061 qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
7062 if (cxx_record_decl) {
7063 const clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl *template_decl =
7064 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl>(
7065 cxx_record_decl);
7066 if (template_decl) {
7067 const auto &template_arg_list = template_decl->getTemplateArgs();
7068 size_t num_args = template_arg_list.size();
7069 assert(num_args && "template specialization without any args");
7070 if (expand_pack && num_args) {
7071 const auto &pack = template_arg_list[num_args - 1];
7072 if (pack.getKind() == clang::TemplateArgument::Pack)
7073 num_args += pack.pack_size() - 1;
7074 }
7075 return num_args;
7076 }
7077 }
7078 }
7079 break;
7080
7081 default:
7082 break;
7083 }
7084
7085 return 0;
7086}
7087
7088const clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl *
7089TypeSystemClang::GetAsTemplateSpecialization(
7090 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
7091 if (!type)
7092 return nullptr;
7093
7094 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
7095 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
7096 switch (type_class) {
7097 case clang::Type::Record: {
7098 if (! GetCompleteType(type))
7099 return nullptr;
7100 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
7101 qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
7102 if (!cxx_record_decl)
7103 return nullptr;
7104 return llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl>(
7105 cxx_record_decl);
7106 }
7107
7108 default:
7109 return nullptr;
7110 }
7111}
7112
7113const TemplateArgument *
7114GetNthTemplateArgument(const clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl *decl,
7115 size_t idx, bool expand_pack) {
7116 const auto &args = decl->getTemplateArgs();
7117 const size_t args_size = args.size();
7118
7119 assert(args_size && "template specialization without any args");
7120 if (!args_size)
7121 return nullptr;
7122
7123 const size_t last_idx = args_size - 1;
7124
7125 // We're asked for a template argument that can't be a parameter pack, so
7126 // return it without worrying about 'expand_pack'.
7127 if (idx < last_idx)
7128 return &args[idx];
7129
7130 // We're asked for the last template argument but we don't want/need to
7131 // expand it.
7132 if (!expand_pack || args[last_idx].getKind() != clang::TemplateArgument::Pack)
7133 return idx >= args.size() ? nullptr : &args[idx];
7134
7135 // Index into the expanded pack.
7136 // Note that 'idx' counts from the beginning of all template arguments
7137 // (including the ones preceding the parameter pack).
7138 const auto &pack = args[last_idx];
7139 const size_t pack_idx = idx - last_idx;
7140 if (pack_idx >= pack.pack_size())
7141 return nullptr;
7142 return &pack.pack_elements()[pack_idx];
7143}
7144
7145lldb::TemplateArgumentKind
7146TypeSystemClang::GetTemplateArgumentKind(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
7147 size_t arg_idx, bool expand_pack) {
7148 const clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl *template_decl =
7149 GetAsTemplateSpecialization(type);
7150 if (!template_decl)
7151 return eTemplateArgumentKindNull;
7152
7153 const auto *arg = GetNthTemplateArgument(template_decl, arg_idx, expand_pack);
7154 if (!arg)
7155 return eTemplateArgumentKindNull;
7156
7157 switch (arg->getKind()) {
7158 case clang::TemplateArgument::Null:
7159 return eTemplateArgumentKindNull;
7160
7161 case clang::TemplateArgument::NullPtr:
7162 return eTemplateArgumentKindNullPtr;
7163
7164 case clang::TemplateArgument::Type:
7165 return eTemplateArgumentKindType;
7166
7167 case clang::TemplateArgument::Declaration:
7168 return eTemplateArgumentKindDeclaration;
7169
7170 case clang::TemplateArgument::Integral:
7171 return eTemplateArgumentKindIntegral;
7172
7173 case clang::TemplateArgument::Template:
7174 return eTemplateArgumentKindTemplate;
7175
7176 case clang::TemplateArgument::TemplateExpansion:
7177 return eTemplateArgumentKindTemplateExpansion;
7178
7179 case clang::TemplateArgument::Expression:
7180 return eTemplateArgumentKindExpression;
7181
7182 case clang::TemplateArgument::Pack:
7183 return eTemplateArgumentKindPack;
7184
7185 case clang::TemplateArgument::StructuralValue:
7186 return eTemplateArgumentKindStructuralValue;
7187 }
7188 llvm_unreachable("Unhandled clang::TemplateArgument::ArgKind");
7189}
7190
7191CompilerType
7192TypeSystemClang::GetTypeTemplateArgument(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
7193 size_t idx, bool expand_pack) {
7194 const clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl *template_decl =
7195 GetAsTemplateSpecialization(type);
7196 if (!template_decl)
7197 return CompilerType();
7198
7199 const auto *arg = GetNthTemplateArgument(template_decl, idx, expand_pack);
7200 if (!arg || arg->getKind() != clang::TemplateArgument::Type)
7201 return CompilerType();
7202
7203 return GetType(arg->getAsType());
7204}
7205
7206std::optional<CompilerType::IntegralTemplateArgument>
7207TypeSystemClang::GetIntegralTemplateArgument(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
7208 size_t idx, bool expand_pack) {
7209 const clang::ClassTemplateSpecializationDecl *template_decl =
7210 GetAsTemplateSpecialization(type);
7211 if (!template_decl)
7212 return std::nullopt;
7213
7214 const auto *arg = GetNthTemplateArgument(template_decl, idx, expand_pack);
7215 if (!arg)
7216 return std::nullopt;
7217
7218 switch (arg->getKind()) {
7219 case clang::TemplateArgument::Integral:
7220 return {{arg->getAsIntegral(), GetType(arg->getIntegralType())}};
7221 case clang::TemplateArgument::StructuralValue: {
7222 clang::APValue value = arg->getAsStructuralValue();
7223 CompilerType type = GetType(arg->getStructuralValueType());
7224
7225 if (value.isFloat())
7226 return {{value.getFloat(), type}};
7227
7228 if (value.isInt())
7229 return {{value.getInt(), type}};
7230
7231 return std::nullopt;
7232 }
7233 default:
7234 return std::nullopt;
7235 }
7236}
7237
7238CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetTypeForFormatters(void *type) {
7239 if (type)
7240 return ClangUtil::RemoveFastQualifiers(CompilerType(weak_from_this(), type));
7241 return CompilerType();
7242}
7243
7244bool TypeSystemClang::IsPromotableIntegerType(
7245 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
7246 // Unscoped enums are always considered as promotable, even if their
7247 // underlying type does not need to be promoted (e.g. "int").
7248 bool is_signed = false;
7249 bool isUnscopedEnumerationType =
7250 IsEnumerationType(type, is_signed) && !IsScopedEnumerationType(type);
7251 if (isUnscopedEnumerationType)
7252 return true;
7253
7254 switch (GetBasicTypeEnumeration(type)) {
7255 case lldb::eBasicTypeBool:
7256 case lldb::eBasicTypeChar:
7257 case lldb::eBasicTypeSignedChar:
7258 case lldb::eBasicTypeUnsignedChar:
7259 case lldb::eBasicTypeShort:
7260 case lldb::eBasicTypeUnsignedShort:
7261 case lldb::eBasicTypeWChar:
7262 case lldb::eBasicTypeSignedWChar:
7263 case lldb::eBasicTypeUnsignedWChar:
7264 case lldb::eBasicTypeChar16:
7265 case lldb::eBasicTypeChar32:
7266 return true;
7267
7268 default:
7269 return false;
7270 }
7271
7272 llvm_unreachable("All cases handled above.");
7273}
7274
7275llvm::Expected<CompilerType>
7276TypeSystemClang::DoIntegralPromotion(CompilerType from,
7277 ExecutionContextScope *exe_scope) {
7278 if (!from.IsInteger() && !from.IsUnscopedEnumerationType())
7279 return from;
7280
7281 if (!from.IsPromotableIntegerType())
7282 return from;
7283
7284 if (from.IsUnscopedEnumerationType()) {
7285 EnumDecl *enum_decl = GetAsEnumDecl(from);
7286 CompilerType promotion_type = GetType(enum_decl->getPromotionType());
7287 return DoIntegralPromotion(promotion_type, exe_scope);
7288 }
7289
7290 lldb::BasicType builtin_type =
7291 from.GetCanonicalType().GetBasicTypeEnumeration();
7292 uint64_t from_size = 0;
7293 if (builtin_type == lldb::eBasicTypeWChar ||
7294 builtin_type == lldb::eBasicTypeSignedWChar ||
7295 builtin_type == lldb::eBasicTypeUnsignedWChar ||
7296 builtin_type == lldb::eBasicTypeChar16 ||
7297 builtin_type == lldb::eBasicTypeChar32) {
7298 // Find the type that can hold the entire range of values for our type.
7299 bool is_signed = from.IsSigned();
7300 llvm::Expected<uint64_t> from_size = from.GetByteSize(exe_scope);
7301 if (!from_size)
7302 return from_size.takeError();
7303 CompilerType promote_types[] = {
7304 GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeInt),
7305 GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeUnsignedInt),
7306 GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeLong),
7307 GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeUnsignedLong),
7308 GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeLongLong),
7309 GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeUnsignedLongLong),
7310 };
7311 for (CompilerType &type : promote_types) {
7312 llvm::Expected<uint64_t> byte_size = type.GetByteSize(exe_scope);
7313 if (!byte_size)
7314 return byte_size.takeError();
7315 if (*from_size < *byte_size ||
7316 (*from_size == *byte_size && is_signed == type.IsSigned())) {
7317 return type;
7318 }
7319 }
7320 llvm_unreachable("char type should fit into long long");
7321 }
7322
7323 // Here we can promote only to "int" or "unsigned int".
7324 CompilerType int_type = GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeInt);
7325 llvm::Expected<uint64_t> int_byte_size = int_type.GetByteSize(exe_scope);
7326 if (!int_byte_size)
7327 return int_byte_size.takeError();
7328
7329 // Signed integer types can be safely promoted to "int".
7330 if (from.IsSigned()) {
7331 return int_type;
7332 }
7333 // Unsigned integer types are promoted to "unsigned int" if "int" cannot hold
7334 // their entire value range.
7335 return (from_size == *int_byte_size)
7336 ? GetBasicTypeFromAST(lldb::eBasicTypeUnsignedInt)
7337 : int_type;
7338}
7339
7340clang::EnumDecl *TypeSystemClang::GetAsEnumDecl(const CompilerType &type) {
7341 const clang::EnumType *enutype =
7342 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::EnumType>(ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(type));
7343 if (enutype)
7344 return enutype->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
7345 return nullptr;
7346}
7347
7348clang::RecordDecl *TypeSystemClang::GetAsRecordDecl(const CompilerType &type) {
7349 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
7350 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::RecordType>(ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(type));
7351 if (record_type)
7352 return record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
7353 return nullptr;
7354}
7355
7356clang::TagDecl *TypeSystemClang::GetAsTagDecl(const CompilerType &type) {
7357 return ClangUtil::GetAsTagDecl(type);
7358}
7359
7360clang::TypedefNameDecl *
7361TypeSystemClang::GetAsTypedefDecl(const CompilerType &type) {
7362 const clang::TypedefType *typedef_type =
7363 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::TypedefType>(ClangUtil::GetQualType(type));
7364 if (typedef_type)
7365 return typedef_type->getDecl();
7366 return nullptr;
7367}
7368
7369clang::CXXRecordDecl *
7370TypeSystemClang::GetAsCXXRecordDecl(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
7371 return GetCanonicalQualType(type)->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
7372}
7373
7374clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *
7375TypeSystemClang::GetAsObjCInterfaceDecl(const CompilerType &type) {
7376 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
7377 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(
7378 ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(type));
7379 if (objc_class_type)
7380 return objc_class_type->getInterface();
7381 return nullptr;
7382}
7383
7384clang::FieldDecl *TypeSystemClang::AddFieldToRecordType(
7385 const CompilerType &type, llvm::StringRef name,
7386 const CompilerType &field_clang_type, AccessType access,
7387 uint32_t bitfield_bit_size) {
7388 if (!type.IsValid() || !field_clang_type.IsValid())
7389 return nullptr;
7390 auto ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
7391 if (!ast)
7392 return nullptr;
7393 clang::ASTContext &clang_ast = ast->getASTContext();
7394 clang::IdentifierInfo *ident = nullptr;
7395 if (!name.empty())
7396 ident = &clang_ast.Idents.get(name);
7397
7398 clang::FieldDecl *field = nullptr;
7399
7400 clang::Expr *bit_width = nullptr;
7401 if (bitfield_bit_size != 0) {
7402 if (clang_ast.IntTy.isNull()) {
7403 LLDB_LOG(
7404 GetLog(LLDBLog::Expressions),
7405 "{0} failed: builtin ASTContext types have not been initialized");
7406 return nullptr;
7407 }
7408
7409 llvm::APInt bitfield_bit_size_apint(clang_ast.getTypeSize(clang_ast.IntTy),
7410 bitfield_bit_size);
7411 bit_width = new (clang_ast)
7412 clang::IntegerLiteral(clang_ast, bitfield_bit_size_apint,
7413 clang_ast.IntTy, clang::SourceLocation());
7414 bit_width = clang::ConstantExpr::Create(
7415 clang_ast, bit_width, APValue(llvm::APSInt(bitfield_bit_size_apint)));
7416 }
7417
7418 clang::RecordDecl *record_decl = ast->GetAsRecordDecl(type);
7419 if (record_decl) {
7420 field = clang::FieldDecl::CreateDeserialized(clang_ast, GlobalDeclID());
7421 field->setDeclContext(record_decl);
7422 field->setDeclName(ident);
7423 field->setType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(field_clang_type));
7424 if (bit_width)
7425 field->setBitWidth(bit_width);
7426 SetMemberOwningModule(field, record_decl);
7427
7428 if (name.empty()) {
7429 // Determine whether this field corresponds to an anonymous struct or
7430 // union.
7431 if (const clang::TagType *TagT =
7432 field->getType()->getAs<clang::TagType>()) {
7433 if (clang::RecordDecl *Rec =
7434 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::RecordDecl>(TagT->getDecl()))
7435 if (!Rec->getDeclName()) {
7436 Rec->setAnonymousStructOrUnion(true);
7437 field->setImplicit();
7438 }
7439 }
7440 }
7441
7442 if (field) {
7443 field->setAccess(AS_public);
7444
7445 record_decl->addDecl(field);
7446
7447 VerifyDecl(field);
7448 }
7449 } else {
7450 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
7451 ast->GetAsObjCInterfaceDecl(type);
7452
7453 if (class_interface_decl) {
7454 const bool is_synthesized = false;
7455
7456 field_clang_type.GetCompleteType();
7457
7458 auto *ivar =
7459 clang::ObjCIvarDecl::CreateDeserialized(clang_ast, GlobalDeclID());
7460 ivar->setDeclContext(class_interface_decl);
7461 ivar->setDeclName(ident);
7462 ivar->setType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(field_clang_type));
7463 ivar->setAccessControl(ObjCIvarDecl::AccessControl::Public);
7464 if (bit_width)
7465 ivar->setBitWidth(bit_width);
7466 ivar->setSynthesize(is_synthesized);
7467 field = ivar;
7468 SetMemberOwningModule(field, class_interface_decl);
7469
7470 if (field) {
7471 class_interface_decl->addDecl(field);
7472
7473 VerifyDecl(field);
7474 }
7475 }
7476 }
7477 return field;
7478}
7479
7480void TypeSystemClang::BuildIndirectFields(const CompilerType &type) {
7481 if (!type)
7482 return;
7483
7484 auto ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
7485 if (!ast)
7486 return;
7487
7488 clang::RecordDecl *record_decl = ast->GetAsRecordDecl(type);
7489
7490 if (!record_decl)
7491 return;
7492
7493 typedef llvm::SmallVector<clang::IndirectFieldDecl *, 1> IndirectFieldVector;
7494
7495 IndirectFieldVector indirect_fields;
7496 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator field_pos;
7497 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator field_end_pos = record_decl->field_end();
7498 clang::RecordDecl::field_iterator last_field_pos = field_end_pos;
7499 for (field_pos = record_decl->field_begin(); field_pos != field_end_pos;
7500 last_field_pos = field_pos++) {
7501 if (field_pos->isAnonymousStructOrUnion()) {
7502 clang::QualType field_qual_type = field_pos->getType();
7503
7504 const clang::RecordType *field_record_type =
7505 field_qual_type->getAs<clang::RecordType>();
7506
7507 if (!field_record_type)
7508 continue;
7509
7510 clang::RecordDecl *field_record_decl =
7511 field_record_type->getDecl()->getDefinition();
7512
7513 if (!field_record_decl)
7514 continue;
7515
7516 for (clang::RecordDecl::decl_iterator
7517 di = field_record_decl->decls_begin(),
7518 de = field_record_decl->decls_end();
7519 di != de; ++di) {
7520 if (clang::FieldDecl *nested_field_decl =
7521 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FieldDecl>(*di)) {
7522 clang::NamedDecl **chain =
7523 new (ast->getASTContext()) clang::NamedDecl *[2];
7524 chain[0] = *field_pos;
7525 chain[1] = nested_field_decl;
7526 clang::IndirectFieldDecl *indirect_field =
7527 clang::IndirectFieldDecl::Create(
7528 ast->getASTContext(), record_decl, clang::SourceLocation(),
7529 nested_field_decl->getIdentifier(),
7530 nested_field_decl->getType(), {chain, 2});
7531 SetMemberOwningModule(indirect_field, record_decl);
7532
7533 indirect_field->setImplicit();
7534
7535 indirect_field->setAccess(AS_public);
7536
7537 indirect_fields.push_back(indirect_field);
7538 } else if (clang::IndirectFieldDecl *nested_indirect_field_decl =
7539 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::IndirectFieldDecl>(*di)) {
7540 size_t nested_chain_size =
7541 nested_indirect_field_decl->getChainingSize();
7542 clang::NamedDecl **chain = new (ast->getASTContext())
7543 clang::NamedDecl *[nested_chain_size + 1];
7544 chain[0] = *field_pos;
7545
7546 int chain_index = 1;
7547 for (clang::IndirectFieldDecl::chain_iterator
7548 nci = nested_indirect_field_decl->chain_begin(),
7549 nce = nested_indirect_field_decl->chain_end();
7550 nci < nce; ++nci) {
7551 chain[chain_index] = *nci;
7552 chain_index++;
7553 }
7554
7555 clang::IndirectFieldDecl *indirect_field =
7556 clang::IndirectFieldDecl::Create(
7557 ast->getASTContext(), record_decl, clang::SourceLocation(),
7558 nested_indirect_field_decl->getIdentifier(),
7559 nested_indirect_field_decl->getType(),
7560 {chain, nested_chain_size + 1});
7561 SetMemberOwningModule(indirect_field, record_decl);
7562
7563 indirect_field->setImplicit();
7564
7565 indirect_field->setAccess(AS_public);
7566
7567 indirect_fields.push_back(indirect_field);
7568 }
7569 }
7570 }
7571 }
7572
7573 // Check the last field to see if it has an incomplete array type as its last
7574 // member and if it does, the tell the record decl about it
7575 if (last_field_pos != field_end_pos) {
7576 if (last_field_pos->getType()->isIncompleteArrayType())
7577 record_decl->hasFlexibleArrayMember();
7578 }
7579
7580 for (IndirectFieldVector::iterator ifi = indirect_fields.begin(),
7581 ife = indirect_fields.end();
7582 ifi < ife; ++ifi) {
7583 record_decl->addDecl(*ifi);
7584 }
7585}
7586
7587void TypeSystemClang::SetIsPacked(const CompilerType &type) {
7588 if (type) {
7589 auto ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
7590 if (ast) {
7591 clang::RecordDecl *record_decl = GetAsRecordDecl(type);
7592
7593 if (!record_decl)
7594 return;
7595
7596 record_decl->addAttr(
7597 clang::PackedAttr::CreateImplicit(ast->getASTContext()));
7598 }
7599 }
7600}
7601
7602clang::VarDecl *TypeSystemClang::AddVariableToRecordType(
7603 const CompilerType &type, llvm::StringRef name,
7604 const CompilerType &var_type, AccessType access) {
7605 if (!type.IsValid() || !var_type.IsValid())
7606 return nullptr;
7607
7608 auto ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
7609 if (!ast)
7610 return nullptr;
7611
7612 clang::RecordDecl *record_decl = ast->GetAsRecordDecl(type);
7613 if (!record_decl)
7614 return nullptr;
7615
7616 clang::VarDecl *var_decl = nullptr;
7617 clang::IdentifierInfo *ident = nullptr;
7618 if (!name.empty())
7619 ident = &ast->getASTContext().Idents.get(name);
7620
7621 var_decl =
7622 clang::VarDecl::CreateDeserialized(ast->getASTContext(), GlobalDeclID());
7623 var_decl->setDeclContext(record_decl);
7624 var_decl->setDeclName(ident);
7625 var_decl->setType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(var_type));
7626 var_decl->setStorageClass(clang::SC_Static);
7627 SetMemberOwningModule(var_decl, record_decl);
7628 if (!var_decl)
7629 return nullptr;
7630
7631 var_decl->setAccess(AS_public);
7632 record_decl->addDecl(var_decl);
7633
7634 VerifyDecl(var_decl);
7635
7636 return var_decl;
7637}
7638
7639void TypeSystemClang::SetIntegerInitializerForVariable(
7640 VarDecl *var, const llvm::APInt &init_value) {
7641 assert(!var->hasInit() && "variable already initialized");
7642
7643 clang::ASTContext &ast = var->getASTContext();
7644 QualType qt = var->getType();
7645 assert(qt->isIntegralOrEnumerationType() &&
7646 "only integer or enum types supported");
7647 // If the variable is an enum type, take the underlying integer type as
7648 // the type of the integer literal.
7649 if (const EnumType *enum_type = qt->getAs<EnumType>()) {
7650 const EnumDecl *enum_decl = enum_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
7651 qt = enum_decl->getIntegerType();
7652 }
7653 // Bools are handled separately because the clang AST printer handles bools
7654 // separately from other integral types.
7655 if (qt->isSpecificBuiltinType(BuiltinType::Bool)) {
7656 var->setInit(CXXBoolLiteralExpr::Create(
7657 ast, !init_value.isZero(), qt.getUnqualifiedType(), SourceLocation()));
7658 } else {
7659 var->setInit(IntegerLiteral::Create(
7660 ast, init_value, qt.getUnqualifiedType(), SourceLocation()));
7661 }
7662}
7663
7664void TypeSystemClang::SetFloatingInitializerForVariable(
7665 clang::VarDecl *var, const llvm::APFloat &init_value) {
7666 assert(!var->hasInit() && "variable already initialized");
7667
7668 clang::ASTContext &ast = var->getASTContext();
7669 QualType qt = var->getType();
7670 assert(qt->isFloatingType() && "only floating point types supported");
7671 var->setInit(FloatingLiteral::Create(
7672 ast, init_value, true, qt.getUnqualifiedType(), SourceLocation()));
7673}
7674
7675llvm::SmallVector<clang::ParmVarDecl *>
7676TypeSystemClang::CreateParameterDeclarations(
7677 clang::FunctionDecl *func, const clang::FunctionProtoType &prototype,
7678 const llvm::SmallVector<llvm::StringRef> &parameter_names) {
7679 assert(func);
7680 assert(parameter_names.empty() ||
7681 parameter_names.size() == prototype.getNumParams());
7682
7683 llvm::SmallVector<clang::ParmVarDecl *> params;
7684 for (unsigned param_index = 0; param_index < prototype.getNumParams();
7685 ++param_index) {
7686 llvm::StringRef name =
7687 !parameter_names.empty() ? parameter_names[param_index] : "";
7688
7689 auto *param =
7690 CreateParameterDeclaration(func, /*owning_module=*/{}, name.data(),
7691 GetType(prototype.getParamType(param_index)),
7692 clang::SC_None, /*add_decl=*/false);
7693 assert(param);
7694
7695 params.push_back(param);
7696 }
7697
7698 return params;
7699}
7700
7701clang::CXXMethodDecl *TypeSystemClang::AddMethodToCXXRecordType(
7702 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, llvm::StringRef name,
7703 llvm::StringRef asm_label, const CompilerType &method_clang_type,
7704 lldb::AccessType access, bool is_virtual, bool is_static, bool is_inline,
7705 bool is_explicit, bool is_attr_used, bool is_artificial) {
7706 if (!type || !method_clang_type.IsValid() || name.empty())
7707 return nullptr;
7708
7709 clang::QualType record_qual_type(GetCanonicalQualType(type));
7710
7711 clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
7712 record_qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
7713
7714 if (cxx_record_decl == nullptr)
7715 return nullptr;
7716
7717 clang::QualType method_qual_type(ClangUtil::GetQualType(method_clang_type));
7718
7719 clang::CXXMethodDecl *cxx_method_decl = nullptr;
7720
7721 clang::DeclarationName decl_name(&getASTContext().Idents.get(name));
7722
7723 const clang::FunctionType *function_type =
7724 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionType>(method_qual_type.getTypePtr());
7725
7726 if (function_type == nullptr)
7727 return nullptr;
7728
7729 const clang::FunctionProtoType *method_function_prototype(
7730 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionProtoType>(function_type));
7731
7732 if (!method_function_prototype)
7733 return nullptr;
7734
7735 unsigned int num_params = method_function_prototype->getNumParams();
7736
7737 clang::CXXDestructorDecl *cxx_dtor_decl(nullptr);
7738 clang::CXXConstructorDecl *cxx_ctor_decl(nullptr);
7739
7740 if (is_artificial)
7741 return nullptr; // skip everything artificial
7742
7743 const clang::ExplicitSpecifier explicit_spec(
7744 nullptr /*expr*/, is_explicit ? clang::ExplicitSpecKind::ResolvedTrue
7745 : clang::ExplicitSpecKind::ResolvedFalse);
7746
7747 if (name.starts_with("~")) {
7748 cxx_dtor_decl = clang::CXXDestructorDecl::CreateDeserialized(
7749 getASTContext(), GlobalDeclID());
7750 cxx_dtor_decl->setDeclContext(cxx_record_decl);
7751 cxx_dtor_decl->setDeclName(
7752 getASTContext().DeclarationNames.getCXXDestructorName(
7753 getASTContext().getCanonicalType(record_qual_type)));
7754 cxx_dtor_decl->setType(method_qual_type);
7755 cxx_dtor_decl->setImplicit(is_artificial);
7756 cxx_dtor_decl->setInlineSpecified(is_inline);
7757 cxx_dtor_decl->setConstexprKind(ConstexprSpecKind::Unspecified);
7758 cxx_method_decl = cxx_dtor_decl;
7759 } else if (decl_name == cxx_record_decl->getDeclName()) {
7760 cxx_ctor_decl = clang::CXXConstructorDecl::CreateDeserialized(
7761 getASTContext(), GlobalDeclID(), 0);
7762 cxx_ctor_decl->setDeclContext(cxx_record_decl);
7763 cxx_ctor_decl->setDeclName(
7764 getASTContext().DeclarationNames.getCXXConstructorName(
7765 getASTContext().getCanonicalType(record_qual_type)));
7766 cxx_ctor_decl->setType(method_qual_type);
7767 cxx_ctor_decl->setImplicit(is_artificial);
7768 cxx_ctor_decl->setInlineSpecified(is_inline);
7769 cxx_ctor_decl->setConstexprKind(ConstexprSpecKind::Unspecified);
7770 cxx_ctor_decl->setNumCtorInitializers(0);
7771 cxx_ctor_decl->setExplicitSpecifier(explicit_spec);
7772 cxx_method_decl = cxx_ctor_decl;
7773 } else {
7774 clang::StorageClass SC = is_static ? clang::SC_Static : clang::SC_None;
7775 clang::OverloadedOperatorKind op_kind = clang::NUM_OVERLOADED_OPERATORS;
7776
7777 if (IsOperator(name, op_kind)) {
7778 if (op_kind != clang::NUM_OVERLOADED_OPERATORS) {
7779 // Check the number of operator parameters. Sometimes we have seen bad
7780 // DWARF that doesn't correctly describe operators and if we try to
7781 // create a method and add it to the class, clang will assert and
7782 // crash, so we need to make sure things are acceptable.
7783 const bool is_method = true;
7784 if (!TypeSystemClang::CheckOverloadedOperatorKindParameterCount(
7785 is_method, op_kind, num_params))
7786 return nullptr;
7787 cxx_method_decl = clang::CXXMethodDecl::CreateDeserialized(
7788 getASTContext(), GlobalDeclID());
7789 cxx_method_decl->setDeclContext(cxx_record_decl);
7790 cxx_method_decl->setDeclName(
7791 getASTContext().DeclarationNames.getCXXOperatorName(op_kind));
7792 cxx_method_decl->setType(method_qual_type);
7793 cxx_method_decl->setStorageClass(SC);
7794 cxx_method_decl->setInlineSpecified(is_inline);
7795 cxx_method_decl->setConstexprKind(ConstexprSpecKind::Unspecified);
7796 } else if (num_params == 0) {
7797 // Conversion operators don't take params...
7798 auto *cxx_conversion_decl =
7799 clang::CXXConversionDecl::CreateDeserialized(getASTContext(),
7800 GlobalDeclID());
7801 cxx_conversion_decl->setDeclContext(cxx_record_decl);
7802 cxx_conversion_decl->setDeclName(
7803 getASTContext().DeclarationNames.getCXXConversionFunctionName(
7804 getASTContext().getCanonicalType(
7805 function_type->getReturnType())));
7806 cxx_conversion_decl->setType(method_qual_type);
7807 cxx_conversion_decl->setInlineSpecified(is_inline);
7808 cxx_conversion_decl->setExplicitSpecifier(explicit_spec);
7809 cxx_conversion_decl->setConstexprKind(ConstexprSpecKind::Unspecified);
7810 cxx_method_decl = cxx_conversion_decl;
7811 }
7812 }
7813
7814 if (cxx_method_decl == nullptr) {
7815 cxx_method_decl = clang::CXXMethodDecl::CreateDeserialized(
7816 getASTContext(), GlobalDeclID());
7817 cxx_method_decl->setDeclContext(cxx_record_decl);
7818 cxx_method_decl->setDeclName(decl_name);
7819 cxx_method_decl->setType(method_qual_type);
7820 cxx_method_decl->setInlineSpecified(is_inline);
7821 cxx_method_decl->setStorageClass(SC);
7822 cxx_method_decl->setConstexprKind(ConstexprSpecKind::Unspecified);
7823 }
7824 }
7825 SetMemberOwningModule(cxx_method_decl, cxx_record_decl);
7826
7827 cxx_method_decl->setAccess(AS_public);
7828 cxx_method_decl->setVirtualAsWritten(is_virtual);
7829
7830 if (is_attr_used)
7831 cxx_method_decl->addAttr(clang::UsedAttr::CreateImplicit(getASTContext()));
7832
7833 if (!asm_label.empty())
7834 cxx_method_decl->addAttr(
7835 clang::AsmLabelAttr::CreateImplicit(getASTContext(), asm_label));
7836
7837 // Parameters on member function declarations in DWARF generally don't
7838 // have names, so we omit them when creating the ParmVarDecls.
7839 cxx_method_decl->setParams(CreateParameterDeclarations(
7840 cxx_method_decl, *method_function_prototype, /*parameter_names=*/{}));
7841
7842 cxx_record_decl->addDecl(cxx_method_decl);
7843
7844 // Sometimes the debug info will mention a constructor (default/copy/move),
7845 // destructor, or assignment operator (copy/move) but there won't be any
7846 // version of this in the code. So we check if the function was artificially
7847 // generated and if it is trivial and this lets the compiler/backend know
7848 // that it can inline the IR for these when it needs to and we can avoid a
7849 // "missing function" error when running expressions.
7850
7851 if (is_artificial) {
7852 if (cxx_ctor_decl && ((cxx_ctor_decl->isDefaultConstructor() &&
7853 cxx_record_decl->hasTrivialDefaultConstructor()) ||
7854 (cxx_ctor_decl->isCopyConstructor() &&
7855 cxx_record_decl->hasTrivialCopyConstructor()) ||
7856 (cxx_ctor_decl->isMoveConstructor() &&
7857 cxx_record_decl->hasTrivialMoveConstructor()))) {
7858 cxx_ctor_decl->setDefaulted();
7859 cxx_ctor_decl->setTrivial(true);
7860 } else if (cxx_dtor_decl) {
7861 if (cxx_record_decl->hasTrivialDestructor()) {
7862 cxx_dtor_decl->setDefaulted();
7863 cxx_dtor_decl->setTrivial(true);
7864 }
7865 } else if ((cxx_method_decl->isCopyAssignmentOperator() &&
7866 cxx_record_decl->hasTrivialCopyAssignment()) ||
7867 (cxx_method_decl->isMoveAssignmentOperator() &&
7868 cxx_record_decl->hasTrivialMoveAssignment())) {
7869 cxx_method_decl->setDefaulted();
7870 cxx_method_decl->setTrivial(true);
7871 }
7872 }
7873
7874 VerifyDecl(cxx_method_decl);
7875
7876 return cxx_method_decl;
7877}
7878
7879void TypeSystemClang::AddMethodOverridesForCXXRecordType(
7880 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
7881 if (auto *record = GetAsCXXRecordDecl(type))
7882 for (auto *method : record->methods())
7883 addOverridesForMethod(method);
7884}
7885
7886#pragma mark C++ Base Classes
7887
7888std::unique_ptr<clang::CXXBaseSpecifier>
7889TypeSystemClang::CreateBaseClassSpecifier(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
7890 AccessType access, bool is_virtual,
7891 bool base_of_class) {
7892 if (!type)
7893 return nullptr;
7894
7895 return std::make_unique<clang::CXXBaseSpecifier>(
7896 clang::SourceRange(), is_virtual, base_of_class,
7897 TypeSystemClang::ConvertAccessTypeToAccessSpecifier(access),
7898 getASTContext().getTrivialTypeSourceInfo(GetQualType(type)),
7899 clang::SourceLocation());
7900}
7901
7902bool TypeSystemClang::TransferBaseClasses(
7903 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
7904 std::vector<std::unique_ptr<clang::CXXBaseSpecifier>> bases) {
7905 if (!type)
7906 return false;
7907 clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl = GetAsCXXRecordDecl(type);
7908 if (!cxx_record_decl)
7909 return false;
7910 std::vector<clang::CXXBaseSpecifier *> raw_bases;
7911 raw_bases.reserve(bases.size());
7912
7913 // Clang will make a copy of them, so it's ok that we pass pointers that we're
7914 // about to destroy.
7915 for (auto &b : bases)
7916 raw_bases.push_back(b.get());
7917 cxx_record_decl->setBases(raw_bases.data(), raw_bases.size());
7918 return true;
7919}
7920
7921bool TypeSystemClang::SetObjCSuperClass(
7922 const CompilerType &type, const CompilerType &superclass_clang_type) {
7923 auto ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
7924 if (!ast)
7925 return false;
7926 clang::ASTContext &clang_ast = ast->getASTContext();
7927
7928 if (type && superclass_clang_type.IsValid() &&
7929 superclass_clang_type.GetTypeSystem() == type.GetTypeSystem()) {
7930 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
7931 GetAsObjCInterfaceDecl(type);
7932 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *super_interface_decl =
7933 GetAsObjCInterfaceDecl(superclass_clang_type);
7934 if (class_interface_decl && super_interface_decl) {
7935 class_interface_decl->setSuperClass(clang_ast.getTrivialTypeSourceInfo(
7936 clang_ast.getObjCInterfaceType(super_interface_decl)));
7937 return true;
7938 }
7939 }
7940 return false;
7941}
7942
7943bool TypeSystemClang::AddObjCClassProperty(
7944 const CompilerType &type, const char *property_name,
7945 const CompilerType &property_clang_type, clang::ObjCIvarDecl *ivar_decl,
7946 const char *property_setter_name, const char *property_getter_name,
7947 uint32_t property_attributes, ClangASTMetadata metadata) {
7948 if (!type || !property_clang_type.IsValid() || property_name == nullptr ||
7949 property_name[0] == '\0')
7950 return false;
7951 auto ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
7952 if (!ast)
7953 return false;
7954 clang::ASTContext &clang_ast = ast->getASTContext();
7955
7956 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl = GetAsObjCInterfaceDecl(type);
7957 if (!class_interface_decl)
7958 return false;
7959
7960 CompilerType property_clang_type_to_access;
7961
7962 if (property_clang_type.IsValid())
7963 property_clang_type_to_access = property_clang_type;
7964 else if (ivar_decl)
7965 property_clang_type_to_access = ast->GetType(ivar_decl->getType());
7966
7967 if (!class_interface_decl || !property_clang_type_to_access.IsValid())
7968 return false;
7969
7970 clang::TypeSourceInfo *prop_type_source;
7971 if (ivar_decl)
7972 prop_type_source = clang_ast.getTrivialTypeSourceInfo(ivar_decl->getType());
7973 else
7974 prop_type_source = clang_ast.getTrivialTypeSourceInfo(
7975 ClangUtil::GetQualType(property_clang_type));
7976
7977 clang::ObjCPropertyDecl *property_decl =
7978 clang::ObjCPropertyDecl::CreateDeserialized(clang_ast, GlobalDeclID());
7979 property_decl->setDeclContext(class_interface_decl);
7980 property_decl->setDeclName(&clang_ast.Idents.get(property_name));
7981 property_decl->setType(ivar_decl
7982 ? ivar_decl->getType()
7983 : ClangUtil::GetQualType(property_clang_type),
7984 prop_type_source);
7985 SetMemberOwningModule(property_decl, class_interface_decl);
7986
7987 if (!property_decl)
7988 return false;
7989
7990 ast->SetMetadata(property_decl, metadata);
7991
7992 class_interface_decl->addDecl(property_decl);
7993
7994 clang::Selector setter_sel, getter_sel;
7995
7996 if (property_setter_name) {
7997 std::string property_setter_no_colon(property_setter_name,
7998 strlen(property_setter_name) - 1);
7999 const clang::IdentifierInfo *setter_ident =
8000 &clang_ast.Idents.get(property_setter_no_colon);
8001 setter_sel = clang_ast.Selectors.getSelector(1, &setter_ident);
8002 } else if (!(property_attributes & DW_APPLE_PROPERTY_readonly)) {
8003 std::string setter_sel_string("set");
8004 setter_sel_string.push_back(::toupper(property_name[0]));
8005 setter_sel_string.append(&property_name[1]);
8006 const clang::IdentifierInfo *setter_ident =
8007 &clang_ast.Idents.get(setter_sel_string);
8008 setter_sel = clang_ast.Selectors.getSelector(1, &setter_ident);
8009 }
8010 property_decl->setSetterName(setter_sel);
8011 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_setter);
8012
8013 if (property_getter_name != nullptr) {
8014 const clang::IdentifierInfo *getter_ident =
8015 &clang_ast.Idents.get(property_getter_name);
8016 getter_sel = clang_ast.Selectors.getSelector(0, &getter_ident);
8017 } else {
8018 const clang::IdentifierInfo *getter_ident =
8019 &clang_ast.Idents.get(property_name);
8020 getter_sel = clang_ast.Selectors.getSelector(0, &getter_ident);
8021 }
8022 property_decl->setGetterName(getter_sel);
8023 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_getter);
8024
8025 if (ivar_decl)
8026 property_decl->setPropertyIvarDecl(ivar_decl);
8027
8028 if (property_attributes & DW_APPLE_PROPERTY_readonly)
8029 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_readonly);
8030 if (property_attributes & DW_APPLE_PROPERTY_readwrite)
8031 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_readwrite);
8032 if (property_attributes & DW_APPLE_PROPERTY_assign)
8033 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_assign);
8034 if (property_attributes & DW_APPLE_PROPERTY_retain)
8035 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_retain);
8036 if (property_attributes & DW_APPLE_PROPERTY_copy)
8037 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_copy);
8038 if (property_attributes & DW_APPLE_PROPERTY_nonatomic)
8039 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_nonatomic);
8040 if (property_attributes & ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_nullability)
8041 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(
8042 ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_nullability);
8043 if (property_attributes & ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_null_resettable)
8044 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(
8045 ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_null_resettable);
8046 if (property_attributes & ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_class)
8047 property_decl->setPropertyAttributes(ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_class);
8048
8049 const bool isInstance =
8050 (property_attributes & ObjCPropertyAttribute::kind_class) == 0;
8051
8052 clang::ObjCMethodDecl *getter = nullptr;
8053 if (!getter_sel.isNull())
8054 getter = isInstance ? class_interface_decl->lookupInstanceMethod(getter_sel)
8055 : class_interface_decl->lookupClassMethod(getter_sel);
8056 if (!getter_sel.isNull() && !getter) {
8057 const bool isVariadic = false;
8058 const bool isPropertyAccessor = true;
8059 const bool isSynthesizedAccessorStub = false;
8060 const bool isImplicitlyDeclared = true;
8061 const bool isDefined = false;
8062 const clang::ObjCImplementationControl impControl =
8063 clang::ObjCImplementationControl::None;
8064 const bool HasRelatedResultType = false;
8065
8066 getter =
8067 clang::ObjCMethodDecl::CreateDeserialized(clang_ast, GlobalDeclID());
8068 getter->setDeclName(getter_sel);
8069 getter->setReturnType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(property_clang_type_to_access));
8070 getter->setDeclContext(class_interface_decl);
8071 getter->setInstanceMethod(isInstance);
8072 getter->setVariadic(isVariadic);
8073 getter->setPropertyAccessor(isPropertyAccessor);
8074 getter->setSynthesizedAccessorStub(isSynthesizedAccessorStub);
8075 getter->setImplicit(isImplicitlyDeclared);
8076 getter->setDefined(isDefined);
8077 getter->setDeclImplementation(impControl);
8078 getter->setRelatedResultType(HasRelatedResultType);
8079 SetMemberOwningModule(getter, class_interface_decl);
8080
8081 if (getter) {
8082 ast->SetMetadata(getter, metadata);
8083
8084 getter->setMethodParams(clang_ast, llvm::ArrayRef<clang::ParmVarDecl *>(),
8085 llvm::ArrayRef<clang::SourceLocation>());
8086 class_interface_decl->addDecl(getter);
8087 }
8088 }
8089 if (getter) {
8090 getter->setPropertyAccessor(true);
8091 property_decl->setGetterMethodDecl(getter);
8092 }
8093
8094 clang::ObjCMethodDecl *setter = nullptr;
8095 setter = isInstance ? class_interface_decl->lookupInstanceMethod(setter_sel)
8096 : class_interface_decl->lookupClassMethod(setter_sel);
8097 if (!setter_sel.isNull() && !setter) {
8098 clang::QualType result_type = clang_ast.VoidTy;
8099 const bool isVariadic = false;
8100 const bool isPropertyAccessor = true;
8101 const bool isSynthesizedAccessorStub = false;
8102 const bool isImplicitlyDeclared = true;
8103 const bool isDefined = false;
8104 const clang::ObjCImplementationControl impControl =
8105 clang::ObjCImplementationControl::None;
8106 const bool HasRelatedResultType = false;
8107
8108 setter =
8109 clang::ObjCMethodDecl::CreateDeserialized(clang_ast, GlobalDeclID());
8110 setter->setDeclName(setter_sel);
8111 setter->setReturnType(result_type);
8112 setter->setDeclContext(class_interface_decl);
8113 setter->setInstanceMethod(isInstance);
8114 setter->setVariadic(isVariadic);
8115 setter->setPropertyAccessor(isPropertyAccessor);
8116 setter->setSynthesizedAccessorStub(isSynthesizedAccessorStub);
8117 setter->setImplicit(isImplicitlyDeclared);
8118 setter->setDefined(isDefined);
8119 setter->setDeclImplementation(impControl);
8120 setter->setRelatedResultType(HasRelatedResultType);
8121 SetMemberOwningModule(setter, class_interface_decl);
8122
8123 if (setter) {
8124 ast->SetMetadata(setter, metadata);
8125
8126 llvm::SmallVector<clang::ParmVarDecl *, 1> params;
8127 params.push_back(clang::ParmVarDecl::Create(
8128 clang_ast, setter, clang::SourceLocation(), clang::SourceLocation(),
8129 nullptr, // anonymous
8130 ClangUtil::GetQualType(property_clang_type_to_access), nullptr,
8131 clang::SC_Auto, nullptr));
8132
8133 setter->setMethodParams(clang_ast,
8134 llvm::ArrayRef<clang::ParmVarDecl *>(params),
8135 llvm::ArrayRef<clang::SourceLocation>());
8136
8137 class_interface_decl->addDecl(setter);
8138 }
8139 }
8140 if (setter) {
8141 setter->setPropertyAccessor(true);
8142 property_decl->setSetterMethodDecl(setter);
8143 }
8144
8145 return true;
8146}
8147
8148clang::ObjCMethodDecl *TypeSystemClang::AddMethodToObjCObjectType(
8149 const CompilerType &type,
8150 const char *name, // the full symbol name as seen in the symbol table
8151 // (lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, "-[NString
8152 // stringWithCString:]")
8153 const CompilerType &method_clang_type, bool is_artificial, bool is_variadic,
8154 bool is_objc_direct_call) {
8155 if (!type || !method_clang_type.IsValid())
8156 return nullptr;
8157
8158 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl = GetAsObjCInterfaceDecl(type);
8159
8160 if (class_interface_decl == nullptr)
8161 return nullptr;
8162 auto lldb_ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
8163 if (lldb_ast == nullptr)
8164 return nullptr;
8165 clang::ASTContext &ast = lldb_ast->getASTContext();
8166
8167 const char *selector_start = ::strchr(name, ' ');
8168 if (selector_start == nullptr)
8169 return nullptr;
8170
8171 selector_start++;
8172 llvm::SmallVector<const clang::IdentifierInfo *, 12> selector_idents;
8173
8174 size_t len = 0;
8175 const char *start;
8176
8177 unsigned num_selectors_with_args = 0;
8178 for (start = selector_start; start && *start != '\0' && *start != ']';
8179 start += len) {
8180 len = ::strcspn(start, ":]");
8181 bool has_arg = (start[len] == ':');
8182 if (has_arg)
8183 ++num_selectors_with_args;
8184 selector_idents.push_back(&ast.Idents.get(llvm::StringRef(start, len)));
8185 if (has_arg)
8186 len += 1;
8187 }
8188
8189 if (selector_idents.size() == 0)
8190 return nullptr;
8191
8192 clang::Selector method_selector = ast.Selectors.getSelector(
8193 num_selectors_with_args ? selector_idents.size() : 0,
8194 selector_idents.data());
8195
8196 clang::QualType method_qual_type(ClangUtil::GetQualType(method_clang_type));
8197
8198 // Populate the method decl with parameter decls
8199 const clang::Type *method_type(method_qual_type.getTypePtr());
8200
8201 if (method_type == nullptr)
8202 return nullptr;
8203
8204 const clang::FunctionProtoType *method_function_prototype(
8205 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionProtoType>(method_type));
8206
8207 if (!method_function_prototype)
8208 return nullptr;
8209
8210 const bool isInstance = (name[0] == '-');
8211 const bool isVariadic = is_variadic;
8212 const bool isPropertyAccessor = false;
8213 const bool isSynthesizedAccessorStub = false;
8214 /// Force this to true because we don't have source locations.
8215 const bool isImplicitlyDeclared = true;
8216 const bool isDefined = false;
8217 const clang::ObjCImplementationControl impControl =
8218 clang::ObjCImplementationControl::None;
8219 const bool HasRelatedResultType = false;
8220
8221 const unsigned num_args = method_function_prototype->getNumParams();
8222
8223 if (num_args != num_selectors_with_args)
8224 return nullptr; // some debug information is corrupt. We are not going to
8225 // deal with it.
8226
8227 auto *objc_method_decl =
8228 clang::ObjCMethodDecl::CreateDeserialized(ast, GlobalDeclID());
8229 objc_method_decl->setDeclName(method_selector);
8230 objc_method_decl->setReturnType(method_function_prototype->getReturnType());
8231 objc_method_decl->setDeclContext(
8232 lldb_ast->GetDeclContextForType(ClangUtil::GetQualType(type)));
8233 objc_method_decl->setInstanceMethod(isInstance);
8234 objc_method_decl->setVariadic(isVariadic);
8235 objc_method_decl->setPropertyAccessor(isPropertyAccessor);
8236 objc_method_decl->setSynthesizedAccessorStub(isSynthesizedAccessorStub);
8237 objc_method_decl->setImplicit(isImplicitlyDeclared);
8238 objc_method_decl->setDefined(isDefined);
8239 objc_method_decl->setDeclImplementation(impControl);
8240 objc_method_decl->setRelatedResultType(HasRelatedResultType);
8241 SetMemberOwningModule(objc_method_decl, class_interface_decl);
8242
8243 if (objc_method_decl == nullptr)
8244 return nullptr;
8245
8246 if (num_args > 0) {
8247 llvm::SmallVector<clang::ParmVarDecl *, 12> params;
8248
8249 for (unsigned param_index = 0; param_index < num_args; ++param_index) {
8250 params.push_back(clang::ParmVarDecl::Create(
8251 ast, objc_method_decl, clang::SourceLocation(),
8252 clang::SourceLocation(),
8253 nullptr, // anonymous
8254 method_function_prototype->getParamType(param_index), nullptr,
8255 clang::SC_Auto, nullptr));
8256 }
8257
8258 objc_method_decl->setMethodParams(
8259 ast, llvm::ArrayRef<clang::ParmVarDecl *>(params),
8260 llvm::ArrayRef<clang::SourceLocation>());
8261 }
8262
8263 if (is_objc_direct_call) {
8264 // Add a the objc_direct attribute to the declaration we generate that
8265 // we generate a direct method call for this ObjCMethodDecl.
8266 objc_method_decl->addAttr(
8267 clang::ObjCDirectAttr::CreateImplicit(ast, SourceLocation()));
8268 // Usually Sema is creating implicit parameters (e.g., self) when it
8269 // parses the method. We don't have a parsing Sema when we build our own
8270 // AST here so we manually need to create these implicit parameters to
8271 // make the direct call code generation happy.
8272 objc_method_decl->createImplicitParams(ast, class_interface_decl);
8273 }
8274
8275 class_interface_decl->addDecl(objc_method_decl);
8276
8277 VerifyDecl(objc_method_decl);
8278
8279 return objc_method_decl;
8280}
8281
8282bool TypeSystemClang::SetHasExternalStorage(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
8283 bool has_extern) {
8284 if (!type)
8285 return false;
8286
8287 clang::QualType qual_type(RemoveWrappingTypes(GetCanonicalQualType(type)));
8288
8289 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
8290 switch (type_class) {
8291 case clang::Type::Record: {
8292 clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl = qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
8293 if (cxx_record_decl) {
8294 cxx_record_decl->setHasExternalLexicalStorage(has_extern);
8295 cxx_record_decl->setHasExternalVisibleStorage(has_extern);
8296 return true;
8297 }
8298 } break;
8299
8300 case clang::Type::Enum: {
8301 clang::EnumDecl *enum_decl =
8302 llvm::cast<clang::EnumType>(qual_type)->getDecl();
8303 if (enum_decl) {
8304 enum_decl->setHasExternalLexicalStorage(has_extern);
8305 enum_decl->setHasExternalVisibleStorage(has_extern);
8306 return true;
8307 }
8308 } break;
8309
8310 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
8311 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface: {
8312 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
8313 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
8314 assert(objc_class_type);
8315 if (objc_class_type) {
8316 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
8317 objc_class_type->getInterface();
8318
8319 if (class_interface_decl) {
8320 class_interface_decl->setHasExternalLexicalStorage(has_extern);
8321 class_interface_decl->setHasExternalVisibleStorage(has_extern);
8322 return true;
8323 }
8324 }
8325 } break;
8326
8327 default:
8328 break;
8329 }
8330 return false;
8331}
8332
8333#pragma mark TagDecl
8334
8335bool TypeSystemClang::StartTagDeclarationDefinition(const CompilerType &type) {
8336 clang::QualType qual_type(ClangUtil::GetQualType(type));
8337 if (!qual_type.isNull()) {
8338 const clang::TagType *tag_type = qual_type->getAs<clang::TagType>();
8339 if (tag_type) {
8340 clang::TagDecl *tag_decl = tag_type->getDecl();
8341 if (tag_decl) {
8342 tag_decl->startDefinition();
8343 return true;
8344 }
8345 }
8346
8347 const clang::ObjCObjectType *object_type =
8348 qual_type->getAs<clang::ObjCObjectType>();
8349 if (object_type) {
8350 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *interface_decl = object_type->getInterface();
8351 if (interface_decl) {
8352 interface_decl->startDefinition();
8353 return true;
8354 }
8355 }
8356 }
8357 return false;
8358}
8359
8360bool TypeSystemClang::CompleteTagDeclarationDefinition(
8361 const CompilerType &type) {
8362 clang::QualType qual_type(ClangUtil::GetQualType(type));
8363 if (qual_type.isNull())
8364 return false;
8365
8366 auto lldb_ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
8367 if (lldb_ast == nullptr)
8368 return false;
8369
8370 // Make sure we use the same methodology as
8371 // TypeSystemClang::StartTagDeclarationDefinition() as to how we start/end
8372 // the definition.
8373 const clang::TagType *tag_type = qual_type->getAs<clang::TagType>();
8374 if (tag_type) {
8375 clang::TagDecl *tag_decl = tag_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
8376
8377 if (auto *cxx_record_decl = llvm::dyn_cast<CXXRecordDecl>(tag_decl)) {
8378 // If we have a move constructor declared but no copy constructor we
8379 // need to explicitly mark it as deleted. Usually Sema would do this for
8380 // us in Sema::DeclareImplicitCopyConstructor but we don't have a Sema
8381 // when building an AST from debug information.
8382 // See also:
8383 // C++11 [class.copy]p7, p18:
8384 // If the class definition declares a move constructor or move assignment
8385 // operator, an implicitly declared copy constructor or copy assignment
8386 // operator is defined as deleted.
8387 if (cxx_record_decl->hasUserDeclaredMoveConstructor() ||
8388 cxx_record_decl->hasUserDeclaredMoveAssignment()) {
8389 if (cxx_record_decl->needsImplicitCopyConstructor())
8390 cxx_record_decl->setImplicitCopyConstructorIsDeleted();
8391 if (cxx_record_decl->needsImplicitCopyAssignment())
8392 cxx_record_decl->setImplicitCopyAssignmentIsDeleted();
8393 }
8394
8395 if (!cxx_record_decl->isCompleteDefinition())
8396 cxx_record_decl->completeDefinition();
8397 cxx_record_decl->setHasLoadedFieldsFromExternalStorage(true);
8398 cxx_record_decl->setHasExternalLexicalStorage(false);
8399 cxx_record_decl->setHasExternalVisibleStorage(false);
8400 return true;
8401 }
8402 }
8403
8404 const clang::EnumType *enutype = qual_type->getAs<clang::EnumType>();
8405
8406 if (!enutype)
8407 return false;
8408 clang::EnumDecl *enum_decl = enutype->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
8409
8410 if (enum_decl->isCompleteDefinition())
8411 return true;
8412
8413 QualType integer_type(enum_decl->getIntegerType());
8414 if (!integer_type.isNull()) {
8415 clang::ASTContext &ast = lldb_ast->getASTContext();
8416
8417 unsigned NumNegativeBits = 0;
8418 unsigned NumPositiveBits = 0;
8419 ast.computeEnumBits(enum_decl->enumerators(), NumNegativeBits,
8420 NumPositiveBits);
8421
8422 clang::QualType BestPromotionType;
8423 clang::QualType BestType;
8424 ast.computeBestEnumTypes(/*IsPacked=*/false, NumNegativeBits,
8425 NumPositiveBits, BestType, BestPromotionType);
8426
8427 enum_decl->completeDefinition(enum_decl->getIntegerType(),
8428 BestPromotionType, NumPositiveBits,
8429 NumNegativeBits);
8430 }
8431 return true;
8432}
8433
8434clang::EnumConstantDecl *TypeSystemClang::AddEnumerationValueToEnumerationType(
8435 const CompilerType &enum_type, const Declaration &decl, const char *name,
8436 const llvm::APSInt &value) {
8437
8438 if (!enum_type || ConstString(name).IsEmpty())
8439 return nullptr;
8440
8441 lldbassert(enum_type.GetTypeSystem().GetSharedPointer().get() ==
8442 static_cast<TypeSystem *>(this));
8443
8444 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t enum_opaque_compiler_type =
8445 enum_type.GetOpaqueQualType();
8446
8447 if (!enum_opaque_compiler_type)
8448 return nullptr;
8449
8450 clang::QualType enum_qual_type(
8451 GetCanonicalQualType(enum_opaque_compiler_type));
8452
8453 const clang::Type *clang_type = enum_qual_type.getTypePtr();
8454
8455 if (!clang_type)
8456 return nullptr;
8457
8458 const clang::EnumType *enutype = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::EnumType>(clang_type);
8459
8460 if (!enutype)
8461 return nullptr;
8462
8463 clang::EnumConstantDecl *enumerator_decl =
8464 clang::EnumConstantDecl::CreateDeserialized(getASTContext(),
8465 GlobalDeclID());
8466 clang::EnumDecl *enum_decl = enutype->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
8467 enumerator_decl->setDeclContext(enum_decl);
8468 if (name && name[0])
8469 enumerator_decl->setDeclName(&getASTContext().Idents.get(name));
8470 enumerator_decl->setType(clang::QualType(enutype, 0));
8471 enumerator_decl->setInitVal(getASTContext(), value);
8472 enumerator_decl->setAccess(AS_public);
8473 SetMemberOwningModule(enumerator_decl, enum_decl);
8474
8475 if (!enum_decl)
8476 return nullptr;
8477
8478 enum_decl->addDecl(enumerator_decl);
8479
8480 VerifyDecl(enumerator_decl);
8481 return enumerator_decl;
8482}
8483
8484clang::EnumConstantDecl *TypeSystemClang::AddEnumerationValueToEnumerationType(
8485 const CompilerType &enum_type, const Declaration &decl, const char *name,
8486 uint64_t enum_value, uint32_t enum_value_bit_size) {
8487 assert(enum_type.IsEnumerationType());
8488 llvm::APSInt value(enum_value_bit_size,
8489 !enum_type.IsEnumerationIntegerTypeSigned());
8490 value = enum_value;
8491
8492 return AddEnumerationValueToEnumerationType(enum_type, decl, name, value);
8493}
8494
8495CompilerType TypeSystemClang::GetEnumerationIntegerType(CompilerType type) {
8496 clang::QualType qt(ClangUtil::GetQualType(type));
8497 const clang::Type *clang_type = qt.getTypePtrOrNull();
8498 const auto *enum_type = llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<clang::EnumType>(clang_type);
8499 if (!enum_type)
8500 return CompilerType();
8501
8502 return GetType(enum_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf()->getIntegerType());
8503}
8504
8505CompilerType
8506TypeSystemClang::CreateMemberPointerType(const CompilerType &type,
8507 const CompilerType &pointee_type) {
8508 if (type && pointee_type.IsValid() &&
8509 type.GetTypeSystem() == pointee_type.GetTypeSystem()) {
8510 auto ast = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
8511 if (!ast)
8512 return CompilerType();
8513 return ast->GetType(ast->getASTContext().getMemberPointerType(
8514 ClangUtil::GetQualType(pointee_type),
8515 /*Qualifier=*/std::nullopt,
8516 ClangUtil::GetQualType(type)->getAsCXXRecordDecl()));
8517 }
8518 return CompilerType();
8519}
8520
8521// Dumping types
8522#define DEPTH_INCREMENT 2
8523
8524#ifndef NDEBUG
8525LLVM_DUMP_METHOD void
8526TypeSystemClang::dump(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) const {
8527 if (!type)
8528 return;
8529 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
8530 qual_type.dump();
8531}
8532#endif
8533
8534namespace {
8535struct ScopedASTColor {
8536 ScopedASTColor(clang::ASTContext &ast, bool show_colors)
8537 : ast(ast), old_show_colors(ast.getDiagnostics().getShowColors()) {
8538 ast.getDiagnostics().setShowColors(show_colors);
8539 }
8540
8541 ~ScopedASTColor() { ast.getDiagnostics().setShowColors(old_show_colors); }
8542
8543 clang::ASTContext &ast;
8544 const bool old_show_colors;
8545};
8546} // namespace
8547
8548void TypeSystemClang::Dump(llvm::raw_ostream &output, llvm::StringRef filter,
8549 bool show_color) {
8550 ScopedASTColor colored(getASTContext(), show_color);
8551
8552 auto consumer =
8553 clang::CreateASTDumper(output, filter,
8554 /*DumpDecls=*/true,
8555 /*Deserialize=*/false,
8556 /*DumpLookups=*/false,
8557 /*DumpDeclTypes=*/false, clang::ADOF_Default);
8558 assert(consumer);
8559 assert(m_ast_up);
8560 consumer->HandleTranslationUnit(*m_ast_up);
8561}
8562
8563void TypeSystemClang::DumpFromSymbolFile(Stream &s,
8564 llvm::StringRef symbol_name) {
8565 SymbolFile *symfile = GetSymbolFile();
8566
8567 if (!symfile)
8568 return;
8569
8570 lldb_private::TypeList type_list;
8571 symfile->GetTypes(nullptr, eTypeClassAny, type_list);
8572 size_t ntypes = type_list.GetSize();
8573
8574 for (size_t i = 0; i < ntypes; ++i) {
8575 TypeSP type = type_list.GetTypeAtIndex(i);
8576
8577 if (!symbol_name.empty())
8578 if (symbol_name != type->GetName().GetStringRef())
8579 continue;
8580
8581 s << type->GetName().AsCString() << "\n";
8582
8583 CompilerType full_type = type->GetFullCompilerType();
8584 if (clang::TagDecl *tag_decl = GetAsTagDecl(full_type)) {
8585 tag_decl->dump(s.AsRawOstream());
8586 continue;
8587 }
8588 if (clang::TypedefNameDecl *typedef_decl = GetAsTypedefDecl(full_type)) {
8589 typedef_decl->dump(s.AsRawOstream());
8590 continue;
8591 }
8592 if (auto *objc_obj = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(
8593 ClangUtil::GetQualType(full_type).getTypePtr())) {
8594 if (clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *interface_decl = objc_obj->getInterface()) {
8595 interface_decl->dump(s.AsRawOstream());
8596 continue;
8597 }
8598 }
8599 GetCanonicalQualType(full_type.GetOpaqueQualType())
8600 .dump(s.AsRawOstream(), getASTContext());
8601 }
8602}
8603
8604static bool DumpEnumValue(const clang::QualType &qual_type, Stream &s,
8605 const DataExtractor &data, lldb::offset_t byte_offset,
8606 size_t byte_size, uint32_t bitfield_bit_offset,
8607 uint32_t bitfield_bit_size) {
8608 const clang::EnumType *enutype =
8609 llvm::cast<clang::EnumType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
8610 const clang::EnumDecl *enum_decl = enutype->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
8611 lldb::offset_t offset = byte_offset;
8612 bool qual_type_is_signed = qual_type->isSignedIntegerOrEnumerationType();
8613 const uint64_t enum_svalue =
8614 qual_type_is_signed
8615 ? data.GetMaxS64Bitfield(&offset, byte_size, bitfield_bit_size,
8616 bitfield_bit_offset)
8617 : data.GetMaxU64Bitfield(&offset, byte_size, bitfield_bit_size,
8618 bitfield_bit_offset);
8619 bool can_be_bitfield = true;
8620 uint64_t covered_bits = 0;
8621 int num_enumerators = 0;
8622
8623 // Try to find an exact match for the value.
8624 // At the same time, we're applying a heuristic to determine whether we want
8625 // to print this enum as a bitfield. We're likely dealing with a bitfield if
8626 // every enumerator is either a one bit value or a superset of the previous
8627 // enumerators. Also 0 doesn't make sense when the enumerators are used as
8628 // flags.
8629 clang::EnumDecl::enumerator_range enumerators = enum_decl->enumerators();
8630 if (enumerators.empty())
8631 can_be_bitfield = false;
8632 else {
8633 for (auto *enumerator : enumerators) {
8634 llvm::APSInt init_val = enumerator->getInitVal();
8635 uint64_t val = qual_type_is_signed ? init_val.getSExtValue()
8636 : init_val.getZExtValue();
8637 if (qual_type_is_signed)
8638 val = llvm::SignExtend64(val, 8 * byte_size);
8639 if (llvm::popcount(val) != 1 && (val & ~covered_bits) != 0)
8640 can_be_bitfield = false;
8641 covered_bits |= val;
8642 ++num_enumerators;
8643 if (val == enum_svalue) {
8644 // Found an exact match, that's all we need to do.
8645 s.PutCString(enumerator->getNameAsString());
8646 return true;
8647 }
8648 }
8649 }
8650
8651 // Unsigned values make more sense for flags.
8652 offset = byte_offset;
8653 const uint64_t enum_uvalue = data.GetMaxU64Bitfield(
8654 &offset, byte_size, bitfield_bit_size, bitfield_bit_offset);
8655
8656 // No exact match, but we don't think this is a bitfield. Print the value as
8657 // decimal.
8658 if (!can_be_bitfield) {
8659 if (qual_type_is_signed)
8660 s.Printf("%" PRIi64, enum_svalue);
8661 else
8662 s.Printf("%" PRIu64, enum_uvalue);
8663 return true;
8664 }
8665
8666 if (!enum_uvalue) {
8667 // This is a bitfield enum, but the value is 0 so we know it won't match
8668 // with any of the enumerators.
8669 s.Printf("0x%" PRIx64, enum_uvalue);
8670 return true;
8671 }
8672
8673 uint64_t remaining_value = enum_uvalue;
8674 std::vector<std::pair<uint64_t, llvm::StringRef>> values;
8675 values.reserve(num_enumerators);
8676 for (auto *enumerator : enum_decl->enumerators())
8677 if (auto val = enumerator->getInitVal().getZExtValue())
8678 values.emplace_back(val, enumerator->getName());
8679
8680 // Sort in reverse order of the number of the population count, so that in
8681 // `enum {A, B, ALL = A|B }` we visit ALL first. Use a stable sort so that
8682 // A | C where A is declared before C is displayed in this order.
8683 llvm::stable_sort(values, [](const auto &a, const auto &b) {
8684 return llvm::popcount(a.first) > llvm::popcount(b.first);
8685 });
8686
8687 for (const auto &val : values) {
8688 if ((remaining_value & val.first) != val.first)
8689 continue;
8690 remaining_value &= ~val.first;
8691 s.PutCString(val.second);
8692 if (remaining_value)
8693 s.PutCString(" | ");
8694 }
8695
8696 // If there is a remainder that is not covered by the value, print it as
8697 // hex.
8698 if (remaining_value)
8699 s.Printf("0x%" PRIx64, remaining_value);
8700
8701 return true;
8702}
8703
8704bool TypeSystemClang::DumpTypeValue(
8705 lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type, Stream &s, lldb::Format format,
8706 const lldb_private::DataExtractor &data, lldb::offset_t byte_offset,
8707 size_t byte_size, uint32_t bitfield_bit_size, uint32_t bitfield_bit_offset,
8708 ExecutionContextScope *exe_scope) {
8709 if (!type)
8710 return false;
8711 if (IsAggregateType(type)) {
8712 return false;
8713 } else {
8714 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
8715
8716 switch (qual_type->getTypeClass()) {
8717 case clang::Type::Typedef: {
8718 clang::QualType typedef_qual_type =
8719 llvm::cast<clang::TypedefType>(qual_type)
8720 ->getDecl()
8721 ->getUnderlyingType();
8722 CompilerType typedef_clang_type = GetType(typedef_qual_type);
8723 if (format == eFormatDefault)
8724 format = typedef_clang_type.GetFormat();
8725 clang::TypeInfo typedef_type_info =
8726 getASTContext().getTypeInfo(typedef_qual_type);
8727 uint64_t typedef_byte_size = typedef_type_info.Width / 8;
8728
8729 return typedef_clang_type.DumpTypeValue(
8730 &s,
8731 format, // The format with which to display the element
8732 data, // Data buffer containing all bytes for this type
8733 byte_offset, // Offset into "data" where to grab value from
8734 typedef_byte_size, // Size of this type in bytes
8735 bitfield_bit_size, // Size in bits of a bitfield value, if zero don't
8736 // treat as a bitfield
8737 bitfield_bit_offset, // Offset in bits of a bitfield value if
8738 // bitfield_bit_size != 0
8739 exe_scope);
8740 } break;
8741
8742 case clang::Type::Enum:
8743 // If our format is enum or default, show the enumeration value as its
8744 // enumeration string value, else just display it as requested.
8745 if ((format == eFormatEnum || format == eFormatDefault) &&
8746 GetCompleteType(type))
8747 return DumpEnumValue(qual_type, s, data, byte_offset, byte_size,
8748 bitfield_bit_offset, bitfield_bit_size);
8749 // format was not enum, just fall through and dump the value as
8750 // requested....
8751 [[fallthrough]];
8752
8753 default:
8754 // We are down to a scalar type that we just need to display.
8755 {
8756 uint32_t item_count = 1;
8757 // A few formats, we might need to modify our size and count for
8758 // depending
8759 // on how we are trying to display the value...
8760 switch (format) {
8761 default:
8762 case eFormatBoolean:
8763 case eFormatBinary:
8764 case eFormatComplex:
8765 case eFormatCString: // NULL terminated C strings
8766 case eFormatDecimal:
8767 case eFormatEnum:
8768 case eFormatHex:
8769 case eFormatHexUppercase:
8770 case eFormatFloat:
8771 case eFormatFloat128:
8772 case eFormatOctal:
8773 case eFormatOSType:
8774 case eFormatUnsigned:
8775 case eFormatPointer:
8776 case eFormatVectorOfChar:
8777 case eFormatVectorOfSInt8:
8778 case eFormatVectorOfUInt8:
8779 case eFormatVectorOfSInt16:
8780 case eFormatVectorOfUInt16:
8781 case eFormatVectorOfSInt32:
8782 case eFormatVectorOfUInt32:
8783 case eFormatVectorOfSInt64:
8784 case eFormatVectorOfUInt64:
8785 case eFormatVectorOfFloat32:
8786 case eFormatVectorOfFloat64:
8787 case eFormatVectorOfUInt128:
8788 break;
8789
8790 case eFormatChar:
8791 case eFormatCharPrintable:
8792 case eFormatCharArray:
8793 case eFormatBytes:
8794 case eFormatUnicode8:
8795 case eFormatBytesWithASCII:
8796 item_count = byte_size;
8797 byte_size = 1;
8798 break;
8799
8800 case eFormatUnicode16:
8801 item_count = byte_size / 2;
8802 byte_size = 2;
8803 break;
8804
8805 case eFormatUnicode32:
8806 item_count = byte_size / 4;
8807 byte_size = 4;
8808 break;
8809 }
8810 return DumpDataExtractor(data, &s, byte_offset, format, byte_size,
8811 item_count, UINT32_MAX, LLDB_INVALID_ADDRESS,
8812 bitfield_bit_size, bitfield_bit_offset,
8813 exe_scope);
8814 }
8815 break;
8816 }
8817 }
8818 return false;
8819}
8820
8821void TypeSystemClang::DumpTypeDescription(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
8822 lldb::DescriptionLevel level) {
8823 StreamFile s(stdout, false);
8824 DumpTypeDescription(type, s, level);
8825
8826 CompilerType ct(weak_from_this(), type);
8827 const clang::Type *clang_type = ClangUtil::GetQualType(ct).getTypePtr();
8828 if (std::optional<ClangASTMetadata> metadata = GetMetadata(clang_type)) {
8829 metadata->Dump(&s);
8830 }
8831}
8832
8833void TypeSystemClang::DumpTypeDescription(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type,
8834 Stream &s,
8835 lldb::DescriptionLevel level) {
8836 if (type) {
8837 clang::QualType qual_type =
8838 RemoveWrappingTypes(GetQualType(type), {clang::Type::Typedef});
8839
8840 llvm::SmallVector<char, 1024> buf;
8841 llvm::raw_svector_ostream llvm_ostrm(buf);
8842
8843 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
8844 switch (type_class) {
8845 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
8846 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface: {
8847 GetCompleteType(type);
8848
8849 auto *objc_class_type =
8850 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
8851 assert(objc_class_type);
8852 if (!objc_class_type)
8853 break;
8854 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
8855 objc_class_type->getInterface();
8856 if (!class_interface_decl)
8857 break;
8858 if (level == eDescriptionLevelVerbose)
8859 class_interface_decl->dump(llvm_ostrm);
8860 else
8861 class_interface_decl->print(llvm_ostrm,
8862 getASTContext().getPrintingPolicy(),
8863 s.GetIndentLevel());
8864 } break;
8865
8866 case clang::Type::Typedef: {
8867 auto *typedef_type = qual_type->getAs<clang::TypedefType>();
8868 if (!typedef_type)
8869 break;
8870 const clang::TypedefNameDecl *typedef_decl = typedef_type->getDecl();
8871 if (level == eDescriptionLevelVerbose)
8872 typedef_decl->dump(llvm_ostrm);
8873 else {
8874 std::string clang_typedef_name(GetTypeNameForDecl(typedef_decl));
8875 if (!clang_typedef_name.empty()) {
8876 s.PutCString("typedef ");
8877 s.PutCString(clang_typedef_name);
8878 }
8879 }
8880 } break;
8881
8882 case clang::Type::Record: {
8883 GetCompleteType(type);
8884
8885 auto *record_type = llvm::cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
8886 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl = record_type->getDecl();
8887 if (level == eDescriptionLevelVerbose)
8888 record_decl->dump(llvm_ostrm);
8889 else {
8890 record_decl->print(llvm_ostrm, getASTContext().getPrintingPolicy(),
8891 s.GetIndentLevel());
8892 }
8893 } break;
8894
8895 default: {
8896 if (auto *tag_type =
8897 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::TagType>(qual_type.getTypePtr())) {
8898 if (clang::TagDecl *tag_decl = tag_type->getDecl()) {
8899 if (level == eDescriptionLevelVerbose)
8900 tag_decl->dump(llvm_ostrm);
8901 else
8902 tag_decl->print(llvm_ostrm, 0);
8903 }
8904 } else {
8905 if (level == eDescriptionLevelVerbose)
8906 qual_type->dump(llvm_ostrm, getASTContext());
8907 else {
8908 std::string clang_type_name(qual_type.getAsString());
8909 if (!clang_type_name.empty())
8910 s.PutCString(clang_type_name);
8911 }
8912 }
8913 }
8914 }
8915
8916 if (buf.size() > 0) {
8917 s.Write(buf.data(), buf.size());
8918 }
8919}
8920}
8921
8922void TypeSystemClang::DumpTypeName(const CompilerType &type) {
8923 if (ClangUtil::IsClangType(type)) {
8924 clang::QualType qual_type(
8925 ClangUtil::GetCanonicalQualType(ClangUtil::RemoveFastQualifiers(type)));
8926
8927 const clang::Type::TypeClass type_class = qual_type->getTypeClass();
8928 switch (type_class) {
8929 case clang::Type::Record: {
8930 const clang::CXXRecordDecl *cxx_record_decl =
8931 qual_type->getAsCXXRecordDecl();
8932 if (cxx_record_decl)
8933 printf("class %s", cxx_record_decl->getName().str().c_str());
8934 } break;
8935
8936 case clang::Type::Enum: {
8937 clang::EnumDecl *enum_decl =
8938 llvm::cast<clang::EnumType>(qual_type)->getDecl();
8939 if (enum_decl) {
8940 printf("enum %s", enum_decl->getName().str().c_str());
8941 }
8942 } break;
8943
8944 case clang::Type::ObjCObject:
8945 case clang::Type::ObjCInterface: {
8946 const clang::ObjCObjectType *objc_class_type =
8947 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCObjectType>(qual_type);
8948 if (objc_class_type) {
8949 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *class_interface_decl =
8950 objc_class_type->getInterface();
8951 // We currently can't complete objective C types through the newly
8952 // added ASTContext because it only supports TagDecl objects right
8953 // now...
8954 if (class_interface_decl)
8955 printf("@class %s", class_interface_decl->getName().str().c_str());
8956 }
8957 } break;
8958
8959 case clang::Type::Typedef:
8960 printf("typedef %s", llvm::cast<clang::TypedefType>(qual_type)
8961 ->getDecl()
8962 ->getName()
8963 .str()
8964 .c_str());
8965 break;
8966
8967 case clang::Type::Auto:
8968 printf("auto ");
8969 return DumpTypeName(CompilerType(type.GetTypeSystem(),
8970 llvm::cast<clang::AutoType>(qual_type)
8971 ->getDeducedType()
8972 .getAsOpaquePtr()));
8973
8974 case clang::Type::Paren:
8975 printf("paren ");
8976 return DumpTypeName(CompilerType(
8977 type.GetTypeSystem(),
8978 llvm::cast<clang::ParenType>(qual_type)->desugar().getAsOpaquePtr()));
8979
8980 default:
8981 printf("TypeSystemClang::DumpTypeName() type_class = %u", type_class);
8982 break;
8983 }
8984 }
8985}
8986
8987clang::ClassTemplateDecl *TypeSystemClang::ParseClassTemplateDecl(
8988 clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx, OptionalClangModuleID owning_module,
8989 lldb::AccessType access_type, const char *parent_name, int tag_decl_kind,
8990 const TypeSystemClang::TemplateParameterInfos &template_param_infos) {
8991 if (template_param_infos.IsValid()) {
8992 std::string template_basename(parent_name);
8993 // With -gsimple-template-names we may omit template parameters in the name.
8994 if (auto i = template_basename.find('<'); i != std::string::npos)
8995 template_basename.erase(i);
8996
8997 return CreateClassTemplateDecl(decl_ctx, owning_module,
8998 /*access_type=*/{},
8999 template_basename.c_str(), tag_decl_kind,
9000 template_param_infos);
9001 }
9002 return nullptr;
9003}
9004
9005void TypeSystemClang::CompleteTagDecl(clang::TagDecl *decl) {
9006 SymbolFile *sym_file = GetSymbolFile();
9007 if (sym_file) {
9008 CompilerType clang_type = GetTypeForDecl(decl);
9009 if (clang_type)
9010 sym_file->CompleteType(clang_type);
9011 }
9012}
9013
9014void TypeSystemClang::CompleteObjCInterfaceDecl(
9015 clang::ObjCInterfaceDecl *decl) {
9016 SymbolFile *sym_file = GetSymbolFile();
9017 if (sym_file) {
9018 CompilerType clang_type = GetTypeForDecl(decl);
9019 if (clang_type)
9020 sym_file->CompleteType(clang_type);
9021 }
9022}
9023
9024DWARFASTParser *TypeSystemClang::GetDWARFParser() {
9025 if (!m_dwarf_ast_parser_up)
9026 m_dwarf_ast_parser_up = std::make_unique<DWARFASTParserClang>(*this);
9027 return m_dwarf_ast_parser_up.get();
9028}
9029
9030PDBASTParser *TypeSystemClang::GetPDBParser() {
9031 if (!m_pdb_ast_parser_up)
9032 m_pdb_ast_parser_up = std::make_unique<PDBASTParser>(*this);
9033 return m_pdb_ast_parser_up.get();
9034}
9035
9036npdb::PdbAstBuilder *TypeSystemClang::GetNativePDBParser() {
9037 if (!m_native_pdb_ast_parser_up)
9038 m_native_pdb_ast_parser_up =
9039 std::make_unique<npdb::PdbAstBuilderClang>(*this);
9040 return m_native_pdb_ast_parser_up.get();
9041}
9042
9043bool TypeSystemClang::LayoutRecordType(
9044 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl, uint64_t &bit_size,
9045 uint64_t &alignment,
9046 llvm::DenseMap<const clang::FieldDecl *, uint64_t> &field_offsets,
9047 llvm::DenseMap<const clang::CXXRecordDecl *, clang::CharUnits>
9048 &base_offsets,
9049 llvm::DenseMap<const clang::CXXRecordDecl *, clang::CharUnits>
9050 &vbase_offsets) {
9051 lldb_private::ClangASTImporter *importer = nullptr;
9052 if (m_dwarf_ast_parser_up)
9053 importer = &m_dwarf_ast_parser_up->GetClangASTImporter();
9054 if (!importer && m_pdb_ast_parser_up)
9055 importer = &m_pdb_ast_parser_up->GetClangASTImporter();
9056 if (!importer && m_native_pdb_ast_parser_up)
9057 importer = &m_native_pdb_ast_parser_up->GetClangASTImporter();
9058 if (!importer)
9059 return false;
9060
9061 return importer->LayoutRecordType(record_decl, bit_size, alignment,
9062 field_offsets, base_offsets, vbase_offsets);
9063}
9064
9065// CompilerDecl override functions
9066
9067ConstString TypeSystemClang::DeclGetName(void *opaque_decl) {
9068 if (opaque_decl) {
9069 clang::NamedDecl *nd =
9070 llvm::dyn_cast<NamedDecl>((clang::Decl *)opaque_decl);
9071 if (nd != nullptr)
9072 return ConstString(GetTypeNameForDecl(nd, /*qualified=*/false));
9073 }
9074 return ConstString();
9075}
9076
9077static ConstString
9078ExtractMangledNameFromFunctionCallLabel(llvm::StringRef label) {
9079 auto label_or_err = FunctionCallLabel::fromString(label);
9080 if (!label_or_err) {
9081 llvm::consumeError(label_or_err.takeError());
9082 return {};
9083 }
9084
9085 llvm::StringRef mangled = label_or_err->lookup_name;
9086 if (Mangled::IsMangledName(mangled))
9087 return ConstString(mangled);
9088
9089 return {};
9090}
9091
9092ConstString TypeSystemClang::DeclGetMangledName(void *opaque_decl) {
9093 clang::NamedDecl *nd = llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<clang::NamedDecl>(
9094 static_cast<clang::Decl *>(opaque_decl));
9095
9096 if (!nd || llvm::isa<clang::ObjCMethodDecl>(nd))
9097 return {};
9098
9099 clang::MangleContext *mc = getMangleContext();
9100 if (!mc || !mc->shouldMangleCXXName(nd))
9101 return {};
9102
9103 // We have an LLDB FunctionCallLabel instead of an ordinary mangled name.
9104 // Extract the mangled name out of this label.
9105 if (const auto *label = nd->getAttr<AsmLabelAttr>())
9106 if (ConstString mangled =
9107 ExtractMangledNameFromFunctionCallLabel(label->getLabel()))
9108 return mangled;
9109
9110 llvm::SmallVector<char, 1024> buf;
9111 llvm::raw_svector_ostream llvm_ostrm(buf);
9112 if (llvm::isa<clang::CXXConstructorDecl>(nd)) {
9113 mc->mangleName(
9114 clang::GlobalDecl(llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXConstructorDecl>(nd),
9115 Ctor_Complete),
9116 llvm_ostrm);
9117 } else if (llvm::isa<clang::CXXDestructorDecl>(nd)) {
9118 mc->mangleName(
9119 clang::GlobalDecl(llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXDestructorDecl>(nd),
9120 Dtor_Complete),
9121 llvm_ostrm);
9122 } else {
9123 mc->mangleName(nd, llvm_ostrm);
9124 }
9125
9126 if (buf.size() > 0)
9127 return ConstString(buf.data(), buf.size());
9128
9129 return {};
9130}
9131
