9132CompilerDeclContext TypeSystemClang::DeclGetDeclContext(void *opaque_decl) {
9133 if (opaque_decl)
9134 return CreateDeclContext(((clang::Decl *)opaque_decl)->getDeclContext());
9135 return CompilerDeclContext();
9136}
9137
9138CompilerType TypeSystemClang::DeclGetFunctionReturnType(void *opaque_decl) {
9139 if (clang::FunctionDecl *func_decl =
9140 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionDecl>((clang::Decl *)opaque_decl))
9141 return GetType(func_decl->getReturnType());
9142 if (clang::ObjCMethodDecl *objc_method =
9143 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCMethodDecl>((clang::Decl *)opaque_decl))
9144 return GetType(objc_method->getReturnType());
9145 else
9146 return CompilerType();
9147}
9148
9149size_t TypeSystemClang::DeclGetFunctionNumArguments(void *opaque_decl) {
9150 if (clang::FunctionDecl *func_decl =
9151 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionDecl>((clang::Decl *)opaque_decl))
9152 return func_decl->param_size();
9153 if (clang::ObjCMethodDecl *objc_method =
9154 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCMethodDecl>((clang::Decl *)opaque_decl))
9155 return objc_method->param_size();
9156 else
9157 return 0;
9158}
9159
9160static CompilerContextKind GetCompilerKind(clang::Decl::Kind clang_kind,
9161 clang::DeclContext const *decl_ctx) {
9162 switch (clang_kind) {
9163 case Decl::TranslationUnit:
9164 return CompilerContextKind::TranslationUnit;
9165 case Decl::Namespace:
9166 return CompilerContextKind::Namespace;
9167 case Decl::Var:
9168 return CompilerContextKind::Variable;
9169 case Decl::Enum:
9170 return CompilerContextKind::Enum;
9171 case Decl::Typedef:
9172 return CompilerContextKind::Typedef;
9173 default:
9174 // Many other kinds have multiple values
9175 if (decl_ctx) {
9176 if (decl_ctx->isFunctionOrMethod())
9177 return CompilerContextKind::Function;
9178 if (decl_ctx->isRecord())
9179 return CompilerContextKind::ClassOrStruct | CompilerContextKind::Union;
9180 }
9181 break;
9182 }
9183 return CompilerContextKind::Any;
9184}
9185
9186static void
9187InsertCompilerContext(TypeSystemClang *ts, clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx,
9188 std::vector<lldb_private::CompilerContext> &context) {
9189 if (decl_ctx == nullptr)
9190 return;
9191 InsertCompilerContext(ts, decl_ctx->getParent(), context);
9192 clang::Decl::Kind clang_kind = decl_ctx->getDeclKind();
9193 if (clang_kind == Decl::TranslationUnit)
9194 return; // Stop at the translation unit.
9195 const CompilerContextKind compiler_kind =
9196 GetCompilerKind(clang_kind, decl_ctx);
9197 ConstString decl_ctx_name = ts->DeclContextGetName(decl_ctx);
9198 context.push_back({compiler_kind, decl_ctx_name});
9199}
9200
9201std::vector<lldb_private::CompilerContext>
9202TypeSystemClang::DeclGetCompilerContext(void *opaque_decl) {
9203 std::vector<lldb_private::CompilerContext> context;
9204 ConstString decl_name = DeclGetName(opaque_decl);
9205 if (decl_name) {
9206 clang::Decl *decl = (clang::Decl *)opaque_decl;
9207 // Add the entire decl context first
9208 clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx = decl->getDeclContext();
9209 InsertCompilerContext(this, decl_ctx, context);
9210 // Now add the decl information
9211 auto compiler_kind =
9212 GetCompilerKind(decl->getKind(), dyn_cast<DeclContext>(decl));
9213 context.push_back({compiler_kind, decl_name});
9214 }
9215 return context;
9216}
9217
9218CompilerType TypeSystemClang::DeclGetFunctionArgumentType(void *opaque_decl,
9219 size_t idx) {
9220 if (clang::FunctionDecl *func_decl =
9221 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionDecl>((clang::Decl *)opaque_decl)) {
9222 if (idx < func_decl->param_size()) {
9223 ParmVarDecl *var_decl = func_decl->getParamDecl(idx);
9224 if (var_decl)
9225 return GetType(var_decl->getOriginalType());
9226 }
9227 } else if (clang::ObjCMethodDecl *objc_method =
9228 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCMethodDecl>(
9229 (clang::Decl *)opaque_decl)) {
9230 if (idx < objc_method->param_size())
9231 return GetType(objc_method->parameters()[idx]->getOriginalType());
9232 }
9233 return CompilerType();
9234}
9235
9236Scalar TypeSystemClang::DeclGetConstantValue(void *opaque_decl) {
9237 clang::Decl *decl = static_cast<clang::Decl *>(opaque_decl);
9238 clang::VarDecl *var_decl = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::VarDecl>(decl);
9239 if (!var_decl)
9240 return Scalar();
9241 clang::Expr *init_expr = var_decl->getInit();
9242 if (!init_expr)
9243 return Scalar();
9244 std::optional<llvm::APSInt> value =
9245 init_expr->getIntegerConstantExpr(getASTContext());
9246 if (!value)
9247 return Scalar();
9248 return Scalar(*value);
9249}
9250
9251// CompilerDeclContext functions
9252
9253std::vector<CompilerDecl> TypeSystemClang::DeclContextFindDeclByName(
9254 void *opaque_decl_ctx, ConstString name, const bool ignore_using_decls) {
9255 std::vector<CompilerDecl> found_decls;
9256 SymbolFile *symbol_file = GetSymbolFile();
9257 if (opaque_decl_ctx && symbol_file) {
9258 DeclContext *root_decl_ctx = (DeclContext *)opaque_decl_ctx;
9259 std::set<DeclContext *> searched;
9260 std::multimap<DeclContext *, DeclContext *> search_queue;
9261
9262 for (clang::DeclContext *decl_context = root_decl_ctx;
9263 decl_context != nullptr && found_decls.empty();
9264 decl_context = decl_context->getParent()) {
9265 search_queue.insert(std::make_pair(decl_context, decl_context));
9266
9267 for (auto it = search_queue.find(decl_context); it != search_queue.end();
9268 it++) {
9269 if (!searched.insert(it->second).second)
9270 continue;
9271 symbol_file->ParseDeclsForContext(
9272 CreateDeclContext(it->second));
9273
9274 for (clang::Decl *child : it->second->decls()) {
9275 if (clang::UsingDirectiveDecl *ud =
9276 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::UsingDirectiveDecl>(child)) {
9277 if (ignore_using_decls)
9278 continue;
9279 clang::DeclContext *from = ud->getCommonAncestor();
9280 if (searched.find(ud->getNominatedNamespace()) == searched.end())
9281 search_queue.insert(
9282 std::make_pair(from, ud->getNominatedNamespace()));
9283 } else if (clang::UsingDecl *ud =
9284 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::UsingDecl>(child)) {
9285 if (ignore_using_decls)
9286 continue;
9287 for (clang::UsingShadowDecl *usd : ud->shadows()) {
9288 clang::Decl *target = usd->getTargetDecl();
9289 if (clang::NamedDecl *nd =
9290 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::NamedDecl>(target)) {
9291 IdentifierInfo *ii = nd->getIdentifier();
9292 if (ii != nullptr && ii->getName() == name.AsCString(nullptr))
9293 found_decls.push_back(GetCompilerDecl(nd));
9294 }
9295 }
9296 } else if (clang::NamedDecl *nd =
9297 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::NamedDecl>(child)) {
9298 IdentifierInfo *ii = nd->getIdentifier();
9299 if (ii != nullptr && ii->getName() == name.AsCString(nullptr))
9300 found_decls.push_back(GetCompilerDecl(nd));
9301 }
9302 }
9303 }
9304 }
9305 }
9306 return found_decls;
9307}
9308
9309// Look for child_decl_ctx's lookup scope in frame_decl_ctx and its parents,
9310// and return the number of levels it took to find it, or
9311// LLDB_INVALID_DECL_LEVEL if not found. If the decl was imported via a using
9312// declaration, its name and/or type, if set, will be used to check that the
9313// decl found in the scope is a match.
9314//
9315// The optional name is required by languages (like C++) to handle using
9316// declarations like:
9317//
9318// void poo();
9319// namespace ns {
9320// void foo();
9321// void goo();
9322// }
9323// void bar() {
9324// using ns::foo;
9325// // CountDeclLevels returns 0 for 'foo', 1 for 'poo', and
9326// // LLDB_INVALID_DECL_LEVEL for 'goo'.
9327// }
9328//
9329// The optional type is useful in the case that there's a specific overload
9330// that we're looking for that might otherwise be shadowed, like:
9331//
9332// void foo(int);
9333// namespace ns {
9334// void foo();
9335// }
9336// void bar() {
9337// using ns::foo;
9338// // CountDeclLevels returns 0 for { 'foo', void() },
9339// // 1 for { 'foo', void(int) }, and
9340// // LLDB_INVALID_DECL_LEVEL for { 'foo', void(int, int) }.
9341// }
9342//
9343// NOTE: Because file statics are at the TranslationUnit along with globals, a
9344// function at file scope will return the same level as a function at global
9345// scope. Ideally we'd like to treat the file scope as an additional scope just
9346// below the global scope. More work needs to be done to recognise that, if
9347// the decl we're trying to look up is static, we should compare its source
9348// file with that of the current scope and return a lower number for it.
9349uint32_t TypeSystemClang::CountDeclLevels(clang::DeclContext *frame_decl_ctx,
9350 clang::DeclContext *child_decl_ctx,
9351 ConstString *child_name,
9352 CompilerType *child_type) {
9353 SymbolFile *symbol_file = GetSymbolFile();
9354 if (frame_decl_ctx && symbol_file) {
9355 std::set<DeclContext *> searched;
9356 std::multimap<DeclContext *, DeclContext *> search_queue;
9357
9358 // Get the lookup scope for the decl we're trying to find.
9359 clang::DeclContext *parent_decl_ctx = child_decl_ctx->getParent();
9360
9361 // Look for it in our scope's decl context and its parents.
9362 uint32_t level = 0;
9363 for (clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx = frame_decl_ctx; decl_ctx != nullptr;
9364 decl_ctx = decl_ctx->getParent()) {
9365 if (!decl_ctx->isLookupContext())
9366 continue;
9367 if (decl_ctx == parent_decl_ctx)
9368 // Found it!
9369 return level;
9370 search_queue.insert(std::make_pair(decl_ctx, decl_ctx));
9371 for (auto it = search_queue.find(decl_ctx); it != search_queue.end();
9372 it++) {
9373 if (searched.find(it->second) != searched.end())
9374 continue;
9375
9376 // Currently DWARF has one shared translation unit for all Decls at top
9377 // level, so this would erroneously find using statements anywhere. So
9378 // don't look at the top-level translation unit.
9379 // TODO fix this and add a testcase that depends on it.
9380
9381 if (llvm::isa<clang::TranslationUnitDecl>(it->second))
9382 continue;
9383
9384 searched.insert(it->second);
9385 symbol_file->ParseDeclsForContext(
9386 CreateDeclContext(it->second));
9387
9388 for (clang::Decl *child : it->second->decls()) {
9389 if (clang::UsingDirectiveDecl *ud =
9390 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::UsingDirectiveDecl>(child)) {
9391 clang::DeclContext *ns = ud->getNominatedNamespace();
9392 if (ns == parent_decl_ctx)
9393 // Found it!
9394 return level;
9395 clang::DeclContext *from = ud->getCommonAncestor();
9396 if (searched.find(ns) == searched.end())
9397 search_queue.insert(std::make_pair(from, ns));
9398 } else if (child_name) {
9399 if (clang::UsingDecl *ud =
9400 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::UsingDecl>(child)) {
9401 for (clang::UsingShadowDecl *usd : ud->shadows()) {
9402 clang::Decl *target = usd->getTargetDecl();
9403 clang::NamedDecl *nd = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::NamedDecl>(target);
9404 if (!nd)
9405 continue;
9406 // Check names.
9407 IdentifierInfo *ii = nd->getIdentifier();
9408 if (ii == nullptr ||
9409 ii->getName() != child_name->AsCString(nullptr))
9410 continue;
9411 // Check types, if one was provided.
9412 if (child_type) {
9413 CompilerType clang_type = GetTypeForDecl(nd);
9414 if (!AreTypesSame(clang_type, *child_type,
9415 /*ignore_qualifiers=*/true))
9416 continue;
9417 }
9418 // Found it!
9419 return level;
9420 }
9421 }
9422 }
9423 }
9424 }
9425 ++level;
9426 }
9427 }
9428 return LLDB_INVALID_DECL_LEVEL;
9429}
9430
9431ConstString TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetName(void *opaque_decl_ctx) {
9432 if (opaque_decl_ctx) {
9433 clang::NamedDecl *named_decl =
9434 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::NamedDecl>((clang::DeclContext *)opaque_decl_ctx);
9435 if (named_decl) {
9436 std::string name;
9437 llvm::raw_string_ostream stream{name};
9438 auto policy = GetTypePrintingPolicy();
9439 policy.AlwaysIncludeTypeForTemplateArgument = true;
9440 named_decl->getNameForDiagnostic(stream, policy, /*qualified=*/false);
9441 return ConstString(name);
9442 }
9443 }
9444 return ConstString();
9445}
9446
9447ConstString
9448TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetScopeQualifiedName(void *opaque_decl_ctx) {
9449 if (opaque_decl_ctx) {
9450 clang::NamedDecl *named_decl =
9451 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::NamedDecl>((clang::DeclContext *)opaque_decl_ctx);
9452 if (named_decl)
9453 return ConstString(GetTypeNameForDecl(named_decl));
9454 }
9455 return ConstString();
9456}
9457
9458bool TypeSystemClang::DeclContextIsClassMethod(void *opaque_decl_ctx) {
9459 if (!opaque_decl_ctx)
9460 return false;
9461
9462 clang::DeclContext *decl_ctx = (clang::DeclContext *)opaque_decl_ctx;
9463 if (llvm::isa<clang::ObjCMethodDecl>(decl_ctx)) {
9464 return true;
9465 } else if (llvm::isa<clang::CXXMethodDecl>(decl_ctx)) {
9466 return true;
9467 } else if (clang::FunctionDecl *fun_decl =
9468 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionDecl>(decl_ctx)) {
9469 if (std::optional<ClangASTMetadata> metadata = GetMetadata(fun_decl))
9470 return metadata->HasObjectPtr();
9471 }
9472
9473 return false;
9474}
9475
9476std::vector<lldb_private::CompilerContext>
9477TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetCompilerContext(void *opaque_decl_ctx) {
9478 auto *decl_ctx = (clang::DeclContext *)opaque_decl_ctx;
9479 std::vector<lldb_private::CompilerContext> context;
9480 InsertCompilerContext(this, decl_ctx, context);
9481 return context;
9482}
9483
9484bool TypeSystemClang::DeclContextIsContainedInLookup(
9485 void *opaque_decl_ctx, void *other_opaque_decl_ctx) {
9486 auto *decl_ctx = (clang::DeclContext *)opaque_decl_ctx;
9487 auto *other = (clang::DeclContext *)other_opaque_decl_ctx;
9488
9489 // If we have an inline or anonymous namespace, then the lookup of the
9490 // parent context also includes those namespace contents.
9491 auto is_transparent_lookup_allowed = [](clang::DeclContext *DC) {
9492 if (DC->isInlineNamespace())
9493 return true;
9494
9495 if (auto const *NS = dyn_cast<NamespaceDecl>(DC))
9496 return NS->isAnonymousNamespace();
9497
9498 return false;
9499 };
9500
9501 do {
9502 // A decl context always includes its own contents in its lookup.
9503 if (decl_ctx == other)
9504 return true;
9505 } while (is_transparent_lookup_allowed(other) &&
9506 (other = other->getParent()));
9507
9508 return false;
9509}
9510
9511lldb::LanguageType
9512TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetLanguage(void *opaque_decl_ctx) {
9513 if (!opaque_decl_ctx)
9514 return eLanguageTypeUnknown;
9515
9516 auto *decl_ctx = (clang::DeclContext *)opaque_decl_ctx;
9517 if (llvm::isa<clang::ObjCMethodDecl>(decl_ctx)) {
9518 return eLanguageTypeObjC;
9519 } else if (llvm::isa<clang::CXXMethodDecl>(decl_ctx)) {
9520 return eLanguageTypeC_plus_plus;
9521 } else if (auto *fun_decl = llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionDecl>(decl_ctx)) {
9522 if (std::optional<ClangASTMetadata> metadata = GetMetadata(fun_decl))
9523 return metadata->GetObjectPtrLanguage();
9524 }
9525
9526 return eLanguageTypeUnknown;
9527}
9528
9529static bool IsClangDeclContext(const CompilerDeclContext &dc) {
9530 return dc.IsValid() && isa<TypeSystemClang>(dc.GetTypeSystem());
9531}
9532
9533clang::DeclContext *
9534TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetAsDeclContext(const CompilerDeclContext &dc) {
9535 if (IsClangDeclContext(dc))
9536 return (clang::DeclContext *)dc.GetOpaqueDeclContext();
9537 return nullptr;
9538}
9539
9540ObjCMethodDecl *
9541TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetAsObjCMethodDecl(const CompilerDeclContext &dc) {
9542 if (IsClangDeclContext(dc))
9543 return llvm::dyn_cast<clang::ObjCMethodDecl>(
9544 (clang::DeclContext *)dc.GetOpaqueDeclContext());
9545 return nullptr;
9546}
9547
9548CXXMethodDecl *
9549TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetAsCXXMethodDecl(const CompilerDeclContext &dc) {
9550 if (IsClangDeclContext(dc))
9551 return llvm::dyn_cast<clang::CXXMethodDecl>(
9552 (clang::DeclContext *)dc.GetOpaqueDeclContext());
9553 return nullptr;
9554}
9555
9556clang::FunctionDecl *
9557TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetAsFunctionDecl(const CompilerDeclContext &dc) {
9558 if (IsClangDeclContext(dc))
9559 return llvm::dyn_cast<clang::FunctionDecl>(
9560 (clang::DeclContext *)dc.GetOpaqueDeclContext());
9561 return nullptr;
9562}
9563
9564clang::NamespaceDecl *
9565TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetAsNamespaceDecl(const CompilerDeclContext &dc) {
9566 if (IsClangDeclContext(dc))
9567 return llvm::dyn_cast<clang::NamespaceDecl>(
9568 (clang::DeclContext *)dc.GetOpaqueDeclContext());
9569 return nullptr;
9570}
9571
9572std::optional<ClangASTMetadata>
9573TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetMetaData(const CompilerDeclContext &dc,
9574 const Decl *object) {
9575 TypeSystemClang *ast = llvm::cast<TypeSystemClang>(dc.GetTypeSystem());
9576 return ast->GetMetadata(object);
9577}
9578
9579clang::ASTContext *
9580TypeSystemClang::DeclContextGetTypeSystemClang(const CompilerDeclContext &dc) {
9581 TypeSystemClang *ast =
9582 llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<TypeSystemClang>(dc.GetTypeSystem());
9583 if (ast)
9584 return &ast->getASTContext();
9585 return nullptr;
9586}
9587
9588void TypeSystemClang::RequireCompleteType(CompilerType type) {
9589 // Technically, enums can be incomplete too, but we don't handle those as they
9590 // are emitted even under -flimit-debug-info.
9591 if (!TypeSystemClang::IsCXXClassType(type) &&
9592 !TypeSystemClang::IsObjCObjectOrInterfaceType(type))
9593 return;
9594
9595 if (type.GetCompleteType())
9596 return;
9597
9598 // No complete definition in this module. Mark the class as complete to
9599 // satisfy local ast invariants, but make a note of the fact that
9600 // it is not _really_ complete so we can later search for a definition in a
9601 // different module.
9602 // Since we provide layout assistance, layouts of types containing this class
9603 // will be correct even if we are not able to find the definition elsewhere.
9604 bool started = TypeSystemClang::StartTagDeclarationDefinition(type);
9605 lldbassert(started && "Unable to start a class type definition.");
9606 TypeSystemClang::CompleteTagDeclarationDefinition(type);
9607 const clang::TagDecl *td = ClangUtil::GetAsTagDecl(type);
9608 auto ts = type.GetTypeSystem<TypeSystemClang>();
9609 if (ts)
9610 ts->SetDeclIsForcefullyCompleted(td);
9611}
9612
9613namespace {
9614/// A specialized scratch AST used within ScratchTypeSystemClang.
9615/// These are the ASTs backing the different IsolatedASTKinds. They behave
9616/// like a normal ScratchTypeSystemClang but they don't own their own
9617/// persistent storage or target reference.
9618class SpecializedScratchAST : public TypeSystemClang {
9619public:
9620 /// \param name The display name of the TypeSystemClang instance.
9621 /// \param triple The triple used for the TypeSystemClang instance.
9622 /// \param ast_source The ClangASTSource that should be used to complete
9623 /// type information.
9624 SpecializedScratchAST(llvm::StringRef name, llvm::Triple triple,
9625 std::unique_ptr<ClangASTSource> ast_source)
9626 : TypeSystemClang(name, triple),
9627 m_scratch_ast_source_up(std::move(ast_source)) {
9628 // Setup the ClangASTSource to complete this AST.
9629 m_scratch_ast_source_up->InstallASTContext(*this);
9630 llvm::IntrusiveRefCntPtr<clang::ExternalASTSource> proxy_ast_source =
9631 m_scratch_ast_source_up->CreateProxy();
9632 SetExternalSource(proxy_ast_source);
9633 }
9634
9635 /// The ExternalASTSource that performs lookups and completes types.
9636 std::unique_ptr<ClangASTSource> m_scratch_ast_source_up;
9637};
9638} // namespace
9639
9640char ScratchTypeSystemClang::ID;
9641const std::nullopt_t ScratchTypeSystemClang::DefaultAST = std::nullopt;
9642
9643ScratchTypeSystemClang::ScratchTypeSystemClang(Target &target,
9644 llvm::Triple triple)
9645 : TypeSystemClang("scratch ASTContext", triple), m_triple(triple),
9646 m_target_wp(target.shared_from_this()),
9647 m_persistent_variables(
9648 new ClangPersistentVariables(target.shared_from_this())) {
9649 m_scratch_ast_source_up = CreateASTSource();
9650 m_scratch_ast_source_up->InstallASTContext(*this);
9651 llvm::IntrusiveRefCntPtr<clang::ExternalASTSource> proxy_ast_source =
9652 m_scratch_ast_source_up->CreateProxy();
9653 SetExternalSource(proxy_ast_source);
9654}
9655
9656void ScratchTypeSystemClang::Finalize() {
9657 TypeSystemClang::Finalize();
9658 m_scratch_ast_source_up.reset();
9659}
9660
9661TypeSystemClangSP
9662ScratchTypeSystemClang::GetForTarget(Target &target,
9663 std::optional<IsolatedASTKind> ast_kind,
9664 bool create_on_demand) {
9665 auto type_system_or_err = target.GetScratchTypeSystemForLanguage(
9666 lldb::eLanguageTypeC, create_on_demand);
9667 if (auto err = type_system_or_err.takeError()) {
9668 LLDB_LOG_ERROR(GetLog(LLDBLog::Target), std::move(err),
9669 "Couldn't get scratch TypeSystemClang: {0}");
9670 return nullptr;
9671 }
9672 auto ts_sp = *type_system_or_err;
9673 ScratchTypeSystemClang *scratch_ast =
9674 llvm::dyn_cast_or_null<ScratchTypeSystemClang>(ts_sp.get());
9675 if (!scratch_ast)
9676 return nullptr;
9677 // If no dedicated sub-AST was requested, just return the main AST.
9678 if (ast_kind == DefaultAST)
9679 return std::static_pointer_cast<TypeSystemClang>(ts_sp);
9680 // Search the sub-ASTs.
9681 return std::static_pointer_cast<TypeSystemClang>(
9682 scratch_ast->GetIsolatedAST(*ast_kind).shared_from_this());
9683}
9684
9685/// Returns a human-readable name that uniquely identifiers the sub-AST kind.
9686static llvm::StringRef
9687GetNameForIsolatedASTKind(ScratchTypeSystemClang::IsolatedASTKind kind) {
9688 switch (kind) {
9689 case ScratchTypeSystemClang::IsolatedASTKind::CppModules:
9690 return "C++ modules";
9691 }
9692 llvm_unreachable("Unimplemented IsolatedASTKind?");
9693}
9694
9695void ScratchTypeSystemClang::Dump(llvm::raw_ostream &output,
9696 llvm::StringRef filter, bool show_color) {
9697 // First dump the main scratch AST.
9698 output << "State of scratch Clang type system:\n";
9699 TypeSystemClang::Dump(output, filter, show_color);
9700
9701 // Now sort the isolated sub-ASTs.
9702 typedef std::pair<IsolatedASTKey, TypeSystem *> KeyAndTS;
9703 std::vector<KeyAndTS> sorted_typesystems;
9704 for (const auto &a : m_isolated_asts)
9705 sorted_typesystems.emplace_back(a.first, a.second.get());
9706 llvm::stable_sort(sorted_typesystems, llvm::less_first());
9707
9708 // Dump each sub-AST too.
9709 for (const auto &a : sorted_typesystems) {
9710 IsolatedASTKind kind =
9711 static_cast<ScratchTypeSystemClang::IsolatedASTKind>(a.first);
9712 output << "State of scratch Clang type subsystem "
9713 << GetNameForIsolatedASTKind(kind) << ":\n";
9714 a.second->Dump(output, filter, show_color);
9715 }
9716}
9717
9718UserExpression *ScratchTypeSystemClang::GetUserExpression(
9719 llvm::StringRef expr, llvm::StringRef prefix, SourceLanguage language,
9720 Expression::ResultType desired_type,
9721 const EvaluateExpressionOptions &options, ValueObject *ctx_obj) {
9722 TargetSP target_sp = m_target_wp.lock();
9723 if (!target_sp)
9724 return nullptr;
9725
9726 return new ClangUserExpression(*target_sp.get(), expr, prefix, language,
9727 desired_type, options, ctx_obj);
9728}
9729
9730FunctionCaller *ScratchTypeSystemClang::GetFunctionCaller(
9731 const CompilerType &return_type, const Address &function_address,
9732 const ValueList &arg_value_list, const char *name) {
9733 TargetSP target_sp = m_target_wp.lock();
9734 if (!target_sp)
9735 return nullptr;
9736
9737 Process *process = target_sp->GetProcessSP().get();
9738 if (!process)
9739 return nullptr;
9740
9741 return new ClangFunctionCaller(*process, return_type, function_address,
9742 arg_value_list, name);
9743}
9744
9745std::unique_ptr<UtilityFunction>
9746ScratchTypeSystemClang::CreateUtilityFunction(std::string text,
9747 std::string name) {
9748 TargetSP target_sp = m_target_wp.lock();
9749 if (!target_sp)
9750 return {};
9751
9752 return std::make_unique<ClangUtilityFunction>(
9753 *target_sp.get(), std::move(text), std::move(name),
9754 target_sp->GetDebugUtilityExpression());
9755}
9756
9757PersistentExpressionState *
9758ScratchTypeSystemClang::GetPersistentExpressionState() {
9759 return m_persistent_variables.get();
9760}
9761
9762void ScratchTypeSystemClang::ForgetSource(ASTContext *src_ctx,
9763 ClangASTImporter &importer) {
9764 // Remove it as a source from the main AST.
9765 importer.ForgetSource(&getASTContext(), src_ctx);
9766 // Remove it as a source from all created sub-ASTs.
9767 for (const auto &a : m_isolated_asts)
9768 importer.ForgetSource(&a.second->getASTContext(), src_ctx);
9769}
9770
9771std::unique_ptr<ClangASTSource> ScratchTypeSystemClang::CreateASTSource() {
9772 return std::make_unique<ClangASTSource>(
9773 m_target_wp.lock()->shared_from_this(),
9774 m_persistent_variables->GetClangASTImporter());
9775}
9776
9777static llvm::StringRef
9778GetSpecializedASTName(ScratchTypeSystemClang::IsolatedASTKind feature) {
9779 switch (feature) {
9780 case ScratchTypeSystemClang::IsolatedASTKind::CppModules:
9781 return "scratch ASTContext for C++ module types";
9782 }
9783 llvm_unreachable("Unimplemented ASTFeature kind?");
9784}
9785
9786TypeSystemClang &ScratchTypeSystemClang::GetIsolatedAST(
9787 ScratchTypeSystemClang::IsolatedASTKind feature) {
9788 auto found_ast = m_isolated_asts.find(feature);
9789 if (found_ast != m_isolated_asts.end())
9790 return *found_ast->second;
9791
9792 // Couldn't find the requested sub-AST, so create it now.
9793 std::shared_ptr<TypeSystemClang> new_ast_sp =
9794 std::make_shared<SpecializedScratchAST>(GetSpecializedASTName(feature),
9795 m_triple, CreateASTSource());
9796 m_isolated_asts.insert({feature, new_ast_sp});
9797 return *new_ast_sp;
9798}
9799
9800bool TypeSystemClang::IsForcefullyCompleted(lldb::opaque_compiler_type_t type) {
9801 if (type) {
9802 clang::QualType qual_type(GetQualType(type));
9803 const clang::RecordType *record_type =
9804 llvm::dyn_cast<clang::RecordType>(qual_type.getTypePtr());
9805 if (record_type) {
9806 const clang::RecordDecl *record_decl =
9807 record_type->getDecl()->getDefinitionOrSelf();
9808 if (std::optional<ClangASTMetadata> metadata = GetMetadata(record_decl))
9809 return metadata->IsForcefullyCompleted();
9810 }
9811 }
9812 return false;
9813}
9814
9815bool TypeSystemClang::SetDeclIsForcefullyCompleted(const clang::TagDecl *td) {
9816 if (td == nullptr)
9817 return false;
9818 std::optional<ClangASTMetadata> metadata = GetMetadata(td);
9819 if (!metadata)
9820 return false;
9821 m_has_forcefully_completed_types = true;
9822 metadata->SetIsForcefullyCompleted();
9823 SetMetadata(td, *metadata);
9824
9825 return true;
9826}
9827
9828void TypeSystemClang::LogCreation() const {
9829 if (auto *log = GetLog(LLDBLog::Expressions))
9830 LLDB_LOG(log, "Created new TypeSystem for (ASTContext*){0:x} '{1}'",
9831 &getASTContext(), getDisplayName());
9832}
